name: Senator JD Vance
subject: Jim Banks is a fighter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vance Victory
body:
Here is my full endorsement

| [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=348cf2b8c6ca466d991bd29b8975303d&_e=LS3H3K53c-yRakGsviFuqEJ8DDSk0Fwe4HTltM9iOojfdYfVAALxoamLSKN1JmQ4GROIDdBkqP9sHG66pwTn24KOOG-BkM-Vyds7MdQOhBEP7e21LyeJg99jO0KPiMDIfwvcV-PX9u_ceC6ntteCWb55AED-VOVdVVNvFO6P5z7AEnE9XlhD5dKAJkwwQlw3cjLk16guxNJbUpfYA6bX8bvOBMIe_P2v1yY8UEst23Qtm02w_xV04FeH088UwgPWgG8xMJ8gb-tazIqv_cJ_uM2f5C0_1ELwA9wRepjpOnjLSejEc0PwgI9MaWYRp_Xcqo865EBwmUEXPWp9m5XQZX6XWsHmv9vZFx5xDPQZtgHRaTOLDffMOVmGo9ipHVlZ9JExXjTNtqMsbnqXr4jKs2c9SvQkYWOZf7mR64M7ZD7W9c7-VsHCpreobE9IutdXMKzJkz_HXPJ6VU0QbeHrBNe-ol48rIcp0OGDpQC1q6ZBWoCjcNNqBmFHVdB8ooOZ6N9D4p5O9x5HurjMyp7-6Q%3D%3D)
---
Hi friends,

**[JD Vance here. I'm reaching out to tell you that I am proud to endorse my friend Jim Banks, who recently announced his run for the United State Senate in Indiana. Here is why he has my full support ⤵️ ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=348cf2b8c6ca466d991bd29b8975303d&_e=LS3H3K53c-yRakGsviFuqEJ8DDSk0Fwe4HTltM9iOojfdYfVAALxoamLSKN1JmQ4GROIDdBkqP9sHG66pwTn24KOOG-BkM-Vyds7MdQOhBEP7e21LyeJg99jO0KPiMDIfwvcV-PX9u_ceC6ntteCWb55AED-VOVdVVNvFO6P5z7AEnE9XlhD5dKAJkwwQlw3cjLk16guxNJbUpfYA6bX8bvOBMIe_P2v1yY8UEst23Qtm02w_xV04FeH088UwgPWgG8xMJ8gb-tazIqv_cJ_uM2f5C0_1ELwA9wRepjpOnjLSejEc0PwgI9MaWYRp_Xcqo865EBwmUEXPWp9m5XQZX6XWsHmv9vZFx5xDPQZtgHRaTOLDffMOVmGo9ipHVlZkzP5y6hzN-m3aMQ8MzHQG0icZinnI9wioXUzrLTuskHQdlWubQZxctFkRNoiWU2nq1fxW7j4e8SkX3BrDjsmyPJJUv78gibR9s1naqnkOnp908cefLNkQLNeI-iUvoebDSmBClp6Y0trS0qgFJc7pw%3D%3D)**

Jim knows what it means to fight for the people of this great nation. He served our country in Afghanistan with the U.S. Navy Reserve. Now, he continues to fight for us each day as one of the staunchest advocates for our conservative values in the House of Representatives. His ongoing commitment to defending American freedom speaks for itself. Jim walks the walk.

I can assure you that Jim is not one of those "big mouth" Republicans who say a lot but don't do much. He has been one of the most active and dedicated conservative members of Congress in the past few years, and he will continue to be in the U.S. Senate. Jim gets things done.

I can tell you first hand, we need more conservatives who fight for the people and our values in the Senate. **[That's why I encourage you to support Jim's campaign, ensure he is elected, and help flip the Senate with a strong conservative majority in 2024. ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=348cf2b8c6ca466d991bd29b8975303d&_e=LS3H3K53c-yRakGsviFuqEJ8DDSk0Fwe4HTltM9iOojfdYfVAALxoamLSKN1JmQ4GROIDdBkqP9sHG66pwTn24KOOG-BkM-Vyds7MdQOhBEP7e21LyeJg99jO0KPiMDIfwvcV-PX9u_ceC6ntteCWb55AED-VOVdVVNvFO6P5z7AEnE9XlhD5dKAJkwwQlw3cjLk16guxNJbUpfYA6bX8bvOBMIe_P2v1yY8UEst23Qtm02w_xV04FeH088UwgPWgG8xMJ8gb-tazIqv_cJ_uM2f5C0_1ELwA9wRepjpOnjLSejEc0PwgI9MaWYRp_Xcqo865EBwmUEXPWp9m5XQZX6XWsHmv9vZFx5xDPQZtgHRaTOLDffMOVmGo9ipHVlZYqABwjxbxCLFzYzTfcZjBeeX-7htRcGBohiDZq_EFBnn4JbAe0RajY3zYZsRzSjUBG_0c__-MyKi1JZ-N-pW7HW8LNw-oT6n3vW7L60MRDHA4B1ekHWS67QFA7SQet0lO_y67d1o8lS2On7q2ey8nA%3D%3D)**

| [**SUPPORT JIM BANKS**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=348cf2b8c6ca466d991bd29b8975303d&_e=LS3H3K53c-yRakGsviFuqEJ8DDSk0Fwe4HTltM9iOojfdYfVAALxoamLSKN1JmQ4GROIDdBkqP9sHG66pwTn24KOOG-BkM-Vyds7MdQOhBEP7e21LyeJg99jO0KPiMDIfwvcV-PX9u_ceC6ntteCWb55AED-VOVdVVNvFO6P5z7AEnE9XlhD5dKAJkwwQlw3cjLk16guxNJbUpfYA6bX8bvOBMIe_P2v1yY8UEst23Qtm02w_xV04FeH088UwgPWgG8xMJ8gb-tazIqv_cJ_uM2f5C0_1ELwA9wRepjpOnjLSejEc0PwgI9MaWYRp_Xcqo865EBwmUEXPWp9m5XQZX6XWsHmv9vZFx5xDPQZtgHRaTOLDffMOVmGo9ipHVlZ6S6M2S160LwClEehXkRK9IyXVezUYoK6-Yws9uNNlzyf9E_u8Oilc8JxHsvh1y4E61_toiy139fRePBJCHZebKe6JeIKtYhthGsGaXG5n32iKAeUn-5dgYpBWmuWfVLvN30abLgVG-04-DFSIPW_Uw%3D%3D)
---

Sincerely,
JD Vance for Senate

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance.

_If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation._ subject: Lindsey Graham said WHAT about Social Security?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
this is just flat out EVIL
| | **We’re absolutely appalled–** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230201_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=6&akid=6215%2E878179%2ER1WRfL) | [**35,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SIGN OUR URGENT PETITION NOW TO DEMAND CONGRESS PROTECT SOCIAL SECURITY »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230201_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=7&akid=6215%2E878179%2ER1WRfL)

Millions of Americans rely on Social Security. It is NOT an entitlement like Lindsey Graham seems to think!!

**Ultra-wealthy, out-of-touch Republicans like Senator Graham were never going to protect average Americans.**

_That’s why we have to step up to save Social Security today._

[**We can stop the GOP’s shameful scheme, but only with your help today – please, sign our urgent petition now demanding Congress protect Social Security! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/social-security/?source=VPP_20230201_EMPET_E2_T0_AC&t=8&akid=6215%2E878179%2ER1WRfL)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What you can do to support Tyre Nichols’ family
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

The cold-blooded killing of Tyre Nichols by Memphis police officers is a
devastating reminder of how broken this injustice system is. Like Summer
Lee recently said, “it’s painful every single time,” because Tyre’s life
mattered, and this never should have happened.

Video footage, training, and pretty words about police reform didn’t stop
this murder, and they won’t prevent police from murdering again. We know
that the culture of policing in America is what allows police to kill with
impunity, and the policies our lawmakers set enable them to keep doing so.
We need leaders who are willing to go up against the criminal injustice
system — people like Cori Bush and Summer Lee.

But we also know that it’s the job of elected leaders to always stand hand
in hand with the community on the ground. So today, we wanted to make sure
you had a way to support Tyre Nichols’ family right now.

Tyre Nichols’ parents are fundraising to support themselves while taking
time off work — time their work doesn’t provide. They’re looking to cover
the costs of Tyre’s funeral and more, and hoping to gather enough funds to
build a skateboard park memorializing his life.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/125920?t=1001&akid=27346%2E1203867%2EZSkmXI ]There are many critical ways to engage right now, but if you have the
means, we are encouraging our supporters to contribute what you can to the
GoFundMe organized by Tyre’s mother.

[Warning: Image heading fundraiser page is graphic.]

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1002&akid=27346%2E1203867%2EZSkmXI ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1003&akid=27346%2E1203867%2EZSkmXI ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230201-27346-footer&t=1004&refcode2=27346_1203867_ZSkmXI&akid=27346%2E1203867%2EZSkmXI

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=27346%2E1203867%2EZSkmXI

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
P.O. Box 910 Knoxville, TN 37901
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: =?utf-8?b?8J+ThSBGZWJydWFyeSA3LCAyMDIzIFJlbWluZGVy?=
subject: re: President Biden’s State of the Union
body:
Next Tuesday, February 7th, President Biden will deliver his annual State of the Union address. Will you be watching? | | |
---
| | **In less than a week, President Biden is delivering his annual State of the Union address!** 2022 was a year of historic accomplishments and landmark legislation for the Biden-Harris administration. Here are just a few examples:
* The Inflation Reduction Act
* The most significant gun safety legislation in decades
* Confirmed historic judicial nominees
* Record job growth
* And so much more!

It’s clear that President Biden and Democrats across the country are delivering for the American people. **But Republicans want Americans to believe the opposite – they’re actively rooting for low ratings around this primetime speech. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: You can give it to me straight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
**2023 Senate Survey**
Fellow American,

I know we haven’t touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear, Fellow American -- we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most.

Which is why I’m reaching out today. **[I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=52ca65e53316480287cfeb1056b14442&_e=4cC0704lB5iUvPPzkPqvilqMhbBDa5CuTFctBpKI5GL3_Pcp-SvQx0T_JfO1Gmsb-g3nBqfC2uL_gvB_TIJgdCbJdDxAaAIP4bgyB0U76l43DSpQiz0M7ZySiiXg0qi9h9mbIZ9m3WPSEcCMlsDfbWa5v2GeuNfMVFVW6a5JyzYvPDS7kjUwt7j9FYu3dLgJWeGXSuK0URDlohRiv2nbBNndMqIlJBBPDPc_w-XqboDMzbMO_5Y7dJrvrXmzmUVO1IkESrcP57TkPJkeO1YCkMUpnA31B80Q4d1-nxWxjBTVHW-CdQhvZwg7pcpFnNA34Nv6wutyxyKgGKKw5cOJ49j2E-2GUL61QANZBktudylHvB_FNCe9SJ9qzBf1nmTZklpeSfNl2scgNqKO6zDPIsc7Sp_NetMuRy-u69CZbC1R_iMIWU8J87-TBGR58vgtutlMMl_5SipYjChGJDny-g%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=52ca65e53316480287cfeb1056b14442&_e=4cC0704lB5iUvPPzkPqvilqMhbBDa5CuTFctBpKI5GL3_Pcp-SvQx0T_JfO1Gmsb-g3nBqfC2uL_gvB_TIJgdCbJdDxAaAIP4bgyB0U76l43DSpQiz0M7ZySiiXg0qi9h9mbIZ9m3WPSEcCMlsDfbWa5v2GeuNfMVFVW6a5JyzYvPDS7kjUwt7j9FYu3dLgJWeGXSuK0URDlohRiv2nbBNndMqIlJBBPDPc_w-XqboDMzbMO_5Y7dJrvrXmzmUVO1IkESrcP57TkPJkeO1YCkMUpnA31B80Q4d1-nxWxjBRlFdoXh_SSozLUcsllaV1bsa0INSv-v3I6jHQlLVnpTG2DzZ221pLpQn2zXnqFLEoIpABINKLWwP4Wif13COtNYX52HKBZY5utaYXQUc1r7XHqmDRDxzfsg0jldKQXHrwsqtsCDPRII0Hr5w05cZ8AiwR45BPFoAsuaspra3oC8w%3D%3D)
[**Open Your Survey >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=52ca65e53316480287cfeb1056b14442&_e=4cC0704lB5iUvPPzkPqvilqMhbBDa5CuTFctBpKI5GL3_Pcp-SvQx0T_JfO1Gmsb-g3nBqfC2uL_gvB_TIJgdCbJdDxAaAIP4bgyB0U76l43DSpQiz0M7ZySiiXg0qi9h9mbIZ9m3WPSEcCMlsDfbWa5v2GeuNfMVFVW6a5JyzYvPDS7kjUwt7j9FYu3dLgJWeGXSuK0URDlohRiv2nbBNndMqIlJBBPDPc_w-XqboDMzbMO_5Y7dJrvrXmzmUVO1IkESrcP57TkPJkeO1YCkMUpnA31B80Q4d1-nxWxjBTtM2MpM5Toq4kbdDPt4o7ogky5GCNvPq8i-HxQdvUn7EF4upFOk_Gosd62OalCfP4Y-CRwGU4snDX1FhrjTA2eF_A1bS5wi97rFS0pNcDykIhXzRChWyrR_jaqcZogBv_T-j5fot8Ba0NjRI01nXzQIqtU8bhMcMt8FPHhDUNzlQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American, it doesn’t take a rocket scientist to know the Democrats’ liberal agenda is crippling our country. Now more than ever what Washington needs is problem solvers who are willing to do whatever it takes to get things done for the American people.

I’ve seen firsthand that my Republican colleagues in the Senate are up for the challenge, but now we need to hear from you.

[**Please, let me know what policies you think the Senate should be focusing on and I’ll make sure we get to work.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=52ca65e53316480287cfeb1056b14442&_e=4cC0704lB5iUvPPzkPqvilqMhbBDa5CuTFctBpKI5GL3_Pcp-SvQx0T_JfO1Gmsb-g3nBqfC2uL_gvB_TIJgdCbJdDxAaAIP4bgyB0U76l43DSpQiz0M7ZySiiXg0qi9h9mbIZ9m3WPSEcCMlsDfbWa5v2GeuNfMVFVW6a5JyzYvPDS7kjUwt7j9FYu3dLgJWeGXSuK0URDlohRiv2nbBNndMqIlJBBPDPc_w-XqboDMzbMO_5Y7dJrvrXmzmUVO1IkESrcP57TkPJkeO1YCkMUpnA31B80Q4d1-nxWxjBQ04ikuQ_AMCfzPupMK5fMW9H8i2xHRFzLbmwp0QXxtfTD5tY2ReUc5XOdyxhRSZ-10Wyal50ILPOTjuGvJ1PAoA-8aVD7B8VqV-J92qae835vXmUXVispiA-v_rEnST6RGNC45I4M-YDadPW2413810IZzpVgezlDE1tdPUGJAaA%3D%3D)

Thanks,
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=52ca65e53316480287cfeb1056b14442&_e=4cC0704lB5iUvPPzkPqvilqMhbBDa5CuTFctBpKI5GL3_Pcp-SvQx0T_JfO1Gmsb-g3nBqfC2uL_gvB_TIJgdCbJdDxAaAIP4bgyB0U76l43DSpQiz0M7ZySiiXg0qi9h9mbIZ9m3WPSEcCMlsDfbWa5v2GeuNfMVFVW6a5JyzYvPDS7kjUwt7j9FYu3dLgJWeGXSuK0URDlohRiv2nbBNndMqIlJBBPDPc_w-XqboDMzbMO_5Y7dJrvrXmzmUVO1IkESrcP57TkPJkeO1YCkMUpnA31B80Q4d1-nxWxjBSvTbi_SZBo4s7ixwyJDwq5JpyzeP8xX09ILLXcqBMIRFPnvCGfhNIBQ-4IvVxUan7BKdL0IcSA-RECPCAu4WUStA36K95aeRFrPtnsnB0JAd2c0C5h6Ip7dQ0XJaw3aAmbrvz4V4JGwW_nVwwAB3nZuyXE-8hIeh9AAe7Rry1i3g%3D%3D)
Lindsey Graham

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: [Video] Biden’s Supply Chain Crisis is Endangering Children
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed8a075db5d051b6/6573d2669a6f5926c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Right now, as you read this, far too many communities and American families are facing a hugely critical shortage of vital, specifically-designed children’s medicine like TYLENOL and
amoxicillin... in the middle of flu season.
It is imperative that we not only take steps to address the immediate short-term problem, but more importantly, the dire need to proactively tackle this avoidable long-term issue.
This is why I made it a point to bring this important issue to the floor of the U.S. Senate.
[**Watch My U.S. Senate Address Here >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed8a075db5d051b6/b4068a4ffb1fafa4c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
My team and I have been hearing from multiple pharmacists, detailing the startling reality of our medication supply chain and complete lack of availability:
_“Currently, we cannot order multiple antibiotics commonly used for pediatric patients, including amoxicillin. _The supply of medication simply does not exist_.”_
_“This is rapidly turning into a very serious situation among the most vulnerable population – our children.”_
You can hear more about the full extent of this pressing issue by [**watching my speech on the**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed8a075db5d051b6/8bb7bf9bed80ff33c3d6b838967d376c/33013)[**U.S. Senate floor here**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed8a075db5d051b6/4d9c6d7a802f34b2c3d6b838967d376c/33013).
**I will not allow this to turn into Biden’s baby formula crisis, part two.** We ABSOLUTELY NEED to produce life-saving medications here in the United States.
The pandemic clearly demonstrated just how dependent we are on imports from foreign countries... some of which do not exactly have America’s best interests at heart.
**China is chief among them.**
---
[**LISTEN TO MY FULL REMARKS**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed8a075db5d051b6/cde6ebd13a82e5dfc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
The Biden Administration has punted our freedom and independence, outsourced our future – simply put, D.C. Leftists have dropped the ball for Americans every chance they’ve
had.
This is about saving lives, and getting away from foreign dependence that places America in a very dangerous position and national security risk.
**I’m fighting to stop this, on all fronts.[Learn more here >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/ed8a075db5d051b6/c4b2be4899372a59c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
– Coach Tuberville
---

name: American Federation for Children
subject: Families deserve the power to choose, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by American Federation for Children |
body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice!
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zouf7ap8v4c2lhnmd83avgei2sm71h2iqi46o7f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling.**That’s why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide.This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we’re RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, friend?_**Here is the pledge...**
---
| | _“I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school.”_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpc1c6ir1i3lvp06ve29gf3uidlj093ct9i52mf8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)
---
| | **Friend, if you agree that parents deserve CHOICE – _and kids deserve better_ – [_join our movement and sign the Education Freedom Pledge today! >>_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z14594t52s55sfnv0jak9bsqma4djtkmd0drvlr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)**
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlau9tu7vuar5m2gdknj0qha4fdfnknsvnf2nf9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)
---
| | When you sign the Education Freedom Pledge, you join a diverse coalition of some of the MOST influential legislators and school choice activists in America.**Some of the Education Freedom Pledge’s top signers include...**
---
| |
* Iowa Governor Kim Reynolds
* AFC Senior Fellow Corey DeAngelis
* Wisconsin Speaker of the House Robin Vos
* Florida Education Commissioner Manny Diaz Jr.
* **[_Add YOUR NAME here >>_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqgfa6iv2kglcpahuge7hjiqb69gbtg9eltahblg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)**

---
| | Friend, 72% of Americans now support school choice after millions of families saw first-hand during the pandemic that a one-size-fits-all education isn’t best for ANY individual child. Unfortunately, the opponents of our movement – the teachers’ unions – wield irrational levels of influence on education policy, **and we need your voice.** **If enough grassroots Americans sign the Education Freedom Pledge, we can overcome the teacher's unions and give families the choices they deserve.[_We hope you’ll take a stand today! >>_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zga1qomohk1t65foltat5k5cbr633sidl3ejeifg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)**
---
| | [**SIGN TODAY >> STAND FOR SCHOOL CHOICE!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztdim3apeerli41ahcphero766pdr1srh06p0pm0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cph2bs)
---
| | Thank you,Digital TeamAmerican Federation of Children
---

---
| |
---

subject: They’re planning massive cuts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by American Federation for Children |
body:
espite the strides made for school choice, our opponents are trying to... [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7967%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=IUnzsp5v6KSNQVDpotWXSQ&sysid=1)

---
Friend, this is urgent! If you haven’t heard the news, Michigan is planning to make **MASSIVE CUTS** to the state's charter schools. This disproportionately affects low-income families who may have no other options for sending their children to a quality school. **Despite the strides made for school choice, our opponents are trying to undo the hard work of parents and groups like ours.** We need your help to continue leading and winning the fight for school choice. _**[Chip in a critical first donation of 2023 to help start our fight strong this year >>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c94930%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QGQzhCt%2fP6Ypv8zbNM4Ckg&sysid=1)**_

body:
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62278757:6VuJ0HGCN:m:1:3331421248:86270E585A46843A574DC1EBF0BB5323:r) Dear Peter, I hope this email finds you well. I'm writing to you today because we are facing a critical moment in the fight to secure the Republican Majority. **[Marco Rubio is working tirelessly to secure our party's success,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62278758:6VuJ0HGCN:m:1:3331421248:86270E585A46843A574DC1EBF0BB5323:r)** but he can't do it alone. He needs your help. You may have noticed that [the Democrats have been beating us in recent elections,](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62278759:6VuJ0HGCN:m:1:3331421248:86270E585A46843A574DC1EBF0BB5323:r) and a big part of their success has been due to their strong grassroots support. They have donors who are willing to chip in early and often to support battleground races, and if we want to win we need to do the same thing (but better). I know that times are tough and everyone has their own financial responsibilities, but I'm asking you to please consider chipping in any amount that you can to support Senator Marco Rubio and help Elect Republicans. Every little bit helps, and we can't afford to wait until we've been outraised by millions of dollars or out-knocked millions of doors. We need to start winning NOW. |

subject: Have you read “The Law”?
body:

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn6fs09v0acakmeje2404inpgt9bkbdpfmjj46eo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cdh2bs)

Hello Friend,

Have you ever read "The Law" by Frederic Bastiat?

If you said _" yes,"_ I'm sure you understand why this book has stood the test of time as a defense of your life, liberty, and property. I would love to send you a copy so you can read it again or share it with a friend.

But if you said _" not yet,"_ I'd _really_ love to send you a copy so that you can gain a deeper understanding of the fallacy behind most failed government programs.

I encourage you to read this book, Friend. In fact, I will send you a copy if you show your support for the Foundation for Economic Education (FEE).

My name is Lawrence W. Reed, President Emeritus of FEE, and it is our vision to make the ideas of liberty familiar, credible, and compelling to the rising generation.

Through our FEE in the Classroom program, we teach high school students and teachers about the important ideas of liberty and free market economics, as well as how to share these ideas with others.

To help ensure that this program remains a success, I've set a goal of connecting with 100 new supporters this week.

[_**Friend, can you help support FEE -- and receive a copy of "The Law" by Frederic Bastiat -- by donating $10, $25, $50, or any amount? Click here to claim your copy >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2piqs3pdbeco6uo7iafbnkf8ficrnplrv0p6j4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cdh2bs)

**FEE in the Classroom** is countering the radical indoctrination being pushed by teachers across the country.

This unique program teaches young Americans the principles of free markets, individual liberty, and limited government.

We challenge students to think outside the box and to challenge the mainstream narrative.

**FEE in the Classroom 's goal is to teach 65,000 students the principles of liberty this year.**

Students learn how the core principles of individual liberty and free-market economics apply to their daily lives, communities, careers, and the state of the nation.

[_**Get your copy of "The Law" today >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4g9kb8u08vco2dke8chcmn02jjep5ct5g4e97o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cdh2bs)

Friend, FEE has a long history of using books to fight socialism.

Before the collapse of the Soviet Empire, I smuggled books (and raised money to support book smuggling) into Eastern European countries such as Poland and the Soviet Union itself.

Even Ronald Reagan, who helped destroy the Soviet Union, was a big fan of FEE's magazine, The Freeman. Here he is with Nancy Reagan enjoying a copy of it.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zciuviq7jvs63ht13e01j6chtki1gu1s6uu3fkc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpj6aor4cdh2bs)

Now I want to use "The Law" to encourage you to support FEE's mission.

Your gift helps build a future of freedom with the next generation.

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Closed Primaries?
body:
From Erik Aadland
| | | |
---
---
|
# The Case for Closing our Republican Primary
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
The Republican Party's purpose is to win elections. And we should be winning elections given that Democrat policies are destroying Colorado and any hope of a brighter future for our children. Yet while everything Democrats do is disastrous and destructive, they continue to win elections. The status quo is not working for Republicans, and if we do not make some changes to our way of conducting business, we cannot continue to expect different results (i.e., to win elections). One change we must consider now, is whether to close our Republican primary to unaffiliated voters.
## Here are the major points I see in favor of closing our primary:
---
# 1) Closing our primary will prevent Democrats from influencing Republican primary election outcomes using advertising targeting unaffiliated voters.
---
| |
---|---
|
In the recent election cycle, Democrats spent millions of dollars advertising to unaffiliated voters to try to influence the outcome of our primaries so that the least competitive Republican candidates (i.e. easiest to defeat from the D's perspective) would win. Closing our primary takes this tactic off the table.
---
| |
---
|
## 2) Closing our primary will prevent Democrats from registering as unaffiliated voters to influence our primaries.
---
| | |
---|---
|
The Democrats' motto is "by any means necessary," meaning they will do anything to win, regardless of ethics or principles. If they feel threatened, might they consider this underhanded tactic? Let's take this option out of Democrat's hands.
|
---
## 3) Closing our primary will reduce campaign costs
---
| |
---|---
|
By reducing the targeted voter pool in the primary to only Republicans, it will significantly scale down the cost of advertising in the primary, preserving precious resources which may then be focused on beating Democrats in the general election.
| |
---
## 4) Closing our primary will increase participation in the Republican Party.
---
| |
---|---
|
It should mean something to be a Republican. Closing the primary, along with other positive actions, will serve as a catalyst to drive conservative-leaning unaffiliated voters into our ranks. Currently, it is easy to influence primaries from the safety of the middle, removing a major impetus to affiliate with a certain party. Closing the primary will give people a vested interest in affiliating in order to help select the best candidates. We must encourage (and inspire) conservatives to engage with the Republican Party so we don't become obsolete due to lack of participation.
| |
---
## 5) Closing our primary would force us to evolve to remain relevant.
---
| |
---|---
|
Participation in the Republican Party is way down, our identity is unclear, and unaffiliated voters are the largest contingent. As it stands now, Republicans are forced to campaign blindly in primaries to the unaffiliated bloc, often skewing their message to court unaffiliated voters instead of Republicans. This waters down Republican messaging, often making it unclear or untrustworthy, resulting in a less compelling case for conservative-minded people to join the party, while potentially harming public confidence.
| |
---
## 6) Closing our primary will improve marketing and fundraising efficiencies.
---
| |
---|---
|
For the Republican Party to effectively market itself and find ways to appeal to Coloradans, it must have significant funds to counter the extreme media bias and an exceptionally well-funded Democrat machine. To do so, it must grow its small donor base out of registered Republicans. Closing the primary will facilitate a much more efficient use of funds to market to those who care and are willing to contribute to Republican candidates.
---
The most common argument I hear against closing the primaries is that it will deeply offend unaffiliated voters, further ostracizing the Republican Party from the largest voting contingent. In fact, most Coloradans do not vote in primaries altogether. For example, in Congressional District 7 (where I ran for Congress) only 37% of general election voters participated in the primaries. Simply put, aside from political activists and the left-leaning media, most people will not notice if Republicans close their primary
---
Now let me be clear, I do not think it would be healthy if we opt-out of the primaries altogether, as some Republicans advocate. In fact, I think opting out would be catastrophic; it would mean Republicans choosing their nominees solely through the caucus process, excluding the majority of registered Republicans. Instead, what I propose has all registered Republicans receiving a primary ballot.
---
| Republicans must chart a new course forward, considering all options at our disposal, grounded in healthy, respectful, public debate. Together, we must act purposefully to win elections and counter the destructive, opportunity crushing, harmful legislative actions of the Democrats. We must grow our ranks by restoring trust with the public and re-instilling pride in our Grand Old Party. It is time to boldly make a brighter future for coming generations. Colorado and this nation need strong, wise Republicans, united in common cause, grounded in truth, virtue, sound principles and a desire to be of service.
We must start winning again--everything we hold dear is at stake.
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AQz4YZiBrRwnDfKT3_d_4ll3WxwigbPjQLDAKxuz0zy1NcTx8e1_hZ-HmVqUaobTdRVKZ-iVOFW5rizvvsChyCezV_ierw65USe32Kco0mXlc4ONiAEYLwyDWa9yPl9-MHZz3Leb2AliM4Tmvz8JfAgZEt0d39cwpr_4jhCLju6rgc-7gTKBev1StxQlSMSoTDCpRUf6gRFPR5bU2uR3SKbLfDCoCcL-OLTA8hfUa0IbPi7ByZrvlV-DrbH06gQb&c=Ugr6PRQo1p-mA2LHpcMNKXQ_Mp40fGL67rh1D_XA21wEuGyaVdp-oA==&ch=hS00rbv6IFviAyCs6xG2LghvIvsabQ9wrig-PZD5JayZzOhm0tGEZg==)
---
|
---
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a former Congressional Candidate (CO-7), West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
---
|
---
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AQz4YZiBrRwnDfKT3_d_4ll3WxwigbPjQLDAKxuz0zy1NcTx8e1_hXa-vmxAypU5HI0MaAa5sMmdOUPkr0ZC6A9SW1uHQDmGhJQQN0wNXZ8ZC6K96ZRKWd0xNsZtiJvVw0vpC_HhsmywCKXO7hJEmqlpexP0LThxvMApxSDVX6l3Nb855UwAIAp-eZTbrnFnyTIy79TVNGw=&c=Ugr6PRQo1p-mA2LHpcMNKXQ_Mp40fGL67rh1D_XA21wEuGyaVdp-oA==&ch=hS00rbv6IFviAyCs6xG2LghvIvsabQ9wrig-PZD5JayZzOhm0tGEZg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AQz4YZiBrRwnDfKT3_d_4ll3WxwigbPjQLDAKxuz0zy1NcTx8e1_hXynblNYWqqlSBNy4k6AI1vutzbqFVyqjCEiKTBFsUpK9KIYAg1i_DKFSbVZx02h8hHAlf2DwjUHqh0jUcSoATNdjyKlKvimPlFvNSocu_E5_atmEpzcm-u0uI22ULFUDw==&c=Ugr6PRQo1p-mA2LHpcMNKXQ_Mp40fGL67rh1D_XA21wEuGyaVdp-oA==&ch=hS00rbv6IFviAyCs6xG2LghvIvsabQ9wrig-PZD5JayZzOhm0tGEZg==) [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AQz4YZiBrRwnDfKT3_d_4ll3WxwigbPjQLDAKxuz0zy1NcTx8e1_hXa-vmxAypU5ub7HqjQ8K53vP2g3F5R1DhFTpxOA_kNiX_PSrANwkjmQMZIBLBea19HQ7l--iE1-Nq-dXko5HXfAM2CzDYvGyvhnQ4BjXHSM&c=Ugr6PRQo1p-mA2LHpcMNKXQ_Mp40fGL67rh1D_XA21wEuGyaVdp-oA==&ch=hS00rbv6IFviAyCs6xG2LghvIvsabQ9wrig-PZD5JayZzOhm0tGEZg==)

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Demand Climate Action Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We cannot stay silent as our homes and our neighbors’ homes face imminent danger.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58164787/390244511/-662977927?refcode=blu-jane-iar-1-em&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NWRiNzliLTBiYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5H8KBfxBMoAkPpk79Iv99XrPlgLnvpvNorsI40CBHtE=)
---
| Hi, it's Jane Fonda. The catastrophic effects of climate change are growing more _**severe**_ each day.

The United States experienced 20 climate-related disasters in 2021. That’s second only to the year before where we experienced 22.

There seems to be no sign of slowing down – we have seen record floods, drought, wildfires, and deadly storms wreak havoc on communities across the country.

All told, these disasters are projected to cost the United States an estimated $100 billion or more each year, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. What’s more, these disasters are directly threatening the homes and health of **hundreds of millions** of people across the globe.

**_We cannot stay silent as our homes and our neighbors’ homes face imminent danger._**

We need members of Congress to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and pass climate legislation, but we shouldn’t have to wait for effective climate action – President Biden has the authority to declare a climate emergency and act to rein in planet-warming fossil fuel pollution right now before it’s too late. [**_Sign our petition today to make it clear to the President and the rest of our elected leaders that we need an emergency declaration now before it’s too late._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58164788/390244512/-1569063787?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI5NWRiNzliLTBiYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5H8KBfxBMoAkPpk79Iv99XrPlgLnvpvNorsI40CBHtE=&emci=05be9b2f-9f75-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=b95db79b-0ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4823105)

clean_body: We cannot stay silent as our homes and our neighbors’ homes face imminent danger. | = | Hi, it's Jane Fonda. The catastrophic effects of climate change are growing more severe each day. The United States experienced 20 climate-related disasters in 2021. That’s second only to the year before where we experienced 22. There seems to be no sign of slowing down – we have seen record floods, drought, wildfires, and deadly storms wreak havoc on communities across the country. All told, these disasters are projected to cost the United States an estimated $100 billion or more each year, according to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. What’s more, these disasters are directly threatening the homes and health of hundreds of millions of people across the globe. We cannot stay silent as our homes and our neighbors’ homes face imminent danger. We need members of Congress to stand up to the fossil fuel industry and pass climate legislation, but we shouldn’t have to wait for effective climate action – President Biden has the authority to declare a climate emergency and act to rein in planet-warming fossil fuel pollution right now before it’s too late. | Without immediate emergency action to transition away from fossil fuels, our future looks bleak. | Thank you for demanding climate action, Jane Fonda | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: My “Wall of Women”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Back in the day, I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate – let alone become one of the first women senators in history to represent Nevada.
| | |
---
Friend,
Back in the day, I never imagined I’d run for the U.S. Senate – let alone become one of the first women senators in history to represent Nevada. You see, before I ever set foot in Congress, I worked as a computer programmer and systems analyst in what has long been a male-dominated field.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58164484/390243350/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2289-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI4ZDNmOC0wYWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTIPbgjVOkTySnV36eFRdvPUgVBTzhXEHKPszQfC5wI=)
During that time in my life, I saw firsthand the pay discrimination and challenges facing so many women in the workplace. Even today, women are still having these same experiences and still fighting for equal pay for equal work.

But it's this experience that has driven so much of my work in the Senate to stand up for women and families. It's why I fight so hard for paycheck fairness, for paid family leave, and for women's equal rights.
**It's also why I have a wall in my office that's filled with photos of fierce, dedicated, trailblazing women who have paved the way for me and fought for our rights throughout history.** They remind me every day of what we can collectively achieve when we set our goals high – and that this fight for _full_ equality is far from over.
**But to continue this critical fight in the Senate, I urgently need your help.** With _FiveThirtyEight_ reporting that Republicans have "a clear path" to winning back the majority, election experts say that my seat is one of the GOP's best pickup opportunities – which means I'm a top target for defeat.
**[_So please, friend, if you're standing with me in the fight to keep Nevada blue, defend the Senate for Democrats, and continue working toward true equality in our country, will you chip in $5 or more now?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58164488/390243358/610767770?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2289-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWI4ZDNmOC0wYWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KTIPbgjVOkTySnV36eFRdvPUgVBTzhXEHKPszQfC5wI=)**
Thank you. Together, I know we can keep breaking down barriers and keep working to lift up women in Nevada and across the country.
Jacky
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.rosenfornevada.com/p/lu4OBSNc3UKuSuNlvLb3Zg2?unsubscribedata=XXq5VGcLJiphUC2%2BVICrFiT4Yx56kt2fVOV7DBvrJlFzNLAT2R7HQ7QkkgCTxz4PWr409bMud4a0A2YD8DGrcs4hHedeb8aEtjxumRkKGPa8i7R%2BR7R%2FiqCK9w2NmxGO7e%2BIJ%2F0xEDGmRWkA2DyxTxYTwaMddoguvSONhr8JHjWb6YoJxz1liIP6u%2FKWgsLqOLmHLs6Q2OjTnRU5HYR6BUUc9N9gxtT5iJ%2BpUHw3YjMjHqIIYjmz35byBlhPHg%2Bpk95xbeIcVDEwi3oMycARV3LFQp1DAycaVxJbvz6b7HzsmFx%2FDmACsMQ2ayhGsD%2B7C4TlFozjFmE0DB%2BoWZvUca3YKgqRDErv2IIhLhMoKr%2FC%2FTRMo0nSLky5eGyJgnhhL3MbMHHuOAVooy1akiHi8QXbEpHFom5cNQiCaseDNg8%3D) Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | Paid for by Rosen for Nevada

body:
The Education Freedom Pledge is a way for lawmakers and citizens alike to stand for school choice! | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b3ebf3bcaa344bc9c420739c941aefe&_e=sLlwG8rnkJaqKND7F0UNR5y9L1k5SpCnIcOMFJZdiynTLgoQLUtwzVC2GqRXiInbnP-zVXEocfZVrkQ2tDSb3_gAd4njjPfKztyg3Tko58wl7RddNEXY3sYAGRs92VkmAyZLm6hiMBB1FzdFfghia872bTVLWp90UkOuS3GeZtZxxCGiyG6XLUUoaXC8HCjqaB2i8UcId8FmW__UYDtS1Vg0COMeDUibK3jvPxC2FX75JVBPC8I0R8T4Drd3r9ZeJ9C1QtSRPMwnrFkJizGsLA21EJQiroHj_RpbwrqcnE9M_w80uYXHG1HeQJtMK6eR989qwomOeIgnMZx9oVWXvSmUrOJY64N9AsT3KbyRAiMYwrB0EIWLCI90-9BNxXxX)
---
| | Friend, We believe that ALL families in America deserve a wide range of educational choices for their kids, whether they opt for public schools, private schools, charter schools, OR homeschooling. **That 's why we launched the Education Freedom Pledge in the Fall of 2021...** _to rally grassroots supporters of school choice and garner support from legislative figures across the country._ The result? Thousands of everyday Americans and legislators across the country signed the pledge, took a stand for school choice, and made a difference in the school choice movement nationwide. This winter, with so many school choice initiatives once again hanging in the balance in states across the country, **we 're RE-LAUNCHING the Education Freedom Pledge to re-ignite support for SCHOOL CHOICE!** _Will you take a stand for school choice today, Friend?_ **Here is the pledge ...**
---
| | _" I pledge to support policies that promote parental rights in education and educational freedom. This includes the right of parents to voice their opinions at school board meetings and to take their children's taxpayer-funded education dollars to the education providers of their choosing - whether it be a public, private, charter, or home school."_
---
| | [**SIGN THE PLEDGE TODAY >>**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9b3ebf3bcaa344bc9c420739c941aefe&_e=sLlwG8rnkJaqKND7F0UNR5y9L1k5SpCnIcOMFJZdiynTLgoQLUtwzVC2GqRXiInbnP-zVXEocfZVrkQ2tDSb3_gAd4njjPfKztyg3Tko58wl7RddNEXY3sYAGRs92VkmAyZLm6hiMBB1FzdFfghia872bTVLWp90UkOuS3GeZtZxxCGiyG6XLUUoaXC8HCjqaB2i8UcId8FmW__UYDtS1Vg0COMeDUibK3jvPxC2FX6VMDB-8Lnb8VOUgKFgdYiTWk-toSoFR5VAqcwL3MhjAtorWjCNG2M4eu9S3lySP6-7fY2ybX063Dlxw-tzqADXezXmNY_3SUfKv9qAIZa7i3gPI6LKf0kk2LbitYM_RamtIQbf222AOpybJSr1sF0Z)

name: Wes Moore
subject: State of the State
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58167968/390256598/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Nzk1ODBjOC0xMmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l5zfZgz4X5a7EYAQZPcB4R0_JVSvhlnV9LJSgb3zH9A=&emci=15731655-66a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=479580c8-12a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
Friend, Yesterday, I had the honor of delivering the official State of the State address as your 63rd Governor of Maryland. For almost three years, I have traveled our state, talking to Marylanders from every region, every race, every creed, in many of your districts, and I listened to what they had to say. They are worried about our economy, and whether they can keep pace with the cost-of-living. They worry about safety in their communities. Families struggle to find affordable child care and Pre-K. People of all ages get lost in the maze of behavioral health crises and trauma. Yet, despite the challenges, the Marylanders I talked to were not only fast to offer solutions but expressed a deep desire to be a part of the solution. They were the first to organize a food drive at their local school. They raised their hands to watch the kids in the neighborhood. They are willing to work in our local government and our state government. **In short, Marylanders are ready to serve.** I am only here right now because people in my life who stepped up even when they were not called. People who served, even if they did not call it that. People who were willing to sacrifice in the moment for the hope of a better tomorrow. The teachers, who gave me the tools to think for myself. The coaches who pushed me, even when I wanted to stop. The ministers who prayed for me and my family, even when there was no clear path forward. And the school counselors who helped me see a horizon I was not ready to see for myself. This state is full of those individuals. People who refuse to quit, who lift you up when you are down, and who will spark a light in yourself even if it only glimmers in the dark. This state was built by them. Built by people who stepped up to serve. Whether you are in Oakland or Ocean City, in Hagerstown or Havre de Grace, one of the things we can all agree on, is that we’ve got work to do. This is a state where the opportunities are boundless, but the challenges are undeniable. It is also a state where there is no obstacle we cannot address, no challenge we cannot tackle, no hill we cannot climb, if we are intentional, move in partnership, and commit to promoting service as a state ideal. **On day one of my administration, I ordered the creation of the Department of Service and Civic Innovation.** This was not a stunt. This was not because it sounded nice. This was because it is a fundamental part of who I am, and it’s in the DNA of this state. Our order consolidates and elevates the agencies of state government that support service opportunities. We need to follow it with legislation to create a Service Year Option. While our young people give back, they also lay the foundation for their future success through job training and mentorship programs, and create a lifelong habit of service to our state. Something we so desperately need. Whether they’re preparing our state for climate change, tutoring our students, or caring for the sick, young people should have the option to perform important service today and build a foundation for our shared future. This is the first effort of its kind in the nation, and Maryland will lead the way. It is time for our state to be bold, but that doesn’t mean we are being reckless. Our administration has put forth a plan to make historic investments in people, AND it spends $1 billion less than the last fiscal year. **We made the largest investment in public education by any governor in our state’s history AND introduced $200 million in targeted tax relief for children in poverty and veterans in retirement.** We put forward a plan to make Maryland the first state to end child poverty, AND we kept 10% in the rainy day fund. Let’s put an end to the belief that we cannot invest in the future today, while also preparing for the uncertainty of tomorrow. It’s Just. Not. True. Together, we can ensure every child in Maryland receives a high-quality public education, while making sure their teachers and staff are supported with the resources and compensation they deserve. We can make our communities safer while building more trust in law enforcement. We can make this a state where everyone from young people to veterans to small-business owners to retirees want to stay and can thrive. These are all collective goals, and collective ideas, and the only way we will accomplish them, is collectively. Thank you for being a part of this movement to create a Maryland that leaves no one behind. I can’t wait to see what we accomplish, together. Elevate, Wes
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: He’s running!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Help us send him back to the Senate next year

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58169997/390263838/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmZTZkOC0xNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rX5zC7ZnheTfJCmHIBHBpWq5zn7P1WZcd5bOGycZkg=&emci=f034c42e-47a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=134fe6d8-16a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, Tim Kaine has officially launched his Senate re-election bid. I am excited to keep the band together and continue our work together for Virginia. But I also think we need to be clear about what’s coming, because we know Republicans are going to try to capture his seat and flip the Senate next year. The truth is, we have a challenge ahead, Derek. We all remember how good of a year 2018 was for Democrats, back when Tim was running the last time. But candidly, 2024 is shaping up to be a tougher year. I know Tim is going to run a winning campaign once again, but we’re all going to have to work even harder this time around to make sure we send him back to the Senate next November. That work starts now. So I want to personally ask you to please make an initial contribution to Tim Kaine’s re-election campaign. _**[Can you help us hold on to our Senate majority by donating just $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58169998/390263840/855902502?refcode=mw_em_230202_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmZTZkOC0xNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rX5zC7ZnheTfJCmHIBHBpWq5zn7P1WZcd5bOGycZkg=)**_ Together, Senator Kaine and I have fought tirelessly to deliver lasting results for Virginia – from investing in infrastructure, to supporting our military, lowering drug costs, and expanding internet access, to name a few. But there’s plenty more to be done to strengthen our economy, protect our civil rights, and invest in a greener future. And there’s no one I’d rather be fighting alongside than Tim Kaine. Look, I’ve been friends with Tim for more than 40 years. He is an outstanding public servant, and it’s been an honor working alongside him to deliver for Virginia. But in order for us to continue making meaningful progress in the Senate, we need to fight back against Republicans and special interests who are going to pour money into winning this seat. With your help, I know we can send Tim Kaine back to the Senate to keep up the fight for Virginia. _**[Can I count on you to join me in my work to re-elect Sen. Kaine? Chip in today if you’re with me>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58169999/390263841/855902502?refcode=mw_em_230202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmZTZkOC0xNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rX5zC7ZnheTfJCmHIBHBpWq5zn7P1WZcd5bOGycZkg=)**_ Thank you, Mark _ _ **[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58170000/390263843/855902502?refcode=mw_em_230202_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMzRmZTZkOC0xNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3rX5zC7ZnheTfJCmHIBHBpWq5zn7P1WZcd5bOGycZkg=)** _ _

clean_body: Help us send him back to the Senate next year | | | Derek, Tim Kaine has officially launched his Senate re-election bid. I am excited to keep the band together and continue our work together for Virginia. But I also think we need to be clear about what’s coming, because we know Republicans are going to try to capture his seat and flip the Senate next year. The truth is, we have a challenge ahead, Derek. We all remember how good of a year 2018 was for Democrats, back when Tim was running the last time. But candidly, 2024 is shaping up to be a tougher year. I know Tim is going to run a winning campaign once again, but we’re all going to have to work even harder this time around to make sure we send him back to the Senate next November. That work starts now. So I want to personally ask you to please make an initial contribution to Tim Kaine’s re-election campaign. = Together, Senator Kaine and I have fought tirelessly to deliver lasting results for Virginia – from investing in infrastructure, to supporting our military, lowering drug costs, and expanding internet access, to name a few. But there’s plenty more to be done to strengthen our economy, protect our civil rights, and invest in a greener future. And there’s no one I’d rather be fighting alongside than Tim Kaine. Look, I’ve been friends with Tim for more than 40 years. He is an outstanding public servant, and it’s been an honor working alongside him to deliver for Virginia. But in order for us to continue making meaningful progress in the Senate, we need to fight back against Republicans and special interests who are going to pour money into winning this seat. With your help, I know we can send Tim Kaine back to the Senate to keep up the fight for Virginia. = Thank you, Mark = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf376247e-ca20-4ee7-9dfd-13fea5a47259/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281189:JnKKjhGNM:m:1:3331421248:34D7FD227B7536B498BF31FB0F74F4F5:r)
---
| | |
Peter,
As the new Chairman of the NRSC, I'm making it a point to ensure that grassroots conservatives like _YOU_ are front and center in our Party. _That 's why I've commissioned a survey for you to give your honest feedback, opinions, and input to ensure that our Party is putting you first._ **[Please take my NEW LEADERSHIP SURVEY to ensure that your voice is heard loud and clear by Republicans in the United States Senate.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281189:JnKKjhGNM:m:1:3331421248:34D7FD227B7536B498BF31FB0F74F4F5:r)
** **********.** ********** ******************** **************[TAKE THE SURVEY](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281189:JnKKjhGNM:m:1:3331421248:34D7FD227B7536B498BF31FB0F74F4F5:r)**************

************************************************************************************** The 2024 elections give Republicans the chance to make major gains in the U.S. Senate. But I'm humble enough to know that a victory will not just be handed to us... ...we're going to have to _fight for it._ ___________ But the way to win isn't to listen to a bunch of consultants out here in the Washington swamp. Rather, the path to victory is by turning to the voters themselves to ensure that we're fighting for YOUR interests. That's why it's essential that you complete your survey as quickly as possible. [**So please, take my NEW LEADERSHIP SURVEY to ensure that your voice is heard loud and clear by Republicans in the United States Senate.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281189:JnKKjhGNM:m:1:3331421248:34D7FD227B7536B498BF31FB0F74F4F5:r) ****************************************___________************************************************************************************ ******___************___************___************___************___************___************___************___************___**********__********_********************

Thank you,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281189:JnKKjhGNM:m:1:3331421248:34D7FD227B7536B498BF31FB0F74F4F5:r) . ******___**********__********_********************

body:

| |
---
| | Dear Peter,

I challenged the status quo and I ran against the far-left machine in Minnesota. As radical legislation is signed by Tim Walz in St. Paul, Keith Ellison and folks weaponizing the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice are once again trying to take my medical license from me. [Click here and watch the video where I explain everything.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=679b2a8db8&e=9828080a05) Any hearing they bring me to or conference they have, I will livestream for the public to [view on my YouTube channel](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=f688c0db9e&e=9828080a05). Any political witch hunt will be shared with you!

This isn't about politics. This is about punishment for standing up.[ I need your help to continue this fight](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=916b94d1f7&e=9828080a05), uplift candidates who'll continue the fight, and hold rallies to oppose such political overreach. [Will you help me with a contribution of $15, $25, $55 or more?](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=d1226ecd97&e=9828080a05) We will use these funds to promote candidates and causes as these far-left politicians attempt to destroy dissent!

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1eqjcor1c6aqdch27q2g11jo9l230vfjqbku06o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpim1o30slh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb0o1rh6g7iju7q6pdeg8an71nltneh61v4p1ni0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpim1o30slh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf56ackicv0caqq5gnij6tt7kkr9i4qu2s36otko_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpim1o30slh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z86hnr1047bbi6o72oj7sfsvhk6ttbgd34njqfn0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpim1o30slh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

House Republicans just established a committee to **STAND UP TO CHINA** - But we need to pile on the pressure!

It’s Black History Month, and now more than ever, I’m pushing to make my expanded Child Tax Credit permanent. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58173458/390276560/286686063?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGQwNWZmMy0xZmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOZM-4mBf_1YfQ8FaeNY4l3j-Yu0JgcfV9ETeDJQgAU=&emci=921a23db-78a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4dd05ff3-1fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) Folks — It’s Black History Month, and now more than ever, I’m pushing to make the expanded _Child Tax Credit_ permanent. When we first passed it as part of the _American Rescue Plan_ , the impact it made was immense. **Expanding the Child Tax Credit lifted nearly four million children out of poverty — and cut poverty for Black children by 54%.** In short: Permanently expanding the _Child Tax Credit_ is a critical, generation-defining investment in the futures of Black families. It is one of the most meaningful things we can do to begin to combat the racial income gap and structural inequity that have massively affected Black communities for generations. [**If you agree Congress should make the expanded Child Tax Credit permanent, show your support by adding your name to my petition today →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58173459/390276561/286686063?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGQwNWZmMy0xZmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOZM-4mBf_1YfQ8FaeNY4l3j-Yu0JgcfV9ETeDJQgAU=&emci=921a23db-78a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4dd05ff3-1fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540) | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58173460/390276562/1573765503?refcode=AU_MFB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZGQwNWZmMy0xZmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AOZM-4mBf_1YfQ8FaeNY4l3j-Yu0JgcfV9ETeDJQgAU=&emci=921a23db-78a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=4dd05ff3-1fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1295540)**

Erasing racial wealth gaps and uplifting the next generation of leaders is by far one of my biggest priorities in Congress — and I’m so grateful to have your support as I keep fighting for an economy that works for everyone.
Thank you,
Michael

I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**

And now it looks like history is repeating itself.

**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**

• More than 2 million lost jobs

• Stocks plummeting over 20%

• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling

**We can't stop the recession from happening,**but you can prepare for it.****

name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06jcp86ev3hvms078n8b990emabessuapsk98v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm8pr4c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z63rllkov7v1c7cs8u6rtuvcm991q5d8m5l9tso8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm8pr4c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8n2lgo73nvmuuljladjene2ud1c4okiusbiteg8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm8pr4c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhogb4vnn4q8rkko2mreaaiijqo9d2upfr5q0968_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm8pr4c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: Charles Booker
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
2022 was an incredible year for Democrats, Peter.

We held the Senate, minimized losses in the House, and made inroads in
places we didn’t expect. In Kentucky, we over performed 2020 margins in
over half of all counties.

And through the highs and lows, we built a movement together. We engaged
young people and shared hope for progress with millions. We built lasting
infrastructure for the progressive movement and created new voters engaged
in the Democratic process.

Despite our loss on Election Day, we can be proud of what we accomplished
together. And I am excited to see what’s next for this team.

But right now, I have to ask again for your help. In order to close out
the campaign and move on to the next chapter of our work together, we have
some campaign debt to take care of. [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18878?t=1001&akid=2946%2E346206%2EAMNdpi ]If you’re able, could you make a
contribution today to help us?

Our campaign was uncompromising. When we were making spending decisions in
the final days, that meant we prioritized communicating with as many
Kentucky voters as possible. We ran a bold campaign and we made bold
decisions. And unfortunately for us, that means we have a bit of a hole in
our budget and hope you can help us.

Thank you for anything you can do. I’m looking forward to what’s next.

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230202-2946-footer&t=1002&refcode2=2946_346206_AMNdpi&akid=2946%2E346206%2EAMNdpi

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2946%2E346206%2EAMNdpi

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: EXCLUSIVE: Harmeet Dhillon Promotes Unity, Responds to IL GOP Chair Don Tracy
body:
IL GOP Chair Don Tracy, during a Monday segment on radio, falsely accused Harmeet Dhillon of running a negative campaign against Romney-McDaniel.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/89ba16e6dd8d/exclusive-harmeet-dhillon-promotes-unity-responds-to-il-gop-chair-don-tracy?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

EXCLUSIVE: IL GOP Chair Don Tracy Goes on Radio, Talks Party Unity then Slams Harmeet Dhillon, and Dhillon Responds (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/exclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/exclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Illinois Republican Party chairman Don Tracy, during a Monday segment with Bishop on Air (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ugJ1N1pCgiw&t=283s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , falsely accused Harmeet Dhillon (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/richard-uihlein-backs-harmeet-dhillon-for-rnc-chair-says-gop-needs-new-leader-to-fight-radical-left.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) of running a negative campaign against Ronna Romney-McDaniel for RNC chair, saying,

“But now I hope we can unify, the other thing about Ronna is she ran a very uh, non-negative campaign, where Harmeet’s campaign was pretty negative, and I think kind of violated the 11th Commandment at times...’thou shalt not speak ill against thy fellow Republican.’ And Ronna chose not to go negative...and she’d be in a better position to unify the party if she didn’t go negative, and she didn’t.”

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ugJ1N1pCgiw&t=283s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

IL GOP chair Don Tracy on Bishop on Air on WMAY radio on Jan. 21, 2023.

============================================================

But Tracy, who is talking about the importance of party unity, goes live on air, and attacks Dhillon – breaking the very commandment he just recited.

During Dhillon’s campaign for RNC chair, she was targeted by many RNC members and supporters of Romney-McDaniel, some even threatened her.

In one tweet, Dhillon said,

“Threats incoming today. One of Ronna’s state chair supporters responded to my message about Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.’s legacy by threatening me with consequences if I didn’t make the ‘annoying’ text messages from voters stop (no one on my team has asked anyone to text members)”
** (https://twitter.com/pnjaban/status/1615140889680281601?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1615140889680281601%7Ctwgr%5E9e172e0714d261d07a1d224b7291eec04b2bc00c%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F02%2Fexclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In another tweet, Dhillon writes,

“Another person on my team got a threatening call from a $$$ RNC consultant for raising questions about RNC’s highest-paid vendors. Message delivered was that my supporter would never work on a certain presidential campaign or for RNC if they didn’t shut up.”
** (https://twitter.com/pnjaban/status/1615140889680281601?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1615140891693551616%7Ctwgr%5E9e172e0714d261d07a1d224b7291eec04b2bc00c%7Ctwcon%5Es2_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F02%2Fexclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

And in another tweet, Dhillon writes,

“To be very clear, no amount of threats to me or my team, or bigoted attacks on my faith traceable directly to associates of the chair, will deter me from advancing positive change at the RNC, which includes new standards of accountability, transparency, integrity, and decency.”
** (https://twitter.com/pnjaban/status/1615140893614542849?ref_src=twsrc%5Etfw%7Ctwcamp%5Etweetembed%7Ctwterm%5E1615140893614542849%7Ctwgr%5E9e172e0714d261d07a1d224b7291eec04b2bc00c%7Ctwcon%5Es1_&ref_url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.illinoisreview.com%2Fillinoisreview%2F2023%2F02%2Fexclusive-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-goes-on-radio-talks-party-unity-then-slams-harmeet-dhillon-and-dhillon-responds.html&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

During last Saturday’s weekly ** Chairman’s Memo (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-chair-don-tracy-votes-for-rnc-chair-ronna-romney-says-shes-done-an-excellent-job-despite-losses-in-2018-2020-and-2022.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
, Tracy explained why he voted for Romney-McDaniel, writing,

“I call Ronna an infrastructure leader because that is what the RNC is, a political infrastructure support system. By next week, I will have served as Illinois State Chairman for two years. During that time, I have had an inside view of the great work Ronna has done on national Republican infrastructure and how much it has improved under her watch.”

Tracy then concluded,

“The bottom line is that Ronna McDaniel has done an excellent job in every element of what an RNC Chairman is supposed to do in an environment that has been uniquely challenging. She’s a proven grass-roots leader with a solid plan for the next two years.”

In an exclusive interview with Illinois Review, Dhillon had a direct message for Tracy.

“To Mr. Tracy, I would say this: If the rest of the party is seeking unity, he should do the same.”

Dhillon then went on to address Tracy’s accusations, saying,

“I don’t want to rehash the election, but as a general matter, when you run against an incumbent, you point out their record. That is what we did, and we tried our best to be fair and accurate. I ran an insurgent campaign against the entire edifice of the RNC. It was a David versus Goliath battle. To say that one side or the other was running a negative campaign is false and necessarily is stirring the pot. I’ve been asked to join in the calls for unity within the party, and I am doing just that.”

Alongside Tracy,
** Illinois (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/source-national-committeeman-richard-porter-seeking-to-amend-il-gop-bylaws-to-permit-third-term.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
national committeemen ** Richard Porter (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/how-censuring-anti-grassroots-rino-state-party-officials-can-help-the-rnc-start-winning-again.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
and Demtra DeMonte also voted for Romney-McDaniel.

Romney-McDaniel was
** re-elected (https://www.newsmax.com/newsfront/election-2024-rnc-chair/2023/01/27/id/1106236/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
to an unprecedented fourth term as RNC chair, defeating Dhillon in a secret ballot vote 111-51.
To learn more about Illinois Review, visit ** www.illinoisreview.com (https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=79c8d4783f-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_02_05_15&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-79c8d4783f-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

name: Action Alert (via Left Action)
subject: Sign the petition: Search ALL Trump's houses and offices for classified materials!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Sign the petition: Search ALL Trump's houses and offices for classified materials >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T349db6e8-a43a-434e-890f-c93609e5efb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
