---
| | | Donald Trump took hundreds of classified documents, hid them at Mar-a-Lago, lied about it for over a year, and defied a subpoena to give them back. **Why haven't we searched his other houses and offices for more materials? National security demands it. And his actions already clearly show there is cause for such searches.** We've done this with President Biden, so **why is Trump getting a free pass?** [**Add your name, and demand that ALL Trump's houses and offices be searched for classified materials.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d85acbd-4759-40eb-884c-c2ee269fb1ac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: American Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1587%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=69uIbEasLdaAL5l04cXziA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658619%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=oLqG63LvwN842DxdbjWsnA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658610%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5RKpU6CagyBSYRNYDALW4A&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658611%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HeH6ZfekXyrJNTVOjwNCxQ&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658612%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rndfraVUErzSLgYKoSTu6w&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |

clean_body: His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics | | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That’s why we produced “” which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

# From the Desk of Chairman Chris Ager
---
| | Dear Friends, I am humbled to have been entrusted by New Hampshire Republicans with the responsibility of Chairman of the State Party. I am proud to say we have immediately begun preparations for 2024. Our goals are simple - defeat the Democrats and their socialist agenda; and preserve the New Hampshire way of low taxes, small government, and individual responsibility. We have two years to retake two congressional seats, maintain control of the State House and the Governor’s Office, and retake the White House. It’s a tall task, but it is one that I believe we can achieve. Our preparations include the creation of six new committees to bolster the party and its efforts. Additionally, the New Hampshire Republican Party is implementing new voter outreach programs to expand the base of the Republican Party. We also plan to increase the number of staff to support these voter outreach efforts. [To ensure the success of these efforts, we need all hands on deck and the resources to get the job done. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in today. Your contribution will go directly toward defeating the Democrats and their socialist agenda.](https://shoutout.wix.com/so/b9OOEEboD/c?w=x8g8HkwI4VNwSm4EdOEuQbODTP1DPcZ7sMkhIu4zbCs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9uZXctaGFtcHNoaXJlLWdvcC8yMDIzLWRvbm9yIiwiciI6ImRjMTJkNjk5LWFiMTItNDBhYy1iOGUzLTI0MGMzYTcxN2JjNSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6ImI2YzMxN2UzLTcxYTQtNDljMi1hNDE1LTQwN2QyMDdlNmViMSJ9)

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and need your help, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
I’m up for re-election in 2024, friend, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(__There's already a Republican vying for the GOP nomination.)_
NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio – and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.
**[Frankly, it’s going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and American Bridge PAC as we begin the new year?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58154378/390219432/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2227-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyYTg1Mzk2LTAyYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=66D3uVCxca06-LDpehIgXNhjbC9EhnKgq-82quPuLJg=)**
I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.
I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.
Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.
That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, friend. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.
[**I need you in this fight, too friend. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in $15 – or whatever amount makes the most sense for you – to my campaign and American Bridge PAC.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58154380/390219444/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2227-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyYTg1Mzk2LTAyYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=66D3uVCxca06-LDpehIgXNhjbC9EhnKgq-82quPuLJg=)
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58154382/390219453/-1708609261?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2227-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImUyYTg1Mzk2LTAyYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=66D3uVCxca06-LDpehIgXNhjbC9EhnKgq-82quPuLJg=)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: your name was at the top of my list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, President Biden's State of the Union Address is just around the corner, and our newly expanded Democratic majority in the Senate is finalizing our priorities for the first 100 days of this Congress.
This is a critical moment for our party, our country and, most importantly, for American families like yours. **That's why I'm personally reaching out to my top supporters to hear what issues matter most to their families — and, friend, your name was at the top of my list.[Please, will you join my Digital Focus Group before it closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight? Your input is incredibly valuable to me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58177524/390290123/-819719931?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3909-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmE5MzM4Mi0yY2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VaV-n-7lSGKTmy902SH-cuPnDW7a3s5W0U0xVe-KNtw=&emci=a80c8214-99a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=56a93382-2ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**
| | [Begin Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58177525/390290124/-819719931?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk3909-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmE5MzM4Mi0yY2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VaV-n-7lSGKTmy902SH-cuPnDW7a3s5W0U0xVe-KNtw=&emci=a80c8214-99a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=56a93382-2ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)
---
I'm so proud of the victories that this team achieved in the last Congress. We passed my legislation to support our veterans, stop dangerous gun trafficking and empower assault survivors to seek justice. These are issues I've worked on for years — _decades, actually_ — and, finally, our Democratic Senate majority got it done.
It's been deeply gratifying to celebrate these wins, but there is still so much work ahead of us: restoring reproductive rights, lowering the cost of health care, protecting programs like Social Security and much more. It's clear that we can only move the needle on critical issues like these with a united Democratic majority in the Senate.
**That's why I need to hear from you now, friend. Experts are already saying the GOP has a clear path to flip the Senate next year, and, in the meantime, Republicans are racing to destroy our progressive agenda. The fact of the matter is that we don't have time to waste to pass vital legislation in 2023. **
**These first 100 days will set the tone for the next two years. [So please, will you accept my invitation to join my focus group before midnight tonight? clean_body: | | | Friend, President Biden's State of the Union Address is just around the corner, and our newly expanded Democratic majority in the Senate is finalizing our priorities for the first 100 days of this Congress. This is a critical moment for our party, our country and, most importantly, for American families like yours. That's why I'm personally reaching out to my top supporters to hear what issues matter most to their families — and, friend, your name was at the top of my list. | | I'm so proud of the victories that this team achieved in the last Congress. We passed my legislation to support our veterans, stop dangerous gun trafficking and empower assault survivors to seek justice. These are issues I've worked on for years — decades, actually — and, finally, our Democratic Senate majority got it done. It's been deeply gratifying to celebrate these wins, but there is still so much work ahead of us: restoring reproductive rights, lowering the cost of health care, protecting programs like Social Security and much more. It's clear that we can only move the needle on critical issues like these with a united Democratic majority in the Senate. That's why I need to hear from you now, friend. Experts are already saying the GOP has a clear path to flip the Senate next year, and, in the meantime, Republicans are racing to destroy our progressive agenda. The fact of the matter is that we don't have time to waste to pass vital legislation in 2023. These first 100 days will set the tone for the next two years. Thank you so much. I'm looking forward to reading through your responses tomorrow morning. — Kirsten | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . body:
I’ve been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I’ve concluded that it all b

| |
---
| | | Friend,

I've been doing a lot of thinking about what the new Republican majority means for America, and I've concluded that it all boils down to three words: Speaker Kevin McCarthy. As a former Speaker myself, I know how tough the job can be. That's why I chose to support Kevin from the get-go - he's a natural-born leader who's prepared to fight day in and day out for the American people.

---
| | [SUPPORT KEVIN MCCARTHY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2in4j9dtllmaorgkglb97og5md9fiqbqdc270r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphmcp70c9h2bs)
---

Kevin's first couple of weeks in office have confirmed what I, and millions of other Americans, have long suspected: **he 's THE politician America _desperately_ needs at this pivotal moment in history.** He's already fired 3 corrupt Dems from their committee assignments, rescinded the funding for Biden's army of 87,000 IRS agents, formed a committee to tackle the Chinese Communist threat, moved to protect our country's strategic petroleum reserve, launched an investigation into the Weaponization of the Federal Government, and take several significant actions to protect innocent life from radical abortionists.

Kevin is a man of results, not empty promises. I'm proud to call him my Speaker. If you agree with me and the job that he's doing, I'd ask you to give him your official approval **[here.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0gthihbhnilc8g7dlig6bcuan6lmi40ivikshu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphmcp70c9h2bs "here.")** Fighting the Democrats is a tough job; he needs to know that the American people are behind him _every_ step of the way.

---
| | [GIVE KEVIN YOUR OFFICIAL APPROVAL](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhjfdnla13m9gc6mq8ed8fgopu2ghdjrbau7o568_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphmcp70c9h2bs)
---
| | [STAND WITH SPEAKER MCCARTHY](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2j6gf643als3gqfllr80s2cjb3d1v05o01m2tm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphmcp70c9h2bs)
---

Thank you for your time,

Newt Gingrich

We're ready to go to every corner of the state and show voters we’re on their side – but to fight for you, we want to know what your top priorities are.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58177984/390292260/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWJjOWJmYy0yZmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KyTVhMNBWrUin3N-O9hO6jsIbCh-7akbFFMmReKYi-Q=) | Team,

So far this year, extreme Ohio Republicans have made attacking voting rights and helping their special interest buddies their top priority.

For too long, Ohio Republicans have helped the wealthy and well-connected get ahead while leaving working Ohioans behind. **Ohio Democrats are ready to go to every corner of the state and show voters we’re on their side – but to fight for you, we want to know what your top priorities are.**

name: Great America Update
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7667%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=nDQpWK%2bt6kl%2b7%2fqtYAGMCg&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78730%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=20IZeOQH5AuIKo6DsltpsA&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78731%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c6Fe3Q6sDjuH1xROURZbTQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78732%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eDBsNcMY6n2DH00BLFMofA&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78733%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UFG7916fnOS%2blItk8At%2bUg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7667%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=nDQpWK%2bt6kl%2b7%2fqtYAGMCg&sysid=1)_

name: Tom Fitton
subject: What is Joe Biden trying to hide?
body:
Judicial Watch is expanding its investigations and lawsuits into serious allegations of corruption and possibly criminal activity by members of the Biden family, including President Joe Biden.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**_Judicial Watch is expanding its investigations and lawsuits into serious allegations of corruption and possibly criminal activity by members of the Biden family, including President Joe Biden._**
Because like you, we want to know...
...What is Joe Biden trying to hide?
To get to the bottom of this scandal, Judicial Watch has already launched Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests related to the classified documents located at Joe Biden's former Washington office and his two homes in Delaware.
At the same time, we continue to fight in court for the release of Joe Biden's 36-years of U.S. Senate records stored at the stonewalling University of Delaware!
I believe that Joe Biden's apparent disregard of laws related to the unlawful possession of classified documents deserves full investigation... _and that applies to all politicians in both parties who improperly retain classified documents after their time in public office is over._
[That’s why I hope you will support us with a tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

_In response to our investigations,_ the U.S. Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position about whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden's gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware.

The Secret Service's changing story on records raises additional serious questions about its role in the Hunter Biden gun incident, as well as raising the possibility that the Secret Service may be as politically-driven and contemptuous of the American people's "right to know" as the Biden Justice Department and the FBI!

One thing is clear...Judicial Watch's persistence in fighting for accountability means that our work investigating all these Biden-related scandals is more urgently needed now than ever...

... _because the American people deserve to know if their president is potentially implicated in criminal activity_.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

Sadly, if Judicial Watch doesn't dig in to get to the facts, it is clear as day that no one in the Biden administration or the liberal media will...

_... and we have proven, time and again, that our lawsuits can force the release of records and documents that even Congress is unable to access_.

I strongly believe that Judicial Watch should continue to stand up for the American people's right to know, and _use every legal tool at our disposal_ to break through the efforts of the federal bureaucracy to shield the Bidens from accountability... [which is why I hope you will make your best contribution to Judicial Watch today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

We fight public corruption and government secrecy here in Washington, DC and all over America...

... _and we are committed to calling government officials to account when they act as if they are "above the law_.'

At Judicial Watch, we work hard every day through the legal system. We are tenacious, and we dig in for the long haul, as we have in forcing the release of information about troubling matters related to the Biden family _and_ about government efforts to cover this information up.

To do that, [we rely on you and the generosity of concerned citizens like you.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62015&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz)
---

I hope you will join with us today and help us perform this essential work of educating the public about whether their highest election officials are living up to the same standards of honest behavior and ethical conduct to which citizens like us are held.

Thank you!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

clean_body: Judicial Watch is expanding its investigations and lawsuits into serious allegations of corruption and possibly criminal activity by members of the Biden family, including President Joe Biden. | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Judicial Watch is expanding its investigations and lawsuits into serious allegations of corruption and possibly criminal activity by members of the Biden family, including President Joe Biden. Because like you, we want to know... ...What is Joe Biden trying to hide? To get to the bottom of this scandal, Judicial Watch has already launched Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests related to the classified documents located at Joe Biden's former Washington office and his two homes in Delaware. At the same time, we continue to fight in court for the release of Joe Biden's 36-years of U.S. Senate records stored at the stonewalling University of Delaware! I believe that Joe Biden's apparent disregard of laws related to the unlawful possession of classified documents deserves full investigation... and that applies to all politicians in both parties who improperly retain classified documents after their time in public office is over. | In response to our investigations, the U.S. Secret Service has repeatedly changed its position about whether it is in possession of records related to the investigation of Hunter Biden's gun, reportedly disposed of in a dumpster in Delaware. The Secret Service's changing story on records raises additional serious questions about its role in the Hunter Biden gun incident, as well as raising the possibility that the Secret Service may be as politically-driven and contemptuous of the American people's "right to know" as the Biden Justice Department and the FBI! One thing is clear...Judicial Watch's persistence in fighting for accountability means that our work investigating all these Biden-related scandals is more urgently needed now than ever... ... because the American people deserve to know if their president is potentially implicated in criminal activity. Sadly, if Judicial Watch doesn't dig in to get to the facts, it is clear as day that no one in the Biden administration or the liberal media will... ... and we have proven, time and again, that our lawsuits can force the release of records and documents that even Congress is unable to access. I strongly believe that Judicial Watch should continue to stand up for the American people's right to know, and use every legal tool at our disposal to break through the efforts of the federal bureaucracy to shield the Bidens from accountability... We fight public corruption and government secrecy here in Washington, DC and all over America... ... and we are committed to calling government officials to account when they act as if they are "above the law.' At Judicial Watch, we work hard every day through the legal system. We are tenacious, and we dig in for the long haul, as we have in forcing the release of information about troubling matters related to the Biden family and about government efforts to cover this information up. To do that, I hope you will join with us today and help us perform this essential work of educating the public about whether their highest election officials are living up to the same standards of honest behavior and ethical conduct to which citizens like us are held. Thank you! Sincerely, Tom Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2023, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. body:
Help us stop them now

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58162768/390237304/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDM3NDJmZi0wOWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KC9IxeUUTwt7OBsFjn9R2QzzouUX3D_AsasSP3bQHEw=&emci=86083029-81a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=7d3742ff-09a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | The GOP just launched their next attack on abortion rights.

They’ve already criminalized seeking or providing life-saving reproductive health care in states across the country. But the GOP isn’t stopping there: _**now they’re working to ban traveling to other states to receive life-saving abortions.**_

Let’s make one thing clear: this is dangerous and extreme, and we will NEVER stand by and watch as rights are ripped away from women across the country.

[**_Will you help us take on anti-abortion extremists in Georgia and across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58162769/390237305/710125701?refcode=20230202.1_SAR_2B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDM3NDJmZi0wOWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KC9IxeUUTwt7OBsFjn9R2QzzouUX3D_AsasSP3bQHEw=)_

Abortion rights in Georgia and across the country are at stake if Republicans retake the White House in 2024, so we have to do everything we can to make sure that won’t happen.

[**_Please, pitch in right now to help us keep Georgia a blue wall and stop Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58162770/390237306/710125701?refcode=20230202.1_SAR_2B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDM3NDJmZi0wOWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KC9IxeUUTwt7OBsFjn9R2QzzouUX3D_AsasSP3bQHEw=)_

Thank you,

GA Dems

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: She said it and means it: "Impeach Joe Biden" These words are the obsession of clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know, she'll work that part out later.
body:
MTG would do it, too
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tae4d9c69-7c7d-4409-9c82-bc9433881ac8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_She said it. She means it: "Impeach Joe Biden"_** _These words are the obsession of clownish security threat and holder of Kevin McCarthy's leash, Marjorie Taylor Greene. Why? She doesn't know, she'll work that part out later. _ **_The President has presided over a term that must be mentioned in the same breath as FDR's. We just learned we had 2.9% economic growth the last quarter of 2022, unemployment is at a 50 year low, and in some states such as Wisconsin, Georgia, Arizona, Montana, West Virginia and more, it is the lowest it has EVER been. Biden has lowered the Trump Deficit by $1.8 Trillion--yep, that's with a T._** But the corporate media won't tell you this, except in passing before the move onto Hunter Biden's laptop, because they're scared of the right-wing owners of their outlets, feel the need to *both sides* everything or are just looking for clicks on their story, no matter the cost to our democracy. So We must share the truth about what Joe Biden has done. _**For example, he got Republicans to support bipartisan measures, passing a huge, job-creating infrastructure bill and the first gun-safety bill in a generation. ****But, he also wasn't scared to push ahead by himself when Republicans acted in bad faith. The historic Inflation Reduction Act, CHIPS legislation, bringing high-paying manufacturing jobs back home, helping students in debt to predatory lenders, funding historically Black universities, reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act and much more.**_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9e2d3951-36eb-4cb3-a48e-39eaba57e814/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**When the midterm approached, The President--in an important rhetorical move--called out MAGA "semi-fascists."** The result? **Per historian Michael Beschloss, President Biden had the strongest midterm congressional showing of any President in 88 years. **Yet, again, you'd think Republicans would be happy with a stronger more prosperous America. But you'd be wrong. This was the response from the real leader of the GOP House Caucus, who takes Kevin McCarthy for his dog walk eveyr while telling him "good boy," and making her demands:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba533ede-28de-47d9-8671-6105b62fd701/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

---
| _The authoritarian Republican Party will do whatever it takes to destroy Joe Biden--sabotage our economy, do the bidding of foreign dictators, even attack our Capitol, as we saw two years ago January 6th. As President Biden approaches his State of the Union address and announcing his presidential reelection campaign, please j_ _oin us in backing President Joe Biden and ensuring Marjorie Taylor Greene's party isn't rewarded for betraying our country---_ [_**Please join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to fight for Joe Biden's presidency. **_**_There will be never be a more important race in our lifetimes than this one._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d7a0d68-e520-4bea-81a9-6315f2711945/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Cliff

| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0a06d26-e713-4441-8efb-94d1d74b97ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
Time is running out, Fellow Conservative
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zupkt9k6nsla726doiqepur6hrk4q5tkraf6926o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm1o70sth2bs) Dear Fellow Conservative, I hope this email finds you well. I'm writing to you today because we are facing a critical moment in the fight to secure the Republican Majority. **[Marco Rubio is working tirelessly to secure our party's success,](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmbik4turvp6mjabb2qt909ht3qr0juckfm194ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm1o70sth2bs)** but he can't do it alone. He needs your help. You may have noticed that [the Democrats have been beating us in recent elections,](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7ofjf10cvshbq24mt58darbd7s2q5u9hpnom2lo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cphm1o70sth2bs) and a big part of their success has been due to their strong grassroots support. They have donors who are willing to chip in early and often to support battleground races, and if we want to win we need to do the same thing (but better). I know that times are tough and everyone has their own financial responsibilities, but I'm asking you to please consider chipping in any amount that you can to support Senator Marco Rubio and help Elect Republicans. Every little bit helps, and we can't afford to wait until we've been outraised by millions of dollars or out-knocked millions of doors. We need to start winning NOW. |

name: Gwen S. Moore
subject: Celebrating Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

Here at the start of Black History Month, I continue to be truly inspired by the thousands of young Black voters I meet across Wisconsin. They are the countless youth who are the future of our great state.

And now, there is an extremist agenda pushing to rewrite the collective story of our shared history in classrooms and in AP courses across the country. Their attempt is to minimize and degrade the Black American experience – pushing an un-whole narrative, all in the effort to satiate a base full of false outrage.

Facing that ugly reality, now, more than ever, it is important to remember and celebrate the shared contribution to our national discourse and how that experience has contributed to and enhanced our nation. Let that ring true not only this month but every day of every year.

In thinking about those scores of young people, our next generation of leaders, I think about the world we will leave them and the generations that come after. I find promise in their voice and hope in their determination and I’m humbled that we’re all on this road together...walking toward a better tomorrow, all the while, carrying the stories of ancestors with us.

Together, #WeRepresent!

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District
Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
100% Democracy Defender

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Willie=20Montague?=
subject: February is Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fredrick Douglass PAC
body:
| | | | | [](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=d400221f8d&e=fdefed58de)
---
Hello Peter,
February is here and it offers yet another chance to pander to a special interest group. In case you haven’t heard, February is Black History Month.My name is Willie Montague and I’m writing to you today about the Frederick Douglass PAC. The aim of the PAC is to not only increase engagement of Black people in the Conservative movement but also to help some of the most viable Black candidates in this nation win their races.**WHAT WOULD FREDERICK DOUGLASS SAY ABOUT TODAY’S BLACK HISTORY MONTH AND IDENTITY POLITICS?** I believe if Douglass were alive today, he would be disappointed that Black Americans had a “month” to celebrate their history. Frederick Douglass would not believe in “identity politics” and supported the unifying respect for the U.S. Constitution, personal responsibility and every Americans’ right to pursue independent economic prosperity. All of those beliefs are at odds with the messaging that today’s Black Americans receive from Democrats.
| [CLICK HERE TO SUPPORT THE FREDRICK DOUGLASS PAC’S BLACK OUTREACH PROGRAMS!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=09d29b87da&e=fdefed58de)
---
Today, Black people are told that they are separate and different from White Americans in numerous negative ways. They are told that they are not capable of advancing on their own merits and only LEFTIST DEMOCRATS can protect their best interests.However, I’m here to remind you that the original civil rights activists were promoting a message to Black people that the principles of human equality and self-determination are God-given and unalienable. It was a message that was well received in the Black community but since the 60’s and 70’s, Democrats have sought to unravel that and enslave Black people once again into their service.**BLACK PEOPLE ARE MORE CONSERVATIVE THAN THEY REALIZE! WE JUST NEED THE PROPER OUTREACH TO MAKE SURE THEY VOTE THAT WAY!**
| [INVEST IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=146d91ded8&e=fdefed58de)
---
That’s why we must unify the Republican party and bring in and engage Black people in the Conservative movement. By getting Conservative Black candidates elected and engaging Black voters, we will guarantee majorities in future elections and won’t have to worry about getting the wall built on the Southern Border or protecting the sanctity of life.The Frederick Douglass PAC hopes to educate, empower and equip candidates with the tools they need to win their races, and part of that strategy is connecting with Black voters who many times don't vote or simply vote Democrat due to having done so their whole lives.
**WE WILL NEED YOUR HELP IF WE WANT TO ENGAGE WITH PATRIOTIC BLACK CONSERVATIVES**
Up until now, Republicans have not done much to bring Black people under the GOP tent and we have got to change that if we are going to make a difference. Will you send in financial support to the Frederick Douglass PAC today? **With your support, we can organize outreach programs that will help guarantee Republican majorities in the future!**
| [INVEST $25 IN BLACK GOP OUTREACH!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=997807279a&e=fdefed58de)

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: The importance of this day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [https://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. believed in a brighter future for our nation, and today we honor his legacy. While time has passed since the tragic death of Dr. King, the lessons he preached continue to resonate throughout our nation to this day. He fought for peace. He fought for justice. He fought for a world where people were not judged by the color of their skin, but for the content of their character.
http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/ [http://www.wileynickelforcongress.com/]
Dr. King once said, “Give us the ballot, and we will no longer have to worry the federal government about our basic rights.” He knew that voting was a critical part of racial justice, and it is a fight we are still battling to this day. Communities of color across the nation are still having their vote suppressed, whether it be through gerrymandering, restrictive voting regulations, or unclear information about how to participate in our democracy.
Today, on MLK Day, I double down on my commitment to voting rights. In the North Carolina General Assembly, I fought against unfairly drawn district maps. In Congress, I will support nationwide voting reforms to make it easier to vote and give every eligible American the opportunity to have their voice heard.
I encourage you to look back on the inspirational work of Dr. King today and reflect on what we can do throughout our communities to continue strengthening his legacy.
Be well,
Wiley Nickel
Follow Wiley Online:
https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC [https://www.facebook.com/WileyNickelNC] http://twitter.com/wileynickel [http://twitter.com/wileynickel] http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc [http://www.instagram.com/wileynickelnc]
Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
Wiley Nickel for Congress
PO Box 563
Raleigh, NC 27602
United States

name: Rick Scott
subject: Mitch McConnell booted me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
| | Mitch McConnell just removed me from a Senate Committee for challenging him for Republican Leader. This is what happens when you challenge leadership in Washington. It’s the kind of vintage Washington insider move you find here in the swamp. But that won’t stop me from pushing Senate Republican leaders to act like Republicans. I stand by my decision to challenge Mitch McConnell for Minority Leader, and I’ll continue to fight Washington insiders who make Washington work for _them_ instead of _you_. Maybe they’ll take away my parking spot, next? name: Team Slotkin
subject: Team Slotkin’s motto
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Team,

The main motto on Team Slotkin? Always be prepared.

It’s a sentiment that was instilled in Elissa when she worked in the national security world, serving three tours in Iraq alongside our military. And, it’s something she’s taken with her to Congress.

It’s also pretty important in campaigns. Whether it’s having staff trained and ready to go, maintaining relationships with volunteer networks, or raising the resources we will need down the road – being prepared allows us to overcome all of the surprises that will inevitably come our way. From campaigning during a global pandemic to running in some entirely new counties following redistricting, Team Slotkin has been able to be so successful because the early work we put in allows us to quickly adapt and formulate a plan for every scenario.

But, it goes further than that. Like we saw in Elissa’s last campaign (the most expensive House race in the country), Republican outside groups are looking to invest in seats they believe they can flip. And showing that we’re prepared for anything might just convince them that getting involved isn’t worth their time or money.

Elissa’s never ran in an easy race — which is why being prepared is so important. Chip in below to help us show just how strong Team Slotkin is.

CONTRIBUTE: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ebs-em-feb23?refcode=em230202-1-pt

Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents mid-Michigan in Congress. She was re-elected in 2022 by a 5-point margin, in the state's most competitive Congressional district.

We have some tough battles ahead of us – we’re facing _eight_ must-win special elections this month, so it’s critical that we hit the ground running. name: Jane Fonda

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

We couldn’t do this work without you, and I’m so grateful for every dollar you invest in our program.

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I wanted to reach out and say **thank you** for your continued support. ❤️

As I mentioned the other day, I launched this PAC because I know that the fight to end fossil fuels and reverse the damage they have caused is the most important work I will do in my life.

While every passing month brings concerning reminders about the urgency of our mission, **the hope I feel when I see the overwhelming support from our grassroots supporters like you inspires me to keep up the fight.**

The Jane Fonda Climate PAC is committed to leading the fight against climate change and holding the fossil fuel industry accountable for exploiting our home. **Put simply though, we couldn’t do this work without you, and I’m so grateful for every dollar you invest in our program.**

We have so much at stake and cannot let up in this crucial moment. I’m so glad to have you on our side as we continue our work to elect climate champions at every level of government.

Let’s fight to protect our planet together,

Jane Fonda

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: My pick for the U.S. Senate if Dianne Feinstein retires
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ][IMG]

Derek —

I wanted you to hear it from me first – if Dianne Feinstein decides not to
seek reelection as California’s U.S. Senator, I’m all in for Adam Schiff.
And I’ll be endorsing him for U.S. Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]That’s why I’m asking you to join me in being a Founding Member of Team
Schiff, and chip in $10 to his campaign right now.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=feb2023_abs_em.INbG7N&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=feb2023_abs_em.wHRdOK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=feb2023_abs_em.jtsgBy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=feb2023_abs_em.IruUoY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=feb2023_abs_em.T4MeeN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em.Rua6IW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Before I go on about Adam, I want to take a few moments to recognize and
tell you about the great leadership of California’s iconic Senator Dianne
Feinstein. For years, California has had a champion for Democracy in
Senator Feinstein. She has fought against the far-right and for working
families.

Since her election to the Senate in 1992, Senator Feinstein has achieved a
remarkable legislative record, always delivering for California and
forcefully honoring her oath to protect and defend. Notable among her
achievements is the enactment of the Assault Weapons Ban in 1994, the
first of many personal and national security measures in her long career.
As Chair of the Intelligence Committee, Senator Feinstein has been a
leader in strengthening our national security.

As a top Democrat on the Judiciary Committee, she secured the passage of
the Violence Against Women Act and the Respect For Marriage Act, and
promoted justice and safety in our communities. She is now again taking
the lead on banning assault weapons. Senator Feinstein’s record continues
to be one of the finest in the United States Senate.

America is at a crossroads. We can continue to lift our communities,
strengthen our economy and defend our Democracy — or let Republicans roll
back our progress, threaten our freedoms and give tax breaks to the
wealthy special interests. In 2024, the fight for America’s future is on
the ballot.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]If Senator Feinstein decides not to run, I will be supporting Adam
Schiff, who knows well the nexus between a strong Democracy and a strong
economy. And I ask that you join me.

In his service in the House, Adam has focused on strengthening our
Democracy with justice and on building an economy that works for all.

Ever since I supported Adam in his race for Congress in 2000, I have known
his commitment to putting the American Dream in place for everyone. Adam
has dedicated his life to public service. Every time I have asked Adam to
take on the tough fight against extremist forces, he has responded with
integrity, strength and success.

In the Senate, Adam Schiff would be effective from the start in putting
People Over Politics and advancing an economy that works safely and for
everyone.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]That’s why I’m asking you to join me today in supporting Adam Schiff,
and being a Founding Member of his campaign. Can you chip in $10, or
whatever you find meaningful, to his campaign right now:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=feb2023_abs_em.INbG7N&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=feb2023_abs_em.wHRdOK&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1015&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=feb2023_abs_em.jtsgBy&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1016&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=feb2023_abs_em.IruUoY&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1017&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=feb2023_abs_em.T4MeeN&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1018&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2023_abs_em.Rua6IW&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1019&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you for all you do.

Nancy Pelosi
Speaker Emerita

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1032?c0=feb2023_abs_em.KAIBHh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20230202_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1020&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]DONATE MONTHLY

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1750%2E5257348%2EID2nKl ]Privacy Policy

Peter, I wanted to make sure you all saw this news because it may have flown under the radar. **About two weeks ago, a Planned Parenthood clinic in Peoria, Illinois, was nearly burned to the ground in a despicable act of vandalism.**

---
| [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yKWm79obRFQd4WJbmf5kJ9cK6g73Pr3q_oTwVK7FU9WaLZRDPtIajYQj27z5qFJHsM9pZ4abe4Kb-_cjKvP3kEayz_WCtI3fjGQ7ZBTEJ9PfhBGFH4-Sp3PqfRFKyUbpDlsCgqGdIBa03u_V8p8Lc1ylq4vLJn7oWeGJLOXsjpR_uGckyIsNE4PNIGwymXiWwLlmwJnzonFpudKbOlLqES_FcA3CC2FzK2b_OV3KJP82UdTsaS61bnNfikuIXflygdY8Qu4-IAMcPieukwfgkWhk2nPlv-g33HJh8vMR_pFPO0gjvG5LZiAfHTjAakdB0z4SVqAsQzXxqWcZFZJm_WeQE4ufGbPD49I4tgfcm1UMSrrqI6hARhfpstpgaXXj3o7o0EQhCLTkTlI1e95n_y_rzewt5TIKSPZIyaUN322w/3td/2vF5KA8IQ3OHARqo3LRf4w/h1/9Ty4jy7gCSRwvuxethqVri8KAnkc-smGDuBUDPMxcT8)
---
This attack was part of a very troubling trend emerging across the nation. The fear is that anti-choice extremists have been empowered by the Supreme Court’s decision to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and are taking matters into their own hands. **This week, the FBI even confirmed they’re now investigating a string of unsolved attacks on reproductive health facilities.** I want to be very clear, Peter: I will never cave to intimidation and attacks on health care facilities in the communities I represent. These cowardly acts will only make me fight harder to protect every woman’s right to choose. These vandalizations have caused millions of dollars in damages and forced some clinics to close indefinitely -- making it harder for women to seek care. We need to stand strong against these attacks. So today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting Planned Parenthood during this difficult time: **[Please join me in support of Planned Parenthood by splitting a donation between my campaign and the Planned Parenthood Action Fund today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yKWm79obRFQd4WJbmf5kJ9cK6g73Pr3q_oTwVK7FU9WaLZRDPtIajYQj27z5qFJHsM9pZ4abe4Kb-_cjKvP3kEayz_WCtI3fjGQ7ZBTEJ9PZ9dy2Ogh8jXAbE628Lhmmdr9ZwsQw7bTr0TSVqwD10bh-VCsiefVsyaOAsDIK-v1egylf9x3O8Z-8dnFzVJIgCQu7ZXNrZttQEPT5UGX9bLGEy_4r7Wxco84w70i0GG7jpss0Sa3jn9NXTKs0Q37YFIL20kx4j27XYcNKNPJ62NIRahzS4cxxyiWojPn5uyXv1eGCKjc9gn7s09jvPwTxn4asIml-NwQnsVPrtzBFl8CeKSa30Jz3_r0Lh7VpxRisvgBQtEoCGlM4iXHJsXMkBHSW9jJurOCuFpnUa62Fp7h4d0bkS7akkVXgop02NMEw/3td/2vF5KA8IQ3OHARqo3LRf4w/h2/l4zJjEq3-yJtL7yUKIZF4l_f7ztR6H1edDDo-DGH3Bs)**

| | Good morning. The House voted 221-206 on Wednesday to pass legislation requiring federal agencies to revert to their pre-pandemic telework policies. However, the measure is likely to meet stiff resistance in the Senate. The Stopping Home Office Work's Unproductive Problems Act (H.R. 139) would require agencies to "reinstate and apply the telework policies, practices and levels . . . in effect on December 31, 2019" within 30 days of the bill's enactment. If agencies want to expand telework beyond 2019 levels, they must submit to Congress a plan certified by the Office of Personnel Management. The private sector is also increasing its use of telework permanently. Over 80% of companies will work in a hybrid environment because, often, telework can improve services. As users of government services, we desire effectiveness and efficiency. If agencies can provide adequate services, I don't care if federal employees work remotely, in the office, or a hybrid of both. Just like private businesses, government agencies should continuously look at how to improve. Congress does not know better than an agency to tell them to revert to 2019 practices. The world has changed after COVID. Let us adopt the positives and remove the negatives. This bill doesn't do that. It takes us backward. -Dr. Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressMichigan's 1st Congressional DistrictNorthern Michigan & the Upper PeninsulaVoteDrBob.com

Ron DeSantis announced a budget proposal that would include permanent “sales tax exemptions on all baby necessities like strollers and formula, pet meds and even the embattled gas stove.” The governor’s “Framework for Freedom” for the states budget proposes four permanent sales tax holidays totaling $1.5 billion as DeSantis looks to [...] READ MORE ]() ---|--- You Might Like | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- American Briefing 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team – I'm excited to share that we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal! [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58171429/390268518/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM0MjEwOS0xYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tn0OnKCv7mqqMG_5E5619dc3ZtAfFIAAYdkPtx70SlQ=&emci=14438eed-a6a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=eb342109-1ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)
---
I wanted to reach out to say thank you, Peter.

Earlier this week, my team and I faced our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of the year. With the Washington GOP chair already stating that flipping my seat is a top priority in 2024, we knew we’d need a strong start. And you helped us do just that.

Thanks to the support of this incredible grassroots team – I'm excited to share that we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal! We're starting the new year off on strong footing and ready to take on whatever the GOP throws our way.

I can't thank you enough for your support. It's because of each of you that we flipped this seat blue for the first time in 2018 and kept it blue in 2020 and 2022. I know we have many tough fights ahead of us, but if we continue working together, we can protect this seat and retake the House majority next year.

Thank you again,

Kim

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. name: Ron Wyden
subject: This is democracy in action
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58172089/390270872/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI5OWViZS0xYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcgKz-ujrMqivEM0CdRCLwfYGFZ0aYgcGAgnBb5jsOc=&emci=0791ea99-51a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c299ebe-1ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
---

| | **When I was first elected to the Senate, I promised to host a town hall in every single Oregon county at least once a year. More than**** _one thousand town halls later_****, I am proud to have kept that promise.** And we're not slowing down. We've been hitting the ground running in 2023, meeting in gymnasiums and community centers in counties across Oregon – talking to people from all walks of life. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58172091/390270874/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI5OWViZS0xYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcgKz-ujrMqivEM0CdRCLwfYGFZ0aYgcGAgnBb5jsOc=&emci=0791ea99-51a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c299ebe-1ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) One of the biggest goals with my open-to-all town halls is to close the gap between Oregon and Washington, D.C. By hearing firsthand from folks across our state about the challenges facing them and their communities, I can take those concerns and ideas back to the Capitol where I can work to tackle those needs with real, comprehensive solutions. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58172092/390270876/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI5OWViZS0xYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcgKz-ujrMqivEM0CdRCLwfYGFZ0aYgcGAgnBb5jsOc=&emci=0791ea99-51a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c299ebe-1ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) This year, I've already heard from hundreds of Oregonians about everything from the climate crisis, VA health care, Social Security, and other pressing concerns. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58172094/390270877/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI5OWViZS0xYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcgKz-ujrMqivEM0CdRCLwfYGFZ0aYgcGAgnBb5jsOc=&emci=0791ea99-51a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c299ebe-1ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) I'm proud to be doing the work of the people and leading the charge to help every community in Oregon thrive. **Coming home to hear from Oregonians is the best part of this job.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58172096/390270879/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYzI5OWViZS0xYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OcgKz-ujrMqivEM0CdRCLwfYGFZ0aYgcGAgnBb5jsOc=&emci=0791ea99-51a2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=2c299ebe-1ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) Many of my Republican colleagues treat this work like a game, a challenge to see who can collect the most power instead of what it really is, an opportunity to serve the people. I invite all of my colleagues to spend some time with their constituents and remember why we're here in Congress. This is democracy in action. _Ron_ |
---|---|---

clean_body: | | | | When I was first elected to the Senate, I promised to host a town hall in every single Oregon county at least once a year. More than one thousand town halls later, I am proud to have kept that promise. And we're not slowing down. We've been hitting the ground running in 2023, meeting in gymnasiums and community centers in counties across Oregon – talking to people from all walks of life. One of the biggest goals with my open-to-all town halls is to close the gap between Oregon and Washington, D.C. By hearing firsthand from folks across our state about the challenges facing them and their communities, I can take those concerns and ideas back to the Capitol where I can work to tackle those needs with real, comprehensive solutions. This year, I've already heard from hundreds of Oregonians about everything from the climate crisis, VA health care, Social Security, and other pressing concerns. I'm proud to be doing the work of the people and leading the charge to help every community in Oregon thrive. Coming home to hear from Oregonians is the best part of this job. Many of my Republican colleagues treat this work like a game, a challenge to see who can collect the most power instead of what it really is, an opportunity to serve the people. I invite all of my colleagues to spend some time with their constituents and remember why we're here in Congress. This is democracy in action. name: Team Becca
subject: Are we stuck in Groundhog Day?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
A perpetual loop of this magnitude requires all hands on deck. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58193516/390313450/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTIwOGEwZC00NmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tC1Kr4dZEmPaVQgjwuYykFgk8lvIw0ZPDCxA81nGKLA=&emci=7a6702e5-39a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a9208a0d-46a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Hey Peter, Team Becca here! Is it just us... or are we stuck in Groundhog Day? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58193517/390313451/-383892280?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTIwOGEwZC00NmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tC1Kr4dZEmPaVQgjwuYykFgk8lvIw0ZPDCxA81nGKLA=&emci=7a6702e5-39a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a9208a0d-46a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) Year after year, the GOP proposes the same dangerous agenda: **Giving tax cuts to the biggest corporations, wealthiest CEOs, and their billionaire buddies on Wall Street. ** And year after year, their solution to pay for these giveaways is to _slash Medicare and Social Security._ **Right now, GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy is holding the debt ceiling hostage in order to push these cuts to programs that over 157,000 Vermonters rely on to survive.** Social Security and Medicare are crucial, hard earned benefits that Vermonters have worked their entire lives for. Becca will always stand up to protect these programs. Becca is still determined to work with ANYONE who wants to help regular people, but she will _always_ stand firm in protecting the health and dignity of Vermont seniors. clean_body: A perpetual loop of this magnitude requires all hands on deck. | | Hey Peter, Team Becca here! Is it just us... or are we stuck in Groundhog Day? Year after year, the GOP proposes the same dangerous agenda: Giving tax cuts to the biggest corporations, wealthiest CEOs, and their billionaire buddies on Wall Street. And year after year, their solution to pay for these giveaways is to slash Medicare and Social Security. Right now, GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy is holding the debt ceiling hostage in order to push these cuts to programs that over 157,000 Vermonters rely on to survive. Social Security and Medicare are crucial, hard earned benefits that Vermonters have worked their entire lives for. Becca will always stand up to protect these programs. Becca is still determined to work with ANYONE who wants to help regular people, but she will always stand firm in protecting the health and dignity of Vermont seniors. Let’s end this Groundhog Day madness. – Team Becca Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room. As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. name: Senator Lindsey Graham
subject: I’d like to know your priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
**2023 Senate Survey**
Fellow American,

I know we haven’t touched base recently, but I wanted to reach out on behalf of the Senate Republicans because a new year brings new opportunities to get our country back on track.

Despite giving it our all last year, Chuck Schumer and the Democrats still hold the Senate majority. But let me make something abundantly clear, Fellow American -- we will NEVER stop fighting for you and the issues that matter to you most.

Which is why I’m reaching out today. **[I want to hear directly from you about what policies you think the Senate needs to focus on first this year.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=b09f39bbc4ca44ada2d7af245dd7113b&_e=nt_RX2yGq_nTDe1Bal3X8UjCsCQfUE4T8y6Y7k98WbOca8lyrPL96nd6fkwVyldQkOAqm4ol_uQPbwCjzO4CFwc1VHee8s-Gw2z5GYusar6TG_LHTep-xJYoIqf_zqscKHtPgP-STg3nBJpZpYltqh-UZ6kUKEjLeR1A-dF7DzoqInuxeHF2wv0R4lqHIg9lj-eFX452R8OoqnlfTMjXZEF-mIvkSufAaZ02HePeMW4w8tTLOaePqfF_TiSSp5tStW9At18aoFe4gEssZkVBbUd_AakbV9Xase_U7DShHj7K_ee2ae8kO9ipt3RzJM3UhLsZL70soakh_a2COgM9YmV15Ir3MK52ncIGeyhkprJnCvVIDbY7BUwKLzwKw6S36ZG_OxeuCm3pX-leo26F6799oKVJ-vIdFwt3NvjtHW8dCRxKszf8ehmXAGErKx-M)**

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2m8k7003trdff08h4j573nqken0ehgrnhmc8208_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9a15umsl0atncf9i884pn7npp896faukitl9aeo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z326j4kfidn8umtsavmepdr5jmd0dvsvoiptg95o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ag5k9937beouvadft1huf9hdmg88g9ptem6l2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8dlog81e8imruo5c7onc1n0vq6jba4rq008mjso_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za66afl7po7jf0l84j5p3hinf8pi7ij2fcievs10_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z499klpspa4k7hkn2q2d0l47ld3pg7ac00iepa0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcss15m8tjlsat1cdu3ntppgvu1rn71q7f0nb658_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjm6ob1c9h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

#
Peter — **National Republicans + DC special interests just launched another desperate attack on Lucas Kunce.**
