First, they called Lucas “unhinged” for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley. And now, they’re attacking... his voice?
**Missouri is one of the NRSC’s top targets in 2024 because they know Lucas has what it takes to defeat Josh Hawley + flip this Senate seat.** They’re coming at Lucas fast and early, trying every play in the book, to tear him down before it’s too late.
It’s critical that we have the resources to stand up to these attacks whenever they happen — and the best way we can do that is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum. **So that’s why we need your help today, Peter:**

clean_body: National Republicans + DC special interests just launched another weird + desperate attack on Lucas Kunce. Peter — National Republicans + DC special interests just launched another desperate attack on Lucas Kunce. It’s been less than a month since Lucas launched his campaign to replace Josh Hawley in the U.S. Senate and GOP insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee are already scared. First, they called Lucas “unhinged” for wanting to take on a coward like Hawley. And now, they’re attacking... his voice? Missouri is one of the NRSC’s top targets in 2024 because they know Lucas has what it takes to defeat Josh Hawley + flip this Senate seat. They’re coming at Lucas fast and early, trying every play in the book, to tear him down before it’s too late. It’s critical that we have the resources to stand up to these attacks whenever they happen — and the best way we can do that is by keeping up our record-breaking grassroots momentum. name: A.G. Holder
subject: The arc of the moral universe is long, but it bends towards justice.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Martin Luther King Jr.'s words remain true, but the bend toward justice does not happen on its own – it moves because people, like you, pull it there.
|
---

Martin Luther King Jr.'s words remain true, but the bend toward justice does not happen on its own -- it moves because people, like you, _pull_ it there.

Since we launched All On The Line, we've seen that path toward justice move closer because of our work together in restoring fairness to our democracy and ensuring that every American has an equal say in our government. We started this year having achieved significant progress, with 75% of the states’ congressional maps considered fair. However, our work remains unfinished as long as remaining states remain gerrymandered, and we must continue this fight until we get rid of all gerrymandering everywhere.
**It's up to us to not only safeguard the progress we have made, but it's time for us to build on that progress and continue our fight for fairness.[We can't reach that point without your support. Dr. King's legacy teaches us not to dwell in the shadows of disparity. We must stand at the forefront of the fight against inequality. [**We are in the midst of the civil rights movement of our time. It is up to us to continue bending the arc of justice. History has shown us that we can.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58194005/390315452/-2130149505?refcode=20230202_AOTL_P_EHHA1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjNhYzI1LTQ5YTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cCqAZo1ORK96UgkQbEjOeCz8bhYnTwgvaZsZIc1YZLs=)
That is why All On The Line and its affiliates are pressing forward in the fair maps movement by supporting voters who are challenging gerrymandered maps in court. Our teams are mobilizing volunteers across the nation to advocate for more redistricting reforms. And, importantly, we are working to prevent a new wave of radical gerrymandering.
| [**Donate to All On The Line Today**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58194006/390315453/-2130149505?refcode=20230202_AOTL_P_EHHA1_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3MjNhYzI1LTQ5YTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cCqAZo1ORK96UgkQbEjOeCz8bhYnTwgvaZsZIc1YZLs=)

It is our duty to continue this fight for the civil rights of all. The best way to honor Dr. King’s legacy is to build upon it. This can’t happen in one day -- it requires continued participation over the course of years and decades. And each year we must recommit ourselves to making his dream a reality.
I firmly believe that we have the capacity to bring about the change that is necessary.
In solidarity,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.

---

Friend,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2m14m3rm80i81ksfged9nljvsfob54n19e427ro_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjmeoj1c3h2bs "Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

---
| | [Chip in Here](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbtrjmeggf47ujkldrhsio6lkvib94vmqq1g9i70_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjmeoj1c3h2bs)
---

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsule5078cspd9g1sr4rv40lpafu0ori8ujqfkro_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cpjmeoj1c3h2bs "Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

---
My very best,

Breaking news, team. It may be early 2023, but the race for 2024 has already started. **Cook Political Report just released their initial 2024 House Ratings, and NM-02 has once again been named a top toss-up seat.** **[Will you rush $10 or more right now to help us refuel our grassroots campaign and re-elect Gabe in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58173664/390277346/665653053?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230202cook_tv_od30ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTBmOTIyNC0yMWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJevtuu3LMoJpn0YJFGvKIASuqI5yPRsHMXga3Hy2Dc=)** **Last November, Gabe won this critical House seat by a slim 0.68% margin, which was the closest Democratic congressional win in 2022._That means he’s the most vulnerable House Democrat up for re-election in 2024._** This announcement by Cook Political Report is a reminder that we’re in for yet another competitive race, and our former far-right extremist opponent Yvette Herrell has already filed for a rematch against Gabe. It is imperative that we protect Gabe’s seat in Congress so he can continue to give NM-02 the leadership we deserve. And with only five seats needed to flip the House from red to blue, it’s crucial we defend this one from being flipped red again. **[Please, if you can afford to, pitch in your first $10 to prepare our campaign for 2024 and keep Gabe fighting for the people of New Mexico.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58173667/390277351/665653053?refcode=fl_email_fr_20230202cook_tv_od30ds_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTBmOTIyNC0yMWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cJevtuu3LMoJpn0YJFGvKIASuqI5yPRsHMXga3Hy2Dc=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | = Breaking news, team. It may be early 2023, but the race for 2024 has already started. Cook Political Report just released their initial 2024 House Ratings, and NM-02 has once again been named a top toss-up seat. = Last November, Gabe won this critical House seat by a slim 0.68% margin, which was the closest Democratic congressional win in 2022.That means he’s the most vulnerable House Democrat up for re-election in 2024. This announcement by Cook Political Report is a reminder that we’re in for yet another competitive race, and our former far-right extremist opponent Yvette Herrell has already filed for a rematch against Gabe. It is imperative that we protect Gabe’s seat in Congress so he can continue to give NM-02 the leadership we deserve. And with only five seats needed to flip the House from red to blue, it’s crucial we defend this one from being flipped red again. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = — Team Vasquez | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico. | = | PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

subject: Advancing Educational Opportunities through School Choice
body:
Lori is Continuing the Fight | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/52ce523d4e8f/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-8115439?e=c87c5d8d97)

| | [](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=2bed571d3b&e=c87c5d8d97)
---
| Peter,

_**Did you know last week was National School Choice Week?**_

_**While it may be over, Congresswoman Lori Chavez-DeRemer is CONTINUING the fight for school choice! **_

As a mom of twin girls, Lori understands the importance of giving parents a say in what their children are taught. She is fighting every day for this cause and needs our support to continue her efforts.

_**Unfortunately, many schools are FORCING divisive and politically charged issues into the classroom.**_

We must _ENSURE_ that every child has access to a quality education that is free from political bias.

_Lori is advocating for a**Parental Bill of Rights** that ensures transparency for school curriculums and protects the rights of parents. This bill will give families the ability to choose the school that best fits their child's needs, and ensures that every student has the chance to succeed._

But the fight for parental rights and school choice is not an easy one, Peter.

[_**Can you help us stop the powerful interests that want to maintain the status quo and keep children trapped in failing schools? With a $250, $100, or even $50 contribution you can help Lori continue her fight for Parental Rights and School Choice. >>>**_](https://gobigmediainc.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a2447b89afe54066435f04744&id=847c540e99&e=c87c5d8d97)

body:
| | | Peter,
---
We must go on offense.

And there’s no time to lose.

The havoc liberal Democrat Joe Biden deliberately created at our southern border continues to intensify and spread. Within days of being sworn in, Biden rolled out the red carpet for law breakers of every stripe to pour into the United States.

As a result, every year Biden’s been in office has become a record-breaking year for illegal aliens storming our border.

Last year alone, U.S. Customs and Border Protection encountered nearly three million of them, topping the previous year’s record by more than a million.

To put it in perspective, this shocking figure is nearly QUADRUPLE the population of my Florida district.

And without a dramatic change in course, the number of criminal aliens entering the U.S. in 2023 will almost certainly be even greater, as will be the very real consequences shouldered by everyday Americans.
---
[**RUSH FUNDS TO SECURE OUR BORDER **](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=fc52b9caec4a46f4901c1ea35157eba5&_e=GL7m9oAKFiUtZrfha-YKdG5HBz2nLHoqkQpyXH2KGibyVnzKPAs6s4NixE3siKbDKx5QFaOPU79h1tBMUvRODsjfgPzjEQgA33nhQQTMgJUsxA47_KENpvSc7vY51i04K35wpXgoamJkQG6p762qfaDawUW2n30T8EOW0qQZUCgf5CwyJnPZXQq99HT7i0-GzcM3VefKmFd2CX7ao2CFZ6XnfUngWLejVGGSmvXcFMzPMs2CmAxoeUcC-RaKGKrRF4cqbgLbrGgP-jOHOoeFkWQA1Knjq0AZLcWb9Yc3xSayHFGAfxuWE8Sk06aVDWpq-SPTe9CHjeAlcsTDEeyv1w%3D%3D)

Peter, nothing like this has ever happened before.

States, cities, and towns nationwide are already facing housing shortages, overcrowded classrooms, wage deflation, busted local budgets, and soaring crime thanks to Joe Biden’s inaction at the border.

I won’t rest until our southern border is secure and the violent Mexican cartels are crippled, but your support is the only thing that can push our team to victory.

I know what it takes to FIGHT and WIN against Leftist "Elites" who hate our country, our freedom, and everything that makes America great. I've dedicated my life to inspiring MILLIONS of young people to love America again and to WIN the American Culture War. Now Turning Point USA and I are taking on the secretive World Economic Forum (WEF) and their dangerous GREAT RESET agenda ... and I want to reach as many Americans AS POSSIBLE with our important plan to DEFEAT the Great Reset. Whether you've heard of the WEF's Great Reset agenda before, or you're just learning of it now ... you must read this book. If you're trying to understand the MASSIVE challenges in America today, from skyrocketing inflation to wide-open national borders to medical tyranny ... you must read this book. If you want to make a difference and preserve FREEDOM, PROSPERITY, and AMERICAN GREATNESS for your kids and your grandkids ... you must read this book. Thank you for helping Turning Point USA expose and DEFEAT the Great Reset agenda. name: Team Jayapal
subject: More than just 28 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Happy Black History Month, Peter!
#
Happy Black History Month, Peter!
As February starts, Team Jayapal is celebrating Black leaders and visionaries whose accomplishments and contributions have pushed our country to truly embody the democratic ideals we cherish and made our country a more fair and equitable one.
This month serves as a **crucial reminder of the need** to have difficult and honest conversations, continually educating ourselves, and taking the time to honor the complex and varied experiences that come with being Black in the United States.
Black Americans’ experiences are essential to telling our nation’s story. Black history is American history that matters beyond the month of February — and we’re committed to uplifting it 365 days a year.
Team Jayapal remains dedicated to organizing and advocating for bold, impactful solutions to the issues that disproportionately impact Black Americans, including securing more affordable housing, guaranteeing healthcare, expanding voting rights, and reforming law enforcement and the criminal justice system.
We’ve compiled a list of our top recommendations for anyone seeking to continue to educate themselves. We invite you to learn more and explore the many facets of the Black experience this month and beyond, and hope you won’t let the conversation end here. **Please share these resources far and wide or even forward this email to a few friends.**
**_Read:_**
* [**Here’s the story behind Black History Month — and why it’s celebrated in February - NPR**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28111?t=1&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [**Black History Themes - ASALH**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28112?t=2&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [**Black History Month arrives as teachers’ fears mount - Axios**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28113?t=3&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)

---
**_Watch:_**
* [**CrashCourse’s Black American History Playlist - YouTube**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28114?t=4&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [**How Black History Month began and how it has changed to what it is today - USA Today**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28115?t=5&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [**The Black Politicians of Reconstruction - Time**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28116?t=6&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)

---
**_Listen:_**
* [**Black History Year Podcast - PushBlack**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28117?t=7&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [**Code Switch Podcast by NPR**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28118?t=8&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [**On Biracial Identity - Vox’s _The Weeds_ Podcast **](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/28119?t=9&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)

---
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=10&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2121%2E420207%2EdF6AGT)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Sign the petition: Statehood for D.C. now!
body:
No taxation without representation
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc334906e-fc4f-4adb-8327-37eb2e5dc9f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Taxation without representation** was wrong in 1776 and it is wrong today. The people of D.C. pay the [highest federal taxes per capita](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf3fa785f-3bdb-4f71-8160-f9416fbed64c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but **have no voting representation in Congress**. Becoming a state ends this injustice. [**Sign the petition: Congress must stop denying representation to hundreds of thousands of American citizens. The time for D.C. statehood is NOW!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e81b64b-013b-4210-ab64-c3eb5d6c66e9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) D.C. residents bear all the responsibilities of full U.S. citizenship—they serve on juries, in the U.S. military, and work hard to build safe, strong communities where they live. And yet, the 700,000+ people who call D.C. home, the majority of whom are Black and Brown, have no vote on any decisions our Congress makes every day, even though they exert undue power over those residents. This includes [maintenance](https://default.salsalabs.org/T79b6337a-1e92-4b33-8fe9-121d5011b8ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) within the district, [banning](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1019b99b-b4f3-4d5a-8760-c41c6d46d1fb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) a district-elected legalization of marijuana, and even regulating legal [abortion access](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td4e89508-b13f-4ac8-a9fd-db5fd23a27e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Those residents—who are mostly people of color and members of frontline communities—are denied the most basic tenet that founded our country: Representation. This is a fundamental civil rights issue. Now, Sen. Tom Carper [reintroduced](https://default.salsalabs.org/T57719b5f-d6cc-42a8-99f5-e7305c08190d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) legislation to make Washington, D.C. the 51st state. The bill would give Washington D.C. citizens full representation in Congress—the bill MUST pass.
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**SIGN THE PETITION**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1eec0057-d22e-426f-bf4d-6bffe362136f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Make no mistake, this is voter suppression—equality at the ballot box cannot be guaranteed until Congress grants the residents of D.C. the statehood they deserve to be a part of the democratic process. It’s past time this great injustice be righted. [**Sign the petition: Congress must stop denying representation to hundreds of thousands of American citizens. The time for D.C. statehood is NOW!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te97b06e1-8c89-47a6-91bd-bd67b4d03b9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for standing up for DC voting rights, Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2063f2bb-5593-44b9-985b-d91f04a5d5b4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/dcstatehood-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7d06aa34-336c-4f2f-a347-f8467728a8a8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| | [Unsubscribe](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=9e36169f-20aa-452b-9248-0de11366dc58&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) or [Manage Your Preferences](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/manage-your-subscription?eId=9e36169f-20aa-452b-9248-0de11366dc58&eType=EmailBlastContent&sId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Equal rights shouldn’t have to wait any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
It’s time to finally ratify the Equal Rights Amendment.
#
Peter, this is unacceptable:
It’s 2023 and women still do not have explicit, constitutional protection from discrimination.
The Equal Rights Amendment was passed in 1972, but was never ratified. That’s why I am helping lead the push to remove the arbitrary deadline and move this amendment forward.
**[There should not be a deadline on equality. Join me in taking a stand by adding your name to my petition to remove this obstacle and ratify the Equal Rights Amendment.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58175452/390282698/-1227612400?refcode=dd_em_230202_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230202_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODMzOTYyOC0yNGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IgScz6fiEN05LHp_nB0aSE5x20YOkSeY-PPI6loKbB4=&emci=bdf362d2-1fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f8339628-24a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
The prerequisite 38 states have officially ratified the ERA, but because of the original deadline, Congress is unable to move forward with ratification. Equality shouldn’t hinge on a technicality.
In the Judiciary Committee, I’ll be holding a hearing on this critical issue and making sure the American people understand what’s at stake. Then, I’ll urge the Senate to take action. Equal rights shouldn’t have to wait any longer. We have the power to do something about it.
**[Sign my petition: it’s time for Congress to remove the deadline and ratify the ERA>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58175455/390282704/-1227612400?refcode=dd_em_230202_t1_1&ms=dd_em_230202_t1_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODMzOTYyOC0yNGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IgScz6fiEN05LHp_nB0aSE5x20YOkSeY-PPI6loKbB4=&emci=bdf362d2-1fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=f8339628-24a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2727974)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: It’s time to finally ratify the Equal Rights Amendment. Peter, this is unacceptable: It’s 2023 and women still do not have explicit, constitutional protection from discrimination. The Equal Rights Amendment was passed in 1972, but was never ratified. That’s why I am helping lead the push to remove the arbitrary deadline and move this amendment forward. The prerequisite 38 states have officially ratified the ERA, but because of the original deadline, Congress is unable to move forward with ratification. Equality shouldn’t hinge on a technicality. In the Judiciary Committee, I’ll be holding a hearing on this critical issue and making sure the American people understand what’s at stake. Then, I’ll urge the Senate to take action. Equal rights shouldn’t have to wait any longer. We have the power to do something about it. My best, Dick Durbin ** **** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: VADEMS
subject: The true colors of the GOP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
their main priority in 2023

|
---
**“We’re going to take this issue all the way to the ballot box,”**

| | Peter —

**In the 13 years since Citizens United was decided, the consequences have never been more dire.**

The Supreme Court ruling, which granted corporations the free speech rights of individuals and the ability to spend unlimited sums on elections, has proved to have disastrous consequences for our democracy.

_[Peter, we cannot afford to sit idly by as corporations and the ultra-wealthy spend billions on elections, hash out shady backroom deals, and deprive our nation of the people’s power. Peter, It’s Groundhog Day, which is ironic, because much like Bill Murray in the movie of the same name, we feel like we’ve been living the same awful day over and over again. Everyday we wake up and there is still dark money in our politics. Abortion is still unprotected. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: A More Perfect Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic PartyCarol V
body:
Peter,

The greatest ideals of our nation have been made possible because of the powerful humanity and towering contributions of Black Americans. Ever a work in progress, America continues to -- in the words of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. -- bend the long arc of the moral universe towards justice.

February is a special month. It provides us the time to come together and celebrate the history, heritage, and success that Black people have contributed to this nation. America has come so far standing on the shoulders of giants like Benjamin Hooks, Diane Nash, and Rita Sanders Geier who helped to pave a path for a more equitable America for future generations. Despite unyielding injustices, Black Americans have played one of the most significant roles in helping to shape our nation into what it is today — a more perfect union.

The Tennessee Democratic Party stands in solidarity with Black Tennesseans. We are committed to uplifting Black communities; we will never stop fighting to defend their right to vote and access to equal opportunity for all. We stand up, and we don’t back down because Black history is our history.

Together, justice will prevail,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who fight for working people. Can you help Take Back Tennessee by giving monthly?

name: Senate Memo
subject: Montana, West Virginia, or Ohio?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Does the Senate race in Ohio, West Virginia, or Montana represent Republicans’ best chance at flipping a Senate seat next November?
Fellow American,

And just like that, the 2024 race to reclaim the Senate is in full swing... **and things don’t look great for a trio of Democrats.**

Democrat incumbents in Ohio, Montana, and West Virginia are all up for re-election next year. One thing they have in common? The former President Trump easily dispatched Joe Biden despite having a Democrat Senator.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e83ed606b77c465d89615a2699d0f178&_e=5U7Y3UYhFaCdHkQuAfjdDTriOULnE345niffWqhjfY_HT6k_-SLEAQSuldE0szN9U76yJjP3n6VPMZUShtjPWnoCBggXEzeyZXo5FIcStSaKycZVmoX0bBrpUBNLO3FqEh2n9ghtkBK7X5fEpVys0fFTtlHi4RvkAQpQEGRQ8z2NMUKkoJMSFNqiQx4Ey1I_J5ipBYkvQ3vXy7FWjaD-oqWqFaZK4DRYwvCcvbjOvKJf4RbY-_-btjl-LRFGvi0fdoMsOUHZhguiYrWW2dQ0SKkEUslWnNOvDB9TPt8fjQwibPC2rh2K_yC-Pnccc-7u2h25fkdtR80Ode02HycJz70DVqAySj5-GzMhP7JfeudatdVam3ry-G4gBTzD7bvu-B_wDdRx19avcj-6tUZ_gJ3vyyT-4EZcEteyGfDG3dplWpfd78yEQKbYH-ybUaYi)

We’re reaching out to grassroots supporters like you because we need help to decide where we should spend to win. Your input will allow us to not only spend our resources more efficiently, but it will also allow us to better tailor our message ahead of next year’s election.

Our question for you today is this: **Does the Senate race in Ohio, West Virginia, or Montana represent Republicans’ best chance at flipping a Senate seat next November?**

clean_body: Does the Senate race in Ohio, West Virginia, or Montana represent Republicans’ best chance at flipping a Senate seat next November? Fellow American, And just like that, the 2024 race to reclaim the Senate is in full swing... and things don’t look great for a trio of Democrats. Democrat incumbents in Ohio, Montana, and West Virginia are all up for re-election next year. One thing they have in common? The former President Trump easily dispatched Joe Biden despite having a Democrat Senator. We’re reaching out to grassroots supporters like you because we need help to decide where we should spend to win. Your input will allow us to not only spend our resources more efficiently, but it will also allow us to better tailor our message ahead of next year’s election. Our question for you today is this: Does the Senate race in Ohio, West Virginia, or Montana represent Republicans’ best chance at flipping a Senate seat next November? Remember, each of these states currently has a Democrat incumbent, and each race was rated as a “Toss-Up” in the first official Senate forecasting for 2024. Fellow American, your input will help me make sure we invest early in our most winnable, “blue-to-red” seats. name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: I’m officially running for reelection
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
| I wanted to share this with you personally, Peter:

**I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support _today_ is so important.**

The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too.

But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign.

**So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority.**

[Please, will you split $10 between my campaign and Upset the Setup to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign to defeat the GOP in New York and defend the Senate for Democrats?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58177038/390288255/1522361197?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230202_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZjFiNGNlLTJiYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=orQtuA3AtzMgeuG57c3fQd6IDjxgL7gqeT_tAM_mL0g=) | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58177041/390288258/1522361197?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=UTS_20230202_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZjFiNGNlLTJiYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=orQtuA3AtzMgeuG57c3fQd6IDjxgL7gqeT_tAM_mL0g=)

I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic.

But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a _permanent_ paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that.

**The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.[Please, Peter, will you split $10 between my campaign and Upset the Setup to defend our Democratic Senate majority and make sure that I can keep fighting for you in the Senate?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58177044/390288261/1522361197?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500&refcode=UTS_20230202_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ5ZjFiNGNlLTJiYTMtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=orQtuA3AtzMgeuG57c3fQd6IDjxgL7gqeT_tAM_mL0g=)**

clean_body: | I wanted to share this with you personally, Peter: I’m running for reelection to continue fighting for you and your family in the U.S. Senate. In a minute, I’m going to ask you to become a Founding Donor to my reelection campaign. But first, please let me explain why your support today is so important. The truth is that the road to keeping this seat blue isn’t going to be easy. During the 2022 midterms here in New York, Republicans won more races across the state than they have in two decades — enough to deliver the House majority back to the GOP. Now, they’re using that momentum to target this seat as a pickup opportunity in 2024 so that they can retake the Senate, too. But I’ve never backed down from a challenge. My very first race for Congress was in a Republican district where people said that there were “more cows than Democrats.” I still ran, and we won. That’s because I had grassroots supporters like you by my side from the very beginning, making the early investments that are key to building a winning campaign. So that’s what I’m asking of you today, Peter. With so much at stake, I’m counting on you to step up and become a Founding Donor today to help make sure I have the resources it will take to defend New York’s Senate seat and our Democratic majority. = | = I’ve taken on some tough fights in the Senate: Securing health care for the 9/11 first responders. Repealing “Don’t Ask, Don’t Tell.” Making sure Americans got paid family and medical leave during the pandemic. But there are so many critical fights ahead — for voting rights, for reproductive freedom, for health care, for a permanent paid leave program. And I won’t let up until the fights are won. I promise you that. The GOP wants nothing more than to defeat me and halt progress on these critical issues, so I’m counting on your help to make sure we can take them head on and win.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kirsten Gillibrand and Upset the Setup will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Kirsten | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty. The system is set up against us — so we're electing leaders who will upset the system. Please, consider making a =. Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and empower young, diverse Democratic candidates up and down the ballot, make a=. to receive fewer emails. to update your information. name: American Update
subject: (Video) Controversial OnlyFans Mom Banned From Childs School
body:
Shocking Polling Numbers Show Danger For Biden 2024 (Only 28% Believe He’s Mentally Competent)

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658777%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MXnufnKFT4ReEI%2b9Fka4ww&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658778%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4WyWBVCJf4JrWDvVdqm2yw&sysid=1

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658779%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v51AqWr3Kce5lfKobT3E9g&sysid=1 (Video) Controversial OnlyFans Mom Banned From Childs School

Victoria Triece, 31, was a volunteer at her child’s school, Sand Lake Elementary in Florida, until she was banned for her posts on Onlyfans, a subscription-based pornography service, as reported by WESH reported Wednesday. Triece filed a lawsuit against Orange County Public Schools (OCPS) following directions from the principal to not return to the school’s campus or volunteer around the children going forward.

| | _“As a former public school teacher, Kat S. deeply values education. She was glad her local public school had a good reputation for quality. | | **Unfortunately, stories of parents like Kat aren’t unique**. The COVID-19 pandemic gave parents a glimpse into their kids' daily lives at school and exposed the failings of a one-size-fits-all approach. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: look in your own damn mirror
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
I just raced to the House floor because I heard we were voting to oust a member over their anti-semitic remarks. But with our MAGA hostage Speaker, that was far from the case. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195987/390335645/-557856831?refcode=E17393-20230101-headerfooter-header-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk1NjFiZS01YWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wu9el81ZkcBG8bfmmlqLgJKw7-YAeiPqtEZAPq4LY9Q=)
Team, I just raced to the House floor because I heard we were voting to oust a member over their anti-semitic remarks. I thought to myself, _FINALLY_ we’ll begin to see some accountability. And then I thought, it MUST be about this tweet from Jim Jordan: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195988/390335646/1324349186?refcode=E20194-20230202-Accountability-GRAPHIC-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk1NjFiZS01YWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wu9el81ZkcBG8bfmmlqLgJKw7-YAeiPqtEZAPq4LY9Q=) This tweet was kept up for _two whole months_ after Kanye made violent threats against Jewish Americans. TWO MONTHS of an official tweet from the House Judiciary Republicans condoning that type of rhetoric. _It should be unthinkable that something like this would go unpunished._ But with our MAGA hostage Speaker, that was far from the case. This conference continues to allow its members to root for rioters and show sympathy for insurrectionists. They will align themselves with hate, then try to gaslight the American people about it. **That’s why we need to do everything we can to hold them accountable and call out their lies for what they are: dangerous, hate-fueled rhetoric!** [_**It’s time for the MAGA-right to look in their own damn mirror when it comes to ousting hate. Can you rush a $15 donation to hold Kevin McCarthy, Jim Jordan, and the far-right accountable.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195989/390335647/1324349186?refcode=E20194-20230202-Accountability-SL-GOP-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjk1NjFiZS01YWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wu9el81ZkcBG8bfmmlqLgJKw7-YAeiPqtEZAPq4LY9Q=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: Blown away with gratitude
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]Friend,

I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed this campaign ahead of our end of month fundraising deadline.

Especially this early on in the race, your support makes all the difference. Thanks to your help, we were able to prove to the NRCC that we will be putting up a strong fight in 2023.

Early investments and grassroots support allow me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 – we’re only just beginning!

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

Grateful to have you by my side,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-footer-2020?amount=$25&refcode=footer2020] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. clean_body: [#]Friend, I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed this campaign ahead of our end of month fundraising deadline. Especially this early on in the race, your support makes all the difference. Thanks to your help, we were able to prove to the NRCC that we will be putting up a strong fight in 2023. Early investments and grassroots support allow me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 – we’re only just beginning! Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team. Grateful to have you by my side, Josh Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. If you'd like to support his campaign click here [] , if you'd like to unsubscribe click here. [] Thank you for being on Team Gottheimer. name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cff5a33448904eeaba30d19f2e3712ea&_e=IAjYjty9eaKKMP4pI36rySiezyEXVR_9FT0wMIYhj1nKJzq8Cp3824ClUESmO55cWuoVNQrTGl_AeFWNa7b76kyaPGoAC5YXwm9Y0h9KyA6u7PP84aYp3CKL49Lznd49IUS_-3S6yi-IT9nALPefmWb7tmOyxXajneZIOEAAQTht-IkMbQaYBSA9H1SPn--vC5J9PRAOyDYYuxkRH_p4_E7diTGxv8JTvF9ilAP3ZC27qREieM8SRAsPQ_dDzmEGrYwgTJjU9Us7hQZ2ZIU1epEvi_R1Mv4Bpal_QPduXqn2hJ5ykf4-kTAg-0pQEB24cJLwau-ZSE1a0tZmNZ5z9USspjS8PLRXmo-_yq7J_M0UiD8hhVvoA6cgXGZzZVZJd0H3FpdQ2ujEtQluvZGse89XvofqQtaqa2-Ga1F4o2I7vCfDchAZ1EP_CulCpnj5)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith—making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cff5a33448904eeaba30d19f2e3712ea&_e=IAjYjty9eaKKMP4pI36rySiezyEXVR_9FT0wMIYhj1nKJzq8Cp3824ClUESmO55cWuoVNQrTGl_AeFWNa7b76kyaPGoAC5YXwm9Y0h9KyA6u7PP84aYp3CKL49Lznd49IUS_-3S6yi-IT9nALPefmWb7tmOyxXajneZIOEAAQTht-IkMbQaYBSA9H1SPn--vC5J9PRAOyDYYuxkRH_p4_E7diTGxv8JTvF9ilAP3ZC27qREieM8SRAsPQ_dDzmEGrYwgTJjU9Us7hQZ2ZIU1epLMIFz6n6__wUROfcgOb69sfd5YMicsJizEqz9JIwXlT38to-Ntuwy7akGlmJjkv0m8Sq67aOD4fxA6tHatkD2WlKfcfviuzW8A2ZtlYpPRAeVpPpGV--edvDfP2yDZZForQQK8DutpqnEv9zc8LAicGyglGuQohEVTiWSFpcxS)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cff5a33448904eeaba30d19f2e3712ea&_e=IAjYjty9eaKKMP4pI36rySiezyEXVR_9FT0wMIYhj1nKJzq8Cp3824ClUESmO55cWuoVNQrTGl_AeFWNa7b76kyaPGoAC5YXwm9Y0h9KyA6u7PP84aYp3CKL49Lznd49IUS_-3S6yi-IT9nALPefmWb7tmOyxXajneZIOEAAQTht-IkMbQaYBSA9H1SPn--vC5J9PRAOyDYYuxkRH_p4_E7diTGxv8JTvF9ilAP3ZC27qREieM8SRAsPQ_dDzmEGrYwgTJjU9Us7hQZ2ZIU1enOzxjajz-rF8xL5ymKQtrAhglRRIpPLxfs4ZIBnIhFhqyZxx53zXBY2w0VxyuXswjT0o-xGBKx9reeHo3Nfu-v9diBlq261JcFxo2CgjYfaroLzz_DqQde6x15G5UXbdTPDZtSXx_g8eBZRqNbMPjtAu-4iP6Xe0VUVgUcf2wqI)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cff5a33448904eeaba30d19f2e3712ea&_e=IAjYjty9eaKKMP4pI36rySiezyEXVR_9FT0wMIYhj1nKJzq8Cp3824ClUESmO55cWuoVNQrTGl_AeFWNa7b76kyaPGoAC5YXwm9Y0h9KyA6u7PP84aYp3CKL49Lznd49IUS_-3S6yi-IT9nALPefmWb7tmOyxXajneZIOEAAQTht-IkMbQaYBSA9H1SPn--vC5J9PRAOyDYYuxkRH_p4_E7diTGxv8JTvF9ilAP3ZC27qREieM8SRAsPQ_dDzmEGrYwgTJjU9Us7hQZ2ZIU1em94AYDSSqWmtcs_T2PmXdvngdlxgvKc6VX_8bCenIewMQniXId5n-qo0BWeoVnNZD38bDtUG9eUNBpFhX7gQGrbNN1bo3_2odkzGTqA4ylNR6RDMajjb43aEzVOEEg9_OMAATJ34RJkE3sTRkFKM1zaswOEn5wIAx7-2t4P09Vq).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Fellow Conservative,

To say that the liberals who controlled the federal government for the past two years are desperately grasping on to power is an understatement. Until a few weeks ago, Republicans didn’t have the tools to hold them accountable. Without the power that comes with being in the majority, the best we could hope for was the truth would somehow break through all the noise created by the Left and their allies in the mainstream media.

Now with Republicans in the majority, we’re determined to make government not only function more effectively but to hold those in power accountable for the actions they take -**legal or illegal** - in service of the American people.

Of course, some will say that Republicans are just using our investigative powers to settle old scores. _**That’s wrong**_. We must ensure every American receives fair and equal treatment under the law. Whether you work deep in the federal bureaucracy, or you’re **President of the United States** , the law should be administered as written and apply equally to all.

As one of our top supporters, we know that you have your finger on America’s pulse more than most, so we’re hoping you can provide some insight on a very important question: **[Do you believe the government treats everyone the same under the rule of law, regardless of social position or economic advantages?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=515f53fd9a9f4193b27429b93cee86e6&_e=BMT5qNq3W6Chc65whWLumqUvGO5TS0qZO7GjIncndebyAEJ2ON7WT_9VpzOesMOXXKDXfRkRBudgnHlmDuog7MSXl2L16aE48qUJ52gQqxhSmYJAYa4pBto3N8oIdZS_nCZ2QqfUB3ft2DS16LBEc3Kx_jPlpXbOJh-VnqRrECRzkWoEJbbtg40qDYdr6SjgCmM5niDVEUY23bKPI0O7nqsLlVq2tMa-U9QIHrWxeTbfQR3jajuksgDaf_HqZy89CAMpUmsXS5EyDm1t61fx7C2HfUVlD_lFrg3kSkfJcZA3tY_0f-SL4WmnVkBLFdTpiQmWCbNLiW6mTKcpuHX1rS4AvrmDv1xLWgaw3zLd8oSdV0tDc_RIQP5MhzG1CxkO-5mHX-nUjwcH-EqEmP0_nSjox-hem1SrvSL5dqy5WOhrsG3fsAIQZJmjeXmlSxXF)**
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=515f53fd9a9f4193b27429b93cee86e6&_e=BMT5qNq3W6Chc65whWLumqUvGO5TS0qZO7GjIncndebyAEJ2ON7WT_9VpzOesMOXXKDXfRkRBudgnHlmDuog7MSXl2L16aE48qUJ52gQqxhSmYJAYa4pBto3N8oIdZS_nCZ2QqfUB3ft2DS16LBEc3Kx_jPlpXbOJh-VnqRrECRzkWoEJbbtg40qDYdr6SjgCmM5niDVEUY23bKPI0O7nqsLlVq2tMa-U9QIHrWxeTbfQR3jajuksgDaf_HqZy89CAMpUmsXS5EyDm1t61fx7Nob84CVwxu9JjtcjbyK_sjXke2B_w4D826PhQ5tFkHvb8DipaaNFgCZ4hdmQ0yHLZYdhVpnvWTC6A4xFhXsWwcH34UccJ5dsqJZlO7cupcSxEJXandZnUza72JNhTgOteJt_4t9pbnAKL_MOvDOVLBgv1KfKx5SDrMnAjRXjCEy)

[**LET US KNOW
IS EVERYEONE TREATED FAIRLY UNDER THE LAW? -> **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=515f53fd9a9f4193b27429b93cee86e6&_e=BMT5qNq3W6Chc65whWLumqUvGO5TS0qZO7GjIncndebyAEJ2ON7WT_9VpzOesMOXXKDXfRkRBudgnHlmDuog7MSXl2L16aE48qUJ52gQqxhSmYJAYa4pBto3N8oIdZS_nCZ2QqfUB3ft2DS16LBEc3Kx_jPlpXbOJh-VnqRrECRzkWoEJbbtg40qDYdr6SjgCmM5niDVEUY23bKPI0O7nqsLlVq2tMa-U9QIHrWxeTbfQR3jajuksgDaf_HqZy89CAMpUmsXS5EyDm1t61fx7DTb6nccMz4YIcW7Et2gBiCdu9xKh6YFPvJiK8j-_fds5-vuTd0nzqRMPHmTGbahbLZlB5waEVn7efLoqJhCI4crLCi9pIZnt9r91ITJ7OojJsDqSB5WjsBCfrwyfSo-q3eL8xXMI6CD4E-3gn1vMyl7QJ1oG7MZkt-mGNIbZd6Y)

Democrats are going to hate the idea of a level playing field. Just think what they would do if President Biden was treated the same way President Trump was during last August’s raid over classified documents. You remember the coordinated leaks, the feigned media outrage, the incessant attacks on Trump and his supporters. Many of us asked: where was the FBI raid when classified documents were found in Biden’s possession before last November’s election?
**
I’m glad to say, their game is finally over. **

Fellow Conservative, please let me know what you think about Biden’s mishandling of classified documents. We are asking for your participation today. **[Can we count on you?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=515f53fd9a9f4193b27429b93cee86e6&_e=BMT5qNq3W6Chc65whWLumqUvGO5TS0qZO7GjIncndebyAEJ2ON7WT_9VpzOesMOXXKDXfRkRBudgnHlmDuog7MSXl2L16aE48qUJ52gQqxhSmYJAYa4pBto3N8oIdZS_nCZ2QqfUB3ft2DS16LBEc3Kx_jPlpXbOJh-VnqRrECRzkWoEJbbtg40qDYdr6SjgCmM5niDVEUY23bKPI0O7nqsLlVq2tMa-U9QIHrWxeTbfQR3jajuksgDaf_HqZy89CAMpUmsXS5EyDm1t61fx7F_nWln_p_zOx9VMMN3ZCs55Ffb_rIAIPXiUgr9z-QxKxeEmBE7pTsPyj_g7hurTA1jz-OjsOkazqc0LWSyOuyewDV_hEUINYtR8kLUtKLSd0aZJnQLhyMNEOKal3xFChjRo7Q9kBSH8dKjUmkcAKwOsb9F2J4Q-04EgCLRqFkJg)**

God Bless,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=515f53fd9a9f4193b27429b93cee86e6&_e=BMT5qNq3W6Chc65whWLumqUvGO5TS0qZO7GjIncndebyAEJ2ON7WT_9VpzOesMOXXKDXfRkRBudgnHlmDuog7MSXl2L16aE48qUJ52gQqxhSmYJAYa4pBto3N8oIdZS_nCZ2QqfUB3ft2DS16LBEc3Kx_jPlpXbOJh-VnqRrECRzkWoEJbbtg40qDYdr6SjgCmM5niDVEUY23bKPI0O7nqsLlVq2tMa-U9QIHrWxeTbfQR3jajuksgDaf_HqZy89CAMpUmsXS5EyDm1t61fx7Hhyf9LRaR4SKkw8TjIKiCw2v8sgIVe9gf8oUcGSuwbtGIHOzQwrQABorokhBUANJPwtq_qtT1tv43MUEkjSFsm6o2mxbaVjBTFTvd1lZyjzVfUbig06O9Vaj8nTKzEdoTQBQGj9RCrS0t9vI_wobcwdSh4ZSOKA7BDYSb74nNqK)
Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

** [ ** JOIN JIM ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=515f53fd9a9f4193b27429b93cee86e6&_e=BMT5qNq3W6Chc65whWLumqUvGO5TS0qZO7GjIncndebyAEJ2ON7WT_9VpzOesMOXXKDXfRkRBudgnHlmDuog7MSXl2L16aE48qUJ52gQqxhSmYJAYa4pBto3N8oIdZS_nCZ2QqfUB3ft2DS16LBEc3Kx_jPlpXbOJh-VnqRrECRzkWoEJbbtg40qDYdr6SjgCmM5niDVEUY23bKPI0O7nqsLlVq2tMa-U9QIHrWxeTbfQR3jajuksgDaf_HqZy89CAMpUmsXS5EyDm1t61fx7M6JYT49zjJhlb2jplirn6AlC7ms5kRaCpn58m_h7pAP6Pq2qPtr0DoMphwKsF5k9TPjZpPDqzAKbSzzvSpz9s12HqlRCpKr35VrwBQP-PxiZ28c1zdlxLdWvDTCMRxh20xb4r0gKqRBfoCxR_jiuEVc4y-4udcUbaCMe7G5FLqh)

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: When we told Cori we were behind:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Stories like these change lives
#
Hi — I’m working through our numbers for January and am disappointed to share that we narrowly missed our fundraising goal for the month. **[We could really use your help: if you’d like to help us close the gap, chip in $5 right now.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=1&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=2&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)**
When we shared that we were behind on fundraising with Cori, she reached out to our supporters and shared her story — reiterating the importance of having someone who’s actually _lived_ the experience at the forefront of national debates like policing, reproductive rights, housing insecurity, and more.
**Stories like Cori’s are all too common across the country, but rarely represented in the demographic makeup of Congress.** That makes it even more important that we work hard to stay on top of fundraising to ensure that when Cori’s singled out by the Republican machine, or even moderate Democrats for speaking truth to power — she has the resources needed to fight back.
**Bottom line: we have to keep voices like Cori’s in Congress and amplified across the country.**
**[Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us close the fundraising gap? Together, we can ensure that the nation’s most important conversations are centered around the people living that experience.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=3&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=22&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)**
Adrastos Da Silva,
Campaign Manager, Team Cori
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Cori Bush [info@CoriBush.com]
Date: Tue, Jan 31, 2023
Subject: I have a story to share:
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Hi —
My team told me we’re still short of hitting our January fundraising goal.
They suggested I reach out to explain why I hope you'll chip in to support the progressive movement we’re building in Congress.
**So I’m going to share my story with you.** It’s important that you know why this work matters to me.
[**When you finish reading, I hope you can chip in $5 to help us reach our $74,000 fundraising goal and ensure our team has the resources we need to make progress in Congress.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=23&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=42&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)**
There aren’t many people in Congress who have lived the struggles that I have, Peter.
_I’ve been evicted, unhoused, and lived in a car with my two babies._ I will never forget the nights when I was unhoused where my eyes would water as I fought to stay awake, worried about what would happen to my children if I fell asleep. When I used McDonald's bathrooms to mix baby formula and wash my body because I had no other options.
_I’ve been on the ground brutalized by police violence._ When Michael Brown Jr. was murdered by police just six minutes from where I lived in 2014, I didn't take to the streets for a title or a name. I was sent by my employer to serve as a triage nurse and to assist with grief and trauma work. But, I showed up to protest the day after Michael Brown was killed, and I came back every day for the next 400 days.
_I was sexually assaulted at 17 and chose to have an abortion._ I saw up close how Black women are treated by our health care system and the challenges we face in accessing abortion care.
There are very few members of Congress who understand what this is like, **but I know that there are millions of people in our communities who share these experiences.**
That’s why I decided to run for Congress: It’s past time we elect folks who understand first-hand the challenges everyday people face. And now, I’m up against a Republican-controlled Congress and must make sure we continue building our movement for meaningful, people-first change.
Today, I’m asking for a favor: [**Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help us reach our fundraising goal before our deadline tonight? Every dollar gives us the resources we need to write a new chapter in politics centered in justice, love, and compassion.**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230202.BVXSlK&amount=5&refcode=em20230202-2113&t=43&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)
Thank you for all of your support.
Your Congresswoman loves you,
Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230202?refcode=em20230202-2113-footer&t=44&refcode2=2113_1082990_W3ANwB&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=45&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=46&akid=2113%2E1082990%2EW3ANwB)

name: Pennsylvania Update (via DLCC.org)
body:
We’re less than one week away from special elections in Pennsylvania, fighting for three crucial seats Democrats have to win in order to secure chamber control this year. | | |
---

Our candidates, Joe McAndrew, Abigail Salisbury, and Matt Gergely are up against right-wing, anti-abortion opponents – and an avalanche of GOP money has made these races even _more_ expensive than anticipated. **With your support, we can ensure that we have the resources to fight back and elect Democrats to state legislatures nationwide.** [Can you make a $7 contribution to the DLCC today? Before I go on about Adam, I want to take a few moments to recognize and tell you about the great leadership of California’s iconic Senator Dianne Feinstein. For years, California has had a champion for Democracy in Senator Feinstein. She has fought against the far-right and for working families.
Since her election to the Senate in 1992, Senator Feinstein has achieved a remarkable legislative record, always delivering for California and forcefully honoring her oath to protect and defend. Notable among her achievements is the enactment of the Assault Weapons Ban in 1994, the first of many personal and national security measures in her long career. As Chair of the Intelligence Committee, Senator Feinstein has been a leader in strengthening our national security.
As a top Democrat on the Judiciary Committee, she secured the passage of the Violence Against Women Act and the Respect For Marriage Act, and promoted justice and safety in our communities. She is now again taking the lead on banning assault weapons. **[_Senator Feinstein’s record continues to be one of the finest in the United States Senate._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58180979/390302268/868484585?refcode=20230202_em_fr_b1_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGEwZTk4Yy0zNmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MO4QMaz2K2OmSUvoVQt8B0fjs2Z4Tu_xScRuuacu1gY=)**

clean_body: If we’re going to continue building a better America, we need to equip Democratic candidates nationwide with the tools and resources they need to win elections up and down the ballot. | | Derek -- In just five days, President Biden will deliver his State of the Union address. He’ll highlight all of the progress we have made together over the last two years and the work that lies ahead. If we’re going to continue building a better America, we need to equip Democratic candidates nationwide with the tools and resources they need to win elections up and down the ballot. That starts with renewing your Official 2023 DNC Membership. You haven’t chipped in yet this year, and Democrats are counting on you to step up for the first time ahead of President Biden’s State of the Union address -- and when you do, you’ll receive your very own Official 2023 DNC Membership Card in the mail. Your membership renewal will help our party fight for the agenda that President Biden will lay out in his address -- and will power the work that turns that agenda into reality. Friend,

Too many people get elected to national office and jump right into the partisan battles. Not me.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58183102/390303411/461678200?refcode=em_fr_2023.02.02_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGQwNTBlMS0zYWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HGLpU1UAOJr4_is8BhSfSxE3e93Dbn5n39jFEIb1eqI=)**
In my first speech on the House Floor, I reiterated my commitment to working with anyone and everyone that wants to get good things done for children and families. That means:
* **Capping the cost of insulin** for children at $35 a month
* **Renewing the Child Tax Credit** to help parents keep more money in their pockets
* **Increasing funding for police and firefighters** to keep our neighborhoods safe

I’m working with Democrats and Republicans to deliver for OH-01.

Folks want us to deliver results, and that’s exactly what I’m committed to doing.

Thank you for allowing me to serve!

Greg Landsman

name: Rick Larsen
subject: Explaining the debt ceiling and why you should care
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58184166/390303927/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzk5MTFjZS0zYmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=52mhYX_n9QLk8dzzWZL3GY0Ef-KzgK0vDHAGksUcGt8=&emci=3718331d-9aa2-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=179911ce-3ba3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9494239)
---

| | _Happy Groundhog Day!_ Funny thing — when I think of Groundhog Day, I think of that Bill Murray movie, where he is forced to live the same day over and over and over. Sometimes, Congress can feel that way, too. Especially when the latest crop of extremist Republicans think they have come up with a new way to slash important programs that the American people depend on — but it is the same old thing: the "debt ceiling". This is a really important issue — one that could become a national crisis in a few months. _Here is what you need to know:_ **What is it?** The debt ceiling is the limit, set by law, of the US government's total debt. We run a deficit nearly every year, and so, the debt grows nearly every year. **What will happen if we do not raise it?** _Catastrophe._ The best analogy is that it is like a family's home mortgage. Families borrow money to buy a house. If you do not make the payments, you lose your home. When it comes to the US debt, we have already borrowed the money. We spent it to do (mostly) good things for the American people. We have to make the payments on the debt, or bad things happen. Interest rates and inflation will skyrocket. Unemployment will explode. Social Security, veterans' benefits, and other payments will be delayed. The value of the dollar will collapse. The stock market will crash. Congress can and should debate how much we should spend and what we should spend it on. But we simply _cannot_ default on the debt accrued on the money we have already spent. **Why not just raise the debt limit?** We should. Eventually, I am confident, we will. But some Republicans in Congress want to provoke a crisis. They hope to use this crisis to force steep cuts to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and other critical programs. This is economic hostage-taking. They are threatening the stability of the global economy and every single American family in order to get what they want. President Biden is right: _We are not going to negotiate with economic terrorists._ **That is what this fight is about: Are we going to protect critical programs that help American families? Or are we going to let right-wing extremists get their way?** I know what my answer is. I bet I know what your answer is. _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | | Happy Groundhog Day! Funny thing — when I think of Groundhog Day, I think of that Bill Murray movie, where he is forced to live the same day over and over and over. Sometimes, Congress can feel that way, too. Especially when the latest crop of extremist Republicans think they have come up with a new way to slash important programs that the American people depend on — but it is the same old thing: the "debt ceiling". This is a really important issue — one that could become a national crisis in a few months. Here is what you need to know: What is it? The debt ceiling is the limit, set by law, of the US government's total debt. We run a deficit nearly every year, and so, the debt grows nearly every year. What will happen if we do not raise it? Catastrophe. The best analogy is that it is like a family's home mortgage. Families borrow money to buy a house. If you do not make the payments, you lose your home. When it comes to the US debt, we have already borrowed the money. We spent it to do (mostly) good things for the American people. We have to make the payments on the debt, or bad things happen. Interest rates and inflation will skyrocket. Unemployment will explode. Social Security, veterans' benefits, and other payments will be delayed. The value of the dollar will collapse. The stock market will crash. Congress can and should debate how much we should spend and what we should spend it on. But we simply cannot default on the debt accrued on the money we have already spent. Why not just raise the debt limit? We should. Eventually, I am confident, we will. But some Republicans in Congress want to provoke a crisis. They hope to use this crisis to force steep cuts to Social Security, Medicare, Medicaid, veterans' benefits, and other critical programs. This is economic hostage-taking. They are threatening the stability of the global economy and every single American family in order to get what they want. President Biden is right: We are not going to negotiate with economic terrorists. That is what this fight is about: Are we going to protect critical programs that help American families? Or are we going to let right-wing extremists get their way? I know what my answer is. I bet I know what your answer is. | | Good afternoon. Over the past decade, Democrats have been effectively cede campaigns in rural America, leaving Democrats a narrow path to victory even in the best circumstances. Rural life is rooted in shared values of independence, common sense, tradition, frugality, community, and hard work. Folks in districts like Michigan's First vote on what rings true and personal to them: Can this person be trusted? Are they authentic? We need a united strategy, quality candidates, partnerships among campaigns, and strong field network if we going to restore our reputation as champions of working people, committed to improving their lives, and undaunted by wealth and power. The only way for Democrats to regain traction in rural districts is by running strong campaigns in districts that usually back Republicans. [Help us continue the fight in Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula with a contribution to Dr. Bob Lorinser's Rural Fund.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/c2OOJXMeq/c?w=CRrOeBPblakWxmSeyli4VfWqKkwM5mn8PXYBBBWJc-Q.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6ImRhNzUyZTFkLTllYWQtNDE1My1iMGViLTBlZTA3NDE0N2YwNiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) In our conversations with rural voters, through the simple act of listening, we almost always catch a glimpse of common ground if we focus on values, not parties. It’s not too late to make amends, to rebuild our relationship with the quiet roads of rural America. We have to hit the ground running today and recommit ourselves to the kind of politics that reaches every corner of our country. -Dr. Bob Bob LorinserCandidate for US CongressMichigan's 1st Congressional DistrictNorthern Michigan & the Upper PeninsulaVoteDrBob.com

name: Mike Schmuhl, Indiana Dems
subject: What we are working on in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, I know we send a good number of emails that ask you to invest in the Indiana Democratic Party and our efforts to build up our party infrastructure to elect more Democrats. Thank you for your support and continued commitment to our party. It makes it possible for us to do this work as we strive to create a stronger party, and most importantly, a better Indiana. We don't take your donations for granted -- and we want to share some of the big projects we are working on this year:
* **Focusing on municipal races:** 2023 is not an off year -- it's an election year in Indiana and there are great Hoosier Democrats running for local offices in communities large and small. Tomorrow is the deadline to file to run and we look forward to introducing you to some fresh (and some familiar) faces who will be seeking to lead cities and towns in our state.
* **Expanding technology use:** The State Central Committee recently lowered the cost of Votebuilder for candidates across the state and up and down the ballot. This software allows campaigns to target and reach voters and move more people to vote. Your support of IDP has allowed us to do this.
* **Ramping up year-round organizing:** The State Party has hired regional organizing directors for northern and central Indiana and we are in the final stages of hiring in southern Indiana. These new team members will work with county parties and campaigns to ensure that they have access to information, technology, and best practices in reaching and moving more voters. We are working to instill a culture of year-round engagement that works on voter registration, voter contact, and voter turnout.
* **Delivering consistent in-person training:** Throughout 2023, the State Party will be hosting trainings across the state to give more resources to county parties, candidates for office, and campaign staff and Democratic volunteers. The first major training will be in partnership with the National Democratic Training Institute and you can find more information and even [register by clicking here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58190109/390308693/1982537847?refcode=230202-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkY2JlMzlhMS00MGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ayZI-AM87642mT4bzdPxldYLuL9Kvn8fO6GC2PPYc2k=&emci=50caf8c7-1ca3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=dcbe39a1-40a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=4925535). Don't worry if Indianapolis is too far for you -- we'll be coming to a place near you this year!
* **Investing in local Democratic communities:** Because of your investments, we will be working to deploy more financial support to local parties through digital investments and grant funding. There should not be a monopoly on good ideas -- we want to work with folks around the state who are doing innovative projects to improve our party.

These are just five areas that we have been able to focus on because of your support -- there's a lot more we are working to build, too! Over the last couple of years, we have hired more people, raised more money, and made our organization more efficient. All of this is essential to rebuild our party so we can attract more supporters and voters to elect more Democrats to office. Thank you again for your support as we all work toward a better Indiana for all. Mike Schmuhl
Chairman

|

Fellow Conservative,

To say that the liberals who controlled the federal government for the past two years are desperately grasping on to power is an understatement. Until a few weeks ago, Republicans didn’t have the tools to hold them accountable. Without the power that comes with being in the majority, the best we could hope for was the truth would somehow break through all the noise created by the Left and their allies in the mainstream media.

Now with Republicans in the majority, we’re determined to make government not only function more effectively but to hold those in power accountable for the actions they take -**legal or illegal** - in service of the American people.

Of course, some will say that Republicans are just using our investigative powers to settle old scores. _**That’s wrong**_. We must ensure every American receives fair and equal treatment under the law. Whether you work deep in the federal bureaucracy, or you’re **President of the United States** , the law should be administered as written and apply equally to all.

As one of our top supporters, we know that you have your finger on America’s pulse more than most, so we’re hoping you can provide some insight on a very important question: **[Do you believe the government treats everyone the same under the rule of law, regardless of social position or economic advantages?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=8b95c7db8c4b435486db0de714fc8cf0&_e=suWA0PIsHXDKCCMoNeQipCmR92Y5Vo3MM9hy0r35Js3piHnrxzt0i7tex1QY6Glfe_gSYuEYTGdXWI-ZSaBfa_9QD1J2n8q9m08dzxflY13UBFxSn2M1nKl1j2jTSB94jZQUIk2mB85wYkpuUsGkRxfJLbSNSX_9aUjk2Kie7ptRss2Bwt82NOAOsWWhXQTyCrtYKa5tNkZzmxdHvKqZm5scIz-o22P32vIffAA6JzKfuhzIiXDox5VZf3Eh-h-Z2JugO9N61pUxVHZQMdSo-UtSsN9ywMvGW74aEQ3CFgML4anPwNIMkg7lB9XxqwGFwuDs-GsZPkkdXPtdKekLc6H7fis7NE39lN6HQd_na5tTgLT8l90BG6zWdN3aas5p7qa6Q2vEFICqdlNGQEmpL2OOIEh4OfAJNyMcf4Qedm5mtxBzYZE-XmwV2n2NcA5r)**
