**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

_Rep. Krishnamoorthi and his parents_
---
Peter, I’ll be frank with you:
My childhood wasn’t always easy.
When my parents first arrived in the United States, they faced prejudice and economic hardship.
My family relied on public housing and food assistance when times were tough.
Now, Trump’s Republicans are fighting to destroy the programs that made my story possible.
So when I talk about taking back our Majority from Republicans, it isn’t just about politics.
It’s deeply personal.
[_**Peter, our Democrats have an ambitious agenda. But to protect our progress and take back our Majority from Trump’s Republicans, I need $3,461 from my top supporters. If you believe in me and my campaign, could you chip in $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58190369/390309064/-1810142053?source=20230202_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzQzOTljMS00MGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=apz3x7nNMrmGpzjKR7xU4L5yyMdvuIbls-uF4g34NLY=)
Peter, I’m a proud son of two Indian immigrants.
I’m a proud dad of three wonderful kids.
They’re why I fight tirelessly for commonsense gun safety laws, to protect our planet, and ensure every American has access to a college education.
I want to create a country my children, and future generations, can be proud of.

| | Peter, Big Tech needs to stop being woke, and start being smart. Focus on the real threats --- like the Chinese Communist Party -- and preventing adversaries from accessing critical technologies that are essential to America's national and economic security. But when American companies bend the knee to Xi Jinping and the Chinese Communist Party, it previews what will happen to the rest of our industries if we allow the CCP to control the commanding heights of technology and the economy. The Chinese Communist Party is actively working to steal American technology and intellectual property. We need Big Tech to wake up and protect America's interest. **We must ensure the technologies that shape the future of the global economy belong to the United States—and not the Chinese Communist Party.******_[**_I AGREE >>_**](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=b504488815f4436485b3d20c0ffe36f4&_e=5YL_rJkg0PUMZE2Z1n0rrU4umZjxOaaoa8W5XD8e9s9cxeqyRCbaIYUXs9pXtumSveON6lG3xvn8CpsAZE889ZSzgm1M7BQUCzn0LlNTm0UStn__IxWc-Z-EXGMiS1Q5MVR3GTDEySI-Pqb_WoN_KdOQ11RUtASKOBfOe7LG4YZPv_q_jHk8KffFXZcgRwfiLC4W79KNly959AE-KNajHQdGjr7BiuhQgn0dz_z_jD9UqEESDQyC2Qfcg8v-Rp3cC8nACrZADRwGmQ7IwW_U16CjcC1J2mGem4NVesCHlo1Mj2f0-bqa4buIJCOIHktSilVm8NNGzWXmj6u9oYzrSMQ3YGnhckM2lx0hE8Nwzwo%3D)_ **_[Peter, if you believe Big Tech needs to diversify their partnerships, exclude the CCP, and focus on protecting American security, please sign Mike’s petition.](http://links.mikeforwisconsin.com/u/click?_t=958424c79255456c93ed32354ec81cfd&_m=b504488815f4436485b3d20c0ffe36f4&_e=5YL_rJkg0PUMZE2Z1n0rrU4umZjxOaaoa8W5XD8e9s9cxeqyRCbaIYUXs9pXtumSveON6lG3xvn8CpsAZE889ZSzgm1M7BQUCzn0LlNTm0UStn__IxWc-Z-EXGMiS1Q5MVR3GTDEySI-Pqb_WoN_KdOQ11RUtASKOBfOe7LG4YZPv_q_jHk8KffFXZcgRwfiLC4W79KNly959AE-KNajHdnykYTsxsPx_Adm2bsFtQH_0w_SaV_JCPT7Tp1S8R24Xispb1rJUQ_5usDATk1Jz9PuFQj_3TVhmC2seFu30hjFhnAg__rSbV5Kbs0A8G6e2HpHPEzY3lzFfmQlFaQmR12Z2SYgk8Ap8LjYn4ViGys%3D)_ **

Friend,

It's official. I'm making a special announcement in 13 days.

The survival of America matters. That's why I've never stopped standing for America, and I never will. America is the greatest force for good in human history, and we should never be ashamed to say that.

name: PA Democrats
subject: It’s Black History Month!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
Today we’re shining a spotlight on the Pennsylvania Democratic Party’s very own Chairman Sharif Street! | | |
---
| | Dear Peter, Happy first week of Black History Month! We’ve seen the news headlines over the past year – conservatives trying to bar educators from learning the real history of our country and banning books by Black authors from libraries. It’s imperative that we uplift Black voices this year, and every year. That’s why, this month, we will be highlighting the Black leaders who are making Pennsylvania history. **Today we’re shining a spotlight on the Pennsylvania Democratic Party’s very own Chairman Sharif Street!**
---
---
Since 2017, Senator Street has represented the Third Senatorial District of Philadelphia in the State Senate. As Senator, Senator Street has worked hard to make the lives of Pennsylvanians better! He helped create PENNIE, Pennsylvania’s state-based health insurance exchange and the Urban Agriculture Infrastructure Grant Program.
He’s written legislation to combat climate change, reform Pennsylvania’s criminal justice system, and co-sponsored Pennsylvania’s first bipartisan bill to legalize and regulate adult-use cannabis.
**And in 2022, Senator Street became the first Black and first Muslim Chair of the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. **
Here at PA Dems, we are grateful for his leadership and we can’t wait to see the ways he works to move our Commonwealth forward!
**Make sure to follow Senator Street on**[**Twitter**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58192692/390310465/-2060724160?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIwNDVkYy00MmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmBUfZqoQAkjqC2nokdHCS0kWfsp8XiSKLp0xxgs8jo=&emci=e07c0cbc-14a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=df2045dc-42a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296)**and**[**Facebook**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58192693/390310466/739965875?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIwNDVkYy00MmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmBUfZqoQAkjqC2nokdHCS0kWfsp8XiSKLp0xxgs8jo=&emci=e07c0cbc-14a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=df2045dc-42a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=25616296)**, and stay tuned as we highlight more Black leaders throughout the rest of the month.**
PA Democrats
---
| Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. [**Please click here to donate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58192694/390310467/-1921829696?refcode=email_2022_footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjIwNDVkYy00MmEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FmBUfZqoQAkjqC2nokdHCS0kWfsp8XiSKLp0xxgs8jo=)

---

---

Peter,

As we look to the future of our country, we need strong and proven leaders who are ready to defend our values and protect our country.

That's why I'm making a special announcement on February 15. Before I make my announcement, I am asking for you to join me in this fight for our nation's future. **[Please chip in $25, $50, or even $100 if you can.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281537:6jA98hGNU:m:1:3367311000:751284CDF917ACDEE1C38FC30061C2C0:r "Please chip in
$25, $50, or even $100 if you can.")**

---
| | [Chip in Here](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281537:6jA98hGNU:m:1:3367311000:751284CDF917ACDEE1C38FC30061C2C0:r)
---

I am proud to stand for the ideals that make our nation the greatest force for good in human history. I will never waver in this commitment--not now, not ever. I will always stand for America.

**[Together, we can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62281537:6jA98hGNU:m:1:3367311000:751284CDF917ACDEE1C38FC30061C2C0:r "Together, we
can make sure that America remains the shining city on a hill, a beacon of freedom and opportunity for all.")**

Thank you for your continued support.

---
My very best,

subject: We're defeating MAGA Republicans in all 50 states

body:
Pro-Democracy Democrats are standing with us against Extremism. |
---
| |
---
| Derek -- welcome to**EVERY STATE**! We are the first Pro-Democracy Democratic organization that's dedicated to defeating MAGA Extremism with a 50-state strategy.

Donald Trump has spent years dividing our country by spreading his conspiracies, lies, and bigotry. Now, Extremist Republicans who Trump himself inspired have been elected to Congress and given enormous power from Kevin McCarthy. _They must be defeated._

Thousands of committed Democrats are fighting back with us. For too long, Extremist Republicans have won in districts and states where Democratic candidates didn't have the resources to compete. That ends now! **EVERY STATE** will:
* **Invest resources to strengthen Democratic competitiveness**
* **Counter the power of GOP money in our elections**
* **Expose MAGA Republicans directly to voters**
* **Defeat Trump and his Extremists**
* **Elect strong Democrats**

We hope our mission to defeat Trump and MAGA Extremists will be worthy of your support. After beating him in 2020, we're confident we will do it again -- but this time his enablers like Lauren Boebert, Ted Cruz, and Marjorie Taylor Greene, too -- in all 50 states.
---
| | Thank you, Derek.

_**-EVERY STATE**_

---
| [DONATE TO EVERY STATE](http://secure.actblue.com/donate/everystate-pac&amount=25&refcode=ES_FR_02.02.23_E1_Welcome_F1_S1_non-op_all "DONATE TO EVERY STATE")
---
| | We are the ONLY Democratic PAC fighting Republican Extremism with a 50–state strategy. Our organization routes grassroots resources directly to the districts and states that need it most to compete, win, and unseat Extremist Republicans from Congress. Winning in 2024 is critical to the survival of our Democracy, and we need help from Democrats in every state who recognize the serious threat of Trump's growing Extremist movement.

Our team is working tirelessly to accomplish our mission and rely exclusively on grassroots support from Democrats like you who share our concern.
---
|
---
| _**Derek, if you plan on supporting any Democratic organizations or candidates this year, contributing to EVERY STATE is by far the most effective way to make a real difference.

Our 50-state strategy fighting Republican Extremism will have the greatest positive impact on the make–up of Congress.**_

---
| [Fight Back In Your State](http://secure.actblue.com/donate/everystate-pac&amount=25&refcode=wrap "Fight Back In Your State")
---
| **EVERY STATE**
4315 50th Street NW, Suite 100-7119
Washington, DC 20016
---
| | PAID FOR BY EVERY STATE AND NOT AUTHORIZED
BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---
| This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com

You are receiving this because of your interest in defeating Republican Extremists and electing Democrats across the country. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on our 50-state Democratic agenda. If you believe this message was sent in error, or if you no longer wish to receive these emails, [click here to unsubscribe](https://everystate.us9.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=79c57b22111745f6c03d5e836&id=454c204df0&e=f653f65525&c=9abed490ac).
_© 2023 EVERY STATE. All rights reserved._

name: Fairness Project
subject: Honoring the Black Americans before us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
and building on their victories at the ballot box. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58192829/390311091/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIyNzczNS00NGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9R-cbbDStHN0_NNoAvQ-jlCh-7_RZ0XNa3S6sVIfsHI=&emci=54eece81-3fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ddb27735-44a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team — A new year brings a new election cycle and new campaigns to further our fight for social, racial, and economic justice into 2023 and beyond. As February begins, we commemorate Black History Month — we look back on the legacies of Black leaders who laid the critical groundwork for the progress that we continue to fight for today. This month and always, we honor the Black Americans that came before us. Those that dedicated their lives to progressive movements of the past, present, and future. We celebrate and stand with them in the fight for racial justice. The landmark moments of the Civil Rights Era that hold a special place in history books can feel just like that — history. But while we reflect on these historic moments, it’s important to acknowledge that the fight for equality continues on _**here and now.**_ From widespread voter suppression laws to a desperate need for police reform in America, our fight for social, racial, and economic equality continues — and we’re using the ballot box to make that happen. So as Black History Month begins, we are taking this moment to recommit to our work to bring workers livable wages, expand health care access, guarantee paid leave policies for workers, reform policing, and continue our fight to keep the ballot box accessible to all — _one ballot measure at a time. _ There’s so much work that still must be done, but we believe that together, we can fuel the fight against racial injustice in our country. [_**If you’re with us, we’d love for you to sign our pledge to join us in our fight for progress.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58192830/390311092/524099832?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZGIyNzczNS00NGEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9R-cbbDStHN0_NNoAvQ-jlCh-7_RZ0XNa3S6sVIfsHI=&emci=54eece81-3fa3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=ddb27735-44a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Thanks, friend. — Fairness Project
---

So as Black History Month begins, we are taking this moment to recommit to our work to bring workers livable wages, expand health care access, guarantee paid leave policies for workers, reform policing, and continue our fight to keep the ballot box accessible to all — one ballot measure at a time. There’s so much work that still must be done, but we believe that together, we can fuel the fight against racial injustice in our country. Thanks, friend. — Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project P.O. Box 21337 Washington, DC 20009 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leon=20Benjamin?=
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of Leon Benjamin, Inc
body:
Black History Month is here! | | | |
---
| | |
#### For Immediate Release:
---
|
---
| Leon Benjamin Discusses Black History Month
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: THURSDAY, FEBRUARY 2, 2023**

Waverly Woods
Campaign Manager
_info@Benjamin4Congress.com_
804-352-3348

**Richmond, VA** \- Leon Benjamin wishes the 4th District a happy Black History Month. Leon said in a statement:

“February marks Black History Month in our nation. Let us celebrate and commemorate the life and achievements of Black Americans. We are united under one blood as humans who need one another through love. Because of this love, our society will be great and prosperous for generations.
We must look back on our history and learn from it. No experience for two Black Americans is the same, and we can learn from each’s story. Lena Waithe once said, “The things that make us different, those are our superpowers.” I invite Black Americans across my district to come to the table and discuss the issues facing our community.
We are one people. One nation, under God.”

###

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Be one of the first
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know that we’ve produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our “Constitution 101” course, and I’d like you to have a copy. | | | This sponsored message from Defend The Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd10841e688462cb40e53654f281904&_e=14FIV98AhwRwv0_Yqsm9tYzQEm3XraECXSADd1u_Ocw3Cu-OOykMx6yHROBnlMB39fJQnIgVGnSOSv8V7qZzFgbsUggFJrNg2VnXl6wVqhO0-2axX85O2LqHlafjrJ3_7j0Me47nrmbYiaVq2nZGxopZXGPJnGSQ_16oEazDhZkP36LIfE_pupKm2gpYzUgYJyu7hTLtc0n3rmfkIvC31EG6i2hyrG8mzl_fXqYpAO3fFgat69dH_s6dQOWQz69IveCva2kcaFCZI6e0bGsLYAmVJk4YQSOripuhXtryNxVNfpfNhS7a1bRwS5fWwJyL_Aba9uiGGVjqZ8wY-Hsh0KrdPvPd3cZeyw0M0HBH1fpmhj3Jp93gOtGVeV4bcsfq1bYp0uMKY_V37ViRZYh2cg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd10841e688462cb40e53654f281904&_e=14FIV98AhwRwv0_Yqsm9tYzQEm3XraECXSADd1u_Ocw3Cu-OOykMx6yHROBnlMB39fJQnIgVGnSOSv8V7qZzFgbsUggFJrNg2VnXl6wVqhO0-2axX85O2LqHlafjrJ3_7j0Me47nrmbYiaVq2nZGxopZXGPJnGSQ_16oEazDhZkP36LIfE_pupKm2gpYzUgYJyu7hTLtc0n3rmfkIvC31EG6i2hyrG8mzl_fXqYpAO3fFgat69dH_s6dQOWQz69ItmFmPSbHs8RC5u5u9FsWx3B8gwKEtBFms5-hR8nt7U00rm0NiabD8JhxvppxaVzvFX4Ct4Bzo_qwe3cVjFtaJKNOTK229mcsgTcWpdeAx2eIH8X530cwT13m_cjgiMdRs2HAi95J5BebMhEWCcHggw%3D%3D) I hope you're having a great day so far. Today, I'm writing to let you know that we've produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our "Constitution 101" course, and I'd like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale College's world-renowned faculty. It teaches the original design and purpose of the Constitution, the challenges it faced during the Civil War, and how it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism. It concludes by setting forth how limited government under the Constitution might be revived. "Constitution 101" is modeled after the course that all Hillsdale students are required to take, and this DVD box set is your opportunity to experience it for yourself. I hope you take advantage of this offer, and I have included a secure link for you here: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=bbd10841e688462cb40e53654f281904&_e=14FIV98AhwRwv0_Yqsm9tYzQEm3XraECXSADd1u_Ocw3Cu-OOykMx6yHROBnlMB39fJQnIgVGnSOSv8V7qZzFgbsUggFJrNg2VnXl6wVqhO0-2axX85O2LqHlafjrJ3_7j0Me47nrmbYiaVq2nZGxopZXGPJnGSQ_16oEazDhZkP36LIfE_pupKm2gpYzUgYJyu7hTLtc0n3rmfkIvC31EG6i2hyrG8mzl_fXqYpAO3fFgat69dH_s6dQOWQz69IVTfbFvTHnECfROHPtTlkOlWQrDakej6UZflxMFFf4xGa9pAyRubn0jSTDm7VTNQTL1828e4rVmmAd31LLmp-bzdQsVbZAyhJLvmSC-M61L8TFLYLEWbtOPcdFBMRcs3UPeaSeGODzc995xM1AQgetQ%3D%3D) As you know, Hillsdale takes no government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. So, your support is essential to expanding our national educational outreach efforts, like free online courses, designed to restore and defend liberty. As I mentioned above, supplies of the new "Constitution 101" DVD box set are limited, so I hope you'll reserve your copy today. Sincerely, Bill Gray Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth--Defending Liberty since 1844

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The last remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58193395/390312904/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE5ZGUxNi00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjvc9yjLiiWO0R9esZzamnAxMiyWgeUayHuIrFR8em8=&emci=99f5df92-81a1-ed11-994c-00224832eb73&emdi=ea19de16-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43566853)

| | I’m up for re-election in 2024 Peter, and as one of just three Senate Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. _(There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me.)_

NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than last year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.

In fact, 2023 has only just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me.

**[_Peter, this is going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and the Democratic Party of Georgia as we begin the new year to protect our hard-won Senate majority?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58193396/390312905/-843865763?refcode=20230202.2_ShB_2C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE5ZGUxNi00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjvc9yjLiiWO0R9esZzamnAxMiyWgeUayHuIrFR8em8=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.

I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.

Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about Peter. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do -- whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips -- your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.

**[_I need you in this fight, too. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider splitting our average online contribution of $26 -- or whatever amount makes the most sense for you._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58193397/390312906/-843865763?refcode=20230202.2_ShB_2C&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE5ZGUxNi00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kjvc9yjLiiWO0R9esZzamnAxMiyWgeUayHuIrFR8em8=)**

With gratitude,

Sherrod

name: The EMILY's List Team
subject: 🥳 Our founder turns 76 today, Peter!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
|
---
| | 🎂 Happy Birthday, Ellen! 🎂 [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58193427/390313137/-705510546?sourceid=1048574&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRkMmE4Ny00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7ptkTeQ6agH6ZSkueOvNkD6iEKlT1esTSvljGTHdW0=&emci=b63c5780-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=00dd2a87-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58193428/390313138/-705510546?sourceid=1048574&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRkMmE4Ny00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7ptkTeQ6agH6ZSkueOvNkD6iEKlT1esTSvljGTHdW0=&emci=b63c5780-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=00dd2a87-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

**EMILY's List founder and visionary Ellen R. Malcolm turns 76 today!** Few women have done more to open the doors for Democratic pro-choice women candidates in the last four decades than Ellen.

_None_ of the vital work we do every day for Democratic pro-choice women would be possible without Ellen's vision, dedication, and guts. What began in 1985 — just Ellen and a group of friends writing letters and raising what they could for women candidates — has become the powerhouse organization we know today as EMILY's List.

**[So today, we're asking humbly: Will you donate today, in Ellen's honor, to help elect more exceptional women in 2023 and 2024?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58193435/390313145/-705510546?sourceid=1048574&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRkMmE4Ny00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7ptkTeQ6agH6ZSkueOvNkD6iEKlT1esTSvljGTHdW0=&emci=b63c5780-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=00dd2a87-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** As we begin the new month and the new cycle, our mission to help elect our pro-choice candidates is as strong as ever — because of leaders like Ellen and supporters like you, Peter.

**We can't take for granted how far women in politics have come,_and how fast_.** The year Ellen founded EMILY's List, no Democratic woman had ever been elected to the Senate in her own right. There were only 12 Democratic women serving in the House. Only eight women had ever been governors.

Year by year, election by election, Ellen R. Malcolm and EMILY's List helped change _all of that_ by focusing on community building and investing _early and powerfully_ in women candidates. **Today, EMILY's List is the largest and the best resource for Democratic pro-choice women candidates at _every_ level of government.**

Our millions-strong community is so fortunate to have Ellen as our founder, our first president, and our chair emerita today. And we have to make _certain_ that her life's work — to transform the face of political power in America by electing Democratic pro-choice women — will flourish for many years to come.

**Help celebrate Ellen's 76th birthday today, Peter! Donate in our founder's honor and help elect the next wave of Democratic pro-choice women leaders:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Elect-Women-This-February](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58193436/390313146/-705510546?sourceid=1048574&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGRkMmE4Ny00NWEzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J7ptkTeQ6agH6ZSkueOvNkD6iEKlT1esTSvljGTHdW0=&emci=b63c5780-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=00dd2a87-45a3-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

clean_body: | | | 🎂 Happy Birthday, Ellen! 🎂 Peter, EMILY's List founder and visionary Ellen R. Malcolm turns 76 today! Few women have done more to open the doors for Democratic pro-choice women candidates in the last four decades than Ellen. None of the vital work we do every day for Democratic pro-choice women would be possible without Ellen's vision, dedication, and guts. What began in 1985 — just Ellen and a group of friends writing letters and raising what they could for women candidates — has become the powerhouse organization we know today as EMILY's List. As we begin the new month and the new cycle, our mission to help elect our pro-choice candidates is as strong as ever — because of leaders like Ellen and supporters like you, Peter. We can't take for granted how far women in politics have come,and how fast. The year Ellen founded EMILY's List, no Democratic woman had ever been elected to the Senate in her own right. There were only 12 Democratic women serving in the House. Only eight women had ever been governors. Year by year, election by election, Ellen R. Malcolm and EMILY's List helped change all of that by focusing on community building and investing early and powerfully in women candidates. Today, EMILY's List is the largest and the best resource for Democratic pro-choice women candidates at every level of government. Our millions-strong community is so fortunate to have Ellen as our founder, our first president, and our chair emerita today. And we have to make certain that her life's work — to transform the face of political power in America by electing Democratic pro-choice women — will flourish for many years to come. Help celebrate Ellen's 76th birthday today, Peter! Donate in our founder's honor and help elect the next wave of Democratic pro-choice women leaders: Thank you — and happy birthday, Ellen! — the EMILY's List team | ---|---|--- EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILY's List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Angesom Teklu
subject: I was kidnapped and tortured because I wrote about democracy
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cf2894b17fd54accb0dc6feea510f4b3&_e=q6DaLqF72tpKRPD9u240xgEsPTXB1UjERzvSnz-gVlFM-5j8iHplreQ0Yu3n9vNIA6qpMVjVEfJ4wT4PmJMSjvgA7xQ21CtDrpDrBstJFQcpPO0u0wz93CfueuMEp8uHsyzgmneb-f2gqzD2011o8VH6_XQ35hJ6QEX1ZzTspOZblqWmunh9ub0mF3HqCA74H4Iaxww8mc4JpmpHPOJ5zy55J8CmbN5SQQgy_buMw0h-bI-bZfNAuSdECtN7_-8_AvR6gQXg3k7fcz6eY-yxmA%3D%3D)
Friend,

You hear very little about Eritrea in the United States. I doubt most high school students could find it on a map.

But there is a lesson they could learn from hearing about it.

I grew up in Eritrea, a country that was once a beacon of African democracy but is now one of the world's most oppressive and authoritarian countries.

I had to flee my country, but that hasn’t stopped me from sharing my story.

That’s why I want to share my story through the Dissident Project. But I can’t do it without your help, Friend.

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to chip in just $25 each to support bringing speakers like me to high schools around the country. Click here to send $25, $50, or any amount >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cf2894b17fd54accb0dc6feea510f4b3&_e=q6DaLqF72tpKRPD9u240xgEsPTXB1UjERzvSnz-gVlFM-5j8iHplreQ0Yu3n9vNIA6qpMVjVEfJ4wT4PmJMSjvgA7xQ21CtDrpDrBstJFQeEOgAhK2xEa5j6Yc9ieuVsLKCRFtBUm-IK6qEZxQC_NtgAMU6v0LaQm90pmS-BcaEhG0MkkuR2IcF1l3_OP86N37kxQYl7Et_urnp4j8AVhSdwfaxHI1rrnK48y4PIy-xPCqAsqys8lPi7JSSFWRqnz77S-pbMPogNxfVUTsX2pw%3D%3D)

Young Voice’s **Dissident Project** brings survivors of tyrannical socialist countries to high schools around the United States to tell their stories.

We are countering the mainstream narratives about how peaceful and successful socialism can be. Too many young people are taught to believe the United States is an evil, oppressive country and that capitalism is a failure.

But I witnessed firsthand how a government can gradually take control of every aspect of citizens' lives.

**To fight back, I had to get involved in underground pro-democracy activism and citizen journalism in Eritrea, where the private press is prohibited. **

I used my journalism and new media training from the Aileen Getty School of Citizen Journalism to write news articles, journals, opinion pieces, and analyses on freedom-related issues.

But my activism wasn’t ignored by the authoritarians in charge.

They only _**suspected**_ me of engaging in those activities, but I was _literally kidnapped_.

I was detained, tortured, and forced to leave the country.

But that hasn't stopped me. I'm tired of being silent.

That’s why I want, no **need** , to share my story, Friend.

[_**Can you chip in $25 and support the Dissident Project?**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cf2894b17fd54accb0dc6feea510f4b3&_e=q6DaLqF72tpKRPD9u240xgEsPTXB1UjERzvSnz-gVlFM-5j8iHplreQ0Yu3n9vNIA6qpMVjVEfJ4wT4PmJMSjvgA7xQ21CtDrpDrBstJFQcbKG_vbec2DoG78osggBK-sMOzaD06eorQMyHNJQVebozusgo-fRE3BIyNlp-t86hlwiNvIz6sYmOoFHl7R7yrkONhxJ_RYXLBkm7QTqYS6zAIROr--gQ8PgdvYHtB4YmIo4K-NBkiBsHbgnTypTtxtFQnb_EHLlnemd5ke4vWIw%3D%3D)

With the Dissdent Project, I can continue to speak out about my experiences dealing with authoritarianism and **advocate for freedom**.

High school students around the country are eager to learn more about my experience and those of the other survivors of authoritarian socialism.

But like I said before, we can’t do this alone.

**Click below to help educate high school students on the dangers of socialism.**
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cf2894b17fd54accb0dc6feea510f4b3&_e=q6DaLqF72tpKRPD9u240xgEsPTXB1UjERzvSnz-gVlFM-5j8iHplreQ0Yu3n9vNIA6qpMVjVEfJ4wT4PmJMSjt5LP8mTslzq6i69YV69aR4sslYiRt6XUKTSgbKtYYC9eZrrdqtAj0DfO5Om9_J0tEXAgf9grrgo7zZz_omNr7IwPwQL4N1IgzhteC7W82Otu5oJEeMZTUr_4y5o9_p3-ZL3Q0ztq2463yCZiJpVYAIWUHGG_KlveuLttWpKhbMdGW5h4YhhgaWu9J5k9jsL-w%3D%3D)

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: House Foreign Affairs Committee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230202-3855-header&t=1&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)
Kevin McCarthy kept his word.
**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee does absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
[Will you split a contribution — of $6 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Alexandria’s so that we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-ilhan-email-20230202.g8WNXl&refcode=em20230202-3855-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)
**[Contribute $6](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-ilhan-email-20230202.g8WNXl&refcode=em20230202-3855-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[Contribute](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-ilhan-email-20230202.g8WNXl&refcode=em20230202-3855-P&amounts=6%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-ilhan-email-20230202?refcode=em20230202-3855-P&t=23&refcode2=3855_2526796_a794-Z&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230202-3855-P&t=24&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=3855%2E2526796%2Ea794-Z)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

His name is John D. Andries...and he was a crew chief in the elite, highly selective U.S. Marine aviation squadron for Marine One, the helicopter used by U.S. Presidents.

You've seen Marine One on TV countless times, I'm sure.

If you saw Marine One picking up or dropping off President George W. Bush, you may have seen John hard at work.

**But John, now an honorably discharged and disabled U.S. Marine, is going to federal prison for one year.**

Did John attack the U.S. Capitol Police on January 6, 2021? No.

Did he lash out violently or endanger anyone? No.

Did he break or destroy anything? No.

_Even liberal CNN admits he wasn 't charged with any violent crimes!_

John entered the Capitol Building through a window broken by someone else. He walked into the Capitol Building and into the chamber of the House of Representatives...that's it.

His alleged crime is called "obstruction of an official proceeding."

But as you recall, Antifa members rioted and committed violent assaults...Black Lives Matter members rioted, burned buildings to the ground, and terrorized whole cities...but they didn't even get arrested!

It sickens me that an honorable man like John Andries, who also suffers from multiple sclerosis, is doing hard time.

John could get beaten, extorted, abused, and even killed behind bars.

In America! IN OUR COUNTRY!

That's why I ask you to stand with me before it's too late.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Dear Patriot, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6af6eaeb779456495bed14bdde68ba4&_e=mBp5WaVFuKnQc6XKW1vrDhbWgMo_-fXyR-W4W3CxZL-aaHVmzkXCui5gd8rhFS9b9wNw37fWoQLLFjsWMkd-2kZNf3F_AGri3dyMf2UKv1JKINIKXeW8mL43NOztAybOS7K6hRxCTDDPl2TyW742R9Jm06D2SwcarQZR1e3l3VFmS6QYPG_qLA3NRlYTQRyxv4AyAP9lkLOmgGkxKRQapnhNRa1bxuFhmhQBUeCypJ-unqIqC3tTpcL4aXTNnvWt0MCLkeOwIJ1uROlwTG5RIah63_syHnWeYIGX0RmduxOG-ad5SK1lZzBYsvVrYAHLvcajzeOwtgQAQDRrBL0uDQ%3D%3D)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

**So please give what you can right away.**[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b6af6eaeb779456495bed14bdde68ba4&_e=mBp5WaVFuKnQc6XKW1vrDhbWgMo_-fXyR-W4W3CxZL-aaHVmzkXCui5gd8rhFS9b9wNw37fWoQLLFjsWMkd-2kZNf3F_AGri3dyMf2UKv1JKINIKXeW8mL43NOztAybOS7K6hRxCTDDPl2TyW742R9Jm06D2SwcarQZR1e3l3VFmS6QYPG_qLA3NRlYTQRyx4YShB7fFRxeciJqNzjl3_9_R6d0yZtaOBDQbDeC4B5ySlOKSmNwbIsazWuywoZBVa9Z8pMvgeQVqYGnhLca4Q2pAmSv06AosdjyeXUY2cdEbV_75h3ixqxDs7qklh3pE_SJ9ZBxveqJfq_V3dwcD8g%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | Peter, We’re proud to announce our endorsement of Brandon Johnson for Chicago Mayor! As a public school teacher, a union organizer, a county commissioner, and a father raising a family on the West Side of Chicago, Brandon is prepared to tackle the city’s most pressing issues with compassion, commitment, and creativity. Brandon can win, Peter, but with the primary election just weeks away, he needs our support to deliver a better, safer, more equitable city for all Chicagoans. Brandon is a battle-tested leader committed to advancing economic justice and championing working families. If elected, Brandon will hold police accountable and invest in community-based interventions that de-escalate conflict, reduce violence, and make our neighborhoods safer. He’ll fight to make sure every Chicagoan has access to affordable housing. And he’ll make sure that public schools have the resources they need to prepare students for success. On the other hand, Mayor Lightfoot has consistently put the wants of the powerful over the needs of the people. She’s fought against the teacher’s union, defended employing a “Proud Boy” cop who lied about his ties to the white supremacist group, and broken her promise to fight homelessness by taxing the city’s biggest real estate groups. In solidarity, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Next Tuesday will determine the PA House’s majority and priorities.

| Our work here is just getting started, fellow activist.

Every election, we are setting new goals to empower the voices of our Commonwealth’s historically disenfranchised communities of immigrants, youth, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color. With your support, we will continue to reach higher and engage with more people than ever before. **Just take a look at what we were able to do last year:** ✓ Collected 20,000 voter registration forms across PA
✓ Knocked on more than 21,000 doors for the midterm elections
✓ Called more than 2,000 registrants
✓ Mailed more than 16,000 voter encouragement letters
✓ Held more than 50 events to connect with communities **[We can’t stop now, fellow activist. With more elections coming up and the attacks on our rights continuing, we need your help to register and engage voters all throughout 2023. clean_body: Next Tuesday will determine the PA House’s majority and priorities. = | Our work here is just getting started, fellow activist. Every election, we are setting new goals to empower the voices of our Commonwealth’s historically disenfranchised communities of immigrants, youth, Black, Indigenous, and other people of color. With your support, we will continue to reach higher and engage with more people than ever before. Just take a look at what we were able to do last year: ✓ Collected 20,000 voter registration forms across PA ✓ Knocked on more than 21,000 doors for the midterm elections ✓ Called more than 2,000 registrants ✓ Mailed more than 16,000 voter encouragement letters ✓ Held more than 50 events to connect with communities = = Right now, we are empowering our communities to make their voices heard in the upcoming Special Elections that will determine the majority and priorities of the PA House of Representatives. Here are our goals: ☐ Knock on 8,000 doors ☐ Engage in one-on-one conversations with our community members ☐ Mobilize as many voters as possible before the 2/7 Special Elections ☐ Educate voters on the ways they can vote, and the importance of their vote = = = = As you can see, we've already gotten to work on these goals, including in Clairton and McKeesport of House District 35. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Enid Santiago Director of Organizing The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : Special Elections happening 2/7/2023 for three PA House districts in Allegheny Co only, unless otherwise determined: HD32, HD34, HD35 Municipal Primary: May 16, 2023 Last day to =: May 1, 2023 Last day to =: May 9, 2023 Municipal Election: November 7, 2023 Last day to =: October 23, 2023 Last day to =: October 31, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project __

Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXZaER7srulYCyMeeZJbTauI22whlCnOVTZMAF3GUv0xc99HsXJlKgzSY1nJEJwoJVYLQ07dwC3hKp1t_aG75t4twxTcoDA5IA3TAfgFCHCoKG2zLK6zrg2XJR_aHnXb2G0zZSDQGt1XZssgwfoy-1QlGpQKfVjDNgR2ZxYo6ZdlB)

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXevb1Pk6kdkEMFJiPzysWBq9RY5OqaGidw_A13DRsmSoD4Bf_RFQ0L6XAj5zASwE_LIXoLRmYM937LTCsf_1j9RcYJVu1Zl_42oMiTknJ5I6lo3EQtWZ5po090ixUu8SfnQafDB1FawOzj69NHz6sEfGePW3S9br40hbyGYb5SUM)

_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,
_with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXRmRLBHkpN5siqDZdUO9HmdR7kpbEDghIddPXpgvoPRhuE_KU7tK9lkrTK9eWfzyuM4_qV5CH2mIO-xrmbTcfFN_hkFIo-MnubA0YhdgUaiXrWhhuBvZy8zcNI3cwsna6JqchCtojP4pOAf3IdYWNL4LmC_My0AOdCDYy96Q0ER1)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXS7hFg8EZ-RdzkqOBEnwSITJyhN8M37PyHwKiUYVeaaF15hsa_7wE-XozKOctW7I5EFwqwnxzGUG-nT_hb_CoCtlSBQDyb41g_XnVuVBWsBblZ0S155z0WPqf38yXS0kyXeYpfHPNlxb433iyzCUdlxTIUvWuFzJHDtcHkx-X0F4)

I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXacLbJ9BpEaMVuex8OormZ58Clkurl1uftSsyaW9LaAc8e0F-7Vf1Ukkiuj8f0Ws6A-K3poT86n_WwSIK5EiNkoqwooz3pctSZ6Sn7UeCTCuoipNY-TB7zPVxODrP3ajypwxTLtYFtFlK5Nqo4XEwBEZJRVp54NIgSEFCXeNX7Yd) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXZaKPP8sea9r28IJ7NHpaDUZ2T0MD9tw72mUg96ki22713nSkaPYwHspgZURxFvqd8zAAgYtCCb0rV6RCjZ9vuxQII41sU9naDMsdk6EDnHm1tBUCaEv8WBwFEJ6hUn7hcF0v8Cb-elk71CdlDdakY0f9U3TC78qdqaTeOWh1lzh)

All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=578d70d1aedd44d587f81bbd4cb9da81&_e=1Og5qqZR1Fm0i7AhjCv8i1I02bj5kOPVwkVJcooZaoEQghWetBLoI2gAGed6k7b69QQFws2T8oDpWgtOlA-iDdiBHjJ7Nyez0Ouepj6Ww4m9tUiCll4JWm7tEC_CudTr_B6rqbmCKG8DUMuPT5vtXUdidcr0CWjvt5lxI2kB_CVBl_WbaeNK5j-7ZKPKnFBwjBksG94rSnsPCH2CuxRaw_Fu5HMAsaLVd_KzwP_Fbbs3p-S6125HW6JMXBQdJbhnzHkao1TqT54g5fx2MUd1Atb9jWeT0-ZEI3beuuAqybnh3s2bxeoZhxo3lHZejTqX) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!

It is an honor and a privilege to endorse my good friend and colleague Jim Banks for Indiana’s open U.S. Senate seat.
[](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=f404aa68946946968731d8d0d196db6a&_e=pURgS3owQvxUfhGG9yfaqDbDNKF9Ek4sLTMp6MfaBgNsWD6a4dwjgs8azvW0amZ4HYNQVIB8TmTe9dvwALqhRqqYc8A7sul_QmHFahHwskYAXdP-oMRZwfd3P703wJxB4fy32yWG7rRwvTL_bEeXcH6PzmKbLc3UH-4ZW1kecrIxu6ug2yflGUyg8f1Ad0FjZ_hxxBXS7KwH6PdCJCV3PvLdM1dt1AqyTd02X7jUWODao7HVENMjRhXqxPhoGI6eckOA7aYdC7D8EOEghT332psrXrnOPbsuJ1LEJ9rUUYchFSTl6TeMzJUaWJ7lkG7fQx7v1YyYLWxUJmiTV6W2Oy4aXDAbkTop1uzq4nF_TJMS45JAkAjnAWebrLpjzbsLbyoN6mDLPFbEDFeSDiGHHDKpEaJSqeDGtpMaVsiZrWfC9HWtaWSKB9RiJ-QwFprFSTsnkSjKKBH59MnrDWFFrey6Iti31Sn5J4S5NM8_5IllQkY1IvnrUrECNHq4yo8R4mQfGa42R6rVeM35RJRGRfLdRiaTcgBJ11ySe_Po-KM%3D)
Jim Banks is the type of conservative leader we need in the U.S. Senate: a principled fighter committed to reining in wasteful spending, defending religious freedom, and strengthening our military to meet the challenges of the 21st century.

**Here is why you should support Jim Banks:**
* He will **FIGHT** to secure our Southern Border
* He will **FIGHT** to protect the unborn
* He will **FIGHT** to keep boys out of girls' sports
* He will **FIGHT** to prioritize national defense
* He will **FIGHT** to be your voice in Washington, D.C.

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: A life-altering decision
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn0w6eMOCgbfshbdbEOkGA3Ye2w3G9RlVGLsaTby3RdYcfrqvUl13KTBeYdU263Q1-MMVbA-6VmAgMiWx36Q-Ki1NhkttG_0tUqpGko9CeXZB4eWGXac-av5bIYMUkBIJrgefg7OGa3S17xoR-3R4jLgg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn0skVUVAOZQ_GT6-lhTYCJeNxAblQAQxKqmidNDUVy1OkCx00ivF5S5oP8nGEzNU4qdLQWQuYud2EW3eiZubW0gYs1a28IvxHMF5Vyt5pc4p5-4g_LnVIsq4rcPk7riIsuH8CJRQI2DYXHD62Rxy9Ymw%3D%3D)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn0OKyXXGiY17J5WdtEMmV2ck6ftRwv40d6vHY24vGWgGcwcVgSXUHPhQwYrROXC9pjOi53c6xsUcOwyNjVR4tUtmjweDqiC_7AZ7s-RkbqroctJf01CKqrYwm9LYK8iBPdH_Y4QImBUPPe69VQ10fYkg%3D%3D) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn050zgZ2U_acQY085lw4zfN1trV0GyssVkGyL9ts_a1yWCymw6LVa7Yy9WMUzea3FLirkIHCwJJht_e2FrQVDPs7lA3ABI9po-xPC9zeiG5a5f_1_5xzyEmuV1xTJ4NmBR64uxxdrUVehLL618LDZxog%3D%3D) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn0VxQujdvI8JJOKyBxZaWevp_WpUHLrAHxPYlwWr8UdynPef8wtCZDaxSdPwb_cP6MbzoSgn9Y-gbK3uU4Oar7kjQdoyqK7t7YnfKCbYPlHOelwswwmivztSdEJ5MFTpGm1MwaWjiwMmeAR4cW84C6qw%3D%3D)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn017NGBrIl-mU1DObobRJj-Lcl45nNCeBrvS7lBsqpelNCDw153PnWywtVMi0tbxWdXYIFlTigq25rNuz8KpVUXAWYftymdE9Sh7s6JYCiOQhaxwyJFlkjhgwX5ZVzBNIwEFZzG64CHX_jr_T2GuRlRw%3D%3D) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c79526d326d6424281def9318cbd909d&_e=JSwHhclKpSAmrWlqYBVxYJjBgBX4b4cBq30-wPhsRtbfHkpyFSqRhlwV-i4LFuBgWEjOSWmo753DuJiEYLk0UCgCui0IFHc2KaWUVeV0htbHXYQChy3GTZGKhMmdpcGQBpRlx037OtDv_Oi1JDI0Z06O0HUEJ9313uG5eBclJSXoBT4nHGM8Ny6aPUA8PVb7nYTqcw2jjpa_SLEYvDxsjw_FRrfOsdbiQwBNwUBMWxYXH_dGgQdSl0DvL13UmNn0YB3uSG9_mhhKXGNMMGo-RILuYW0WmwdtGQxrBw7PBJZ-_G7JNOCKUEG78YRNUgm5Wo7r9mPnt-PvA-lt0P4c_CeX7-QMHH78VQe8QrpJfiDA6ioyiuYqLRY0DSg1POfANfph7iymEcUmVIQGauilww%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria." | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?" This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Honoring the Civil Rights & Environmental Justice Legacies of Black Leaders Through Action
body:
We can't have a healthy environment without a healthy democracy. |
---

** **
| **
HONORING THE CIVIL RIGHTS & ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE LEGACIES OF BLACK LEADERS THROUGH ACTION **
As we celebrate Black History Month, LCV honors the pioneers in the environmental justice movement, including civil rights icons Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and the late Congressman John Lewis.

Dr. King and Congressman Lewis recognized that many of the struggles we face as a nation, including racial inequity, poverty, politics, health, and human rights, are inexorably linked. Their activism set the stage for early environmental justice legislation, including the Clean Air Act and Clean Water Act, and they built a movement to pass the Voting Rights Act of 1965 **(VRA)** to ensure that Black communities had equal opportunity to build lasting political power for their communities.

In 1965, the VRA significantly expanded access to the ballot box, and for decades defended against racially discriminatory and illegal voter suppression. Today, LCV members, activists, volunteers, and dedicated supporters like you continue to work to build a more just and equitable democracy that is responsive to all people and their will to protect the planet -- because the sad truth is that equality, voting rights, and the environmental health and well being of communities across this nation are still at risk.

In 2013, the U.S. Supreme Court gutted one of the VRA's main protections for voters of color, in particular Black voters who reside in nine states where racial discrimination in voting was particularly egregious. In 2021, the Court weakened the VRA's other main protection, making it harder for people of color to vote and to challenge racist voting laws and practices.

This spring, the Court will issue its ruling in _Merrill v. Milligan_ , a key case that could weaken the VRA even further. The Court is poised to sign off on an egregious racial gerrymander that will disenfranchise Black voters in Alabama, a blatant violation of the VRA and a return to the discriminatory practices that civil rights activists have long fought against.

_**" Injustice anywhere is a threat to justice everywhere. We are caught in an inescapable network of mutuality, tied in a single garment of destiny. Whatever affects one directly, affects all indirectly."**_
-- Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.

**Voting rights are interwoven with climate and environmental issues**. Congressman Lewis understood the intersectionality of climate change, racial justice, and equity. In 1992, Rep. Lewis introduced the Environmental Justice Act, the first piece of legislation dedicated to abolishing racial disparities in how environmental protection was applied.

Today, LCV and our supporters work to advance Dr. King's and Congressman Lewis' legacies by continuing to fight against the intertwined threats to our democracy and our environment. LCV's Democracy For All program has worked to increase participation in our democracy and combat systemically racist barriers to the electoral process through policy advocacy and a multi-faceted civic engagement program.

We help register people to vote, support people in making voting plans, encourage voters to utilize mail-in voting and early voting, and recruit election workers to ensure free and fair elections. We also advocate for legislation, ballot measures, pro-democracy judges, and local election administrative policies designed to enhance the voting rights and fair representation for all people in our country, regardless of their race or zip code.

**We can 't have a healthy environment without a healthy democracy.** To achieve both, we must ensure that voters who historically and systemically face the greatest barriers to the ballot box can engage at every level of our democracy -- especially communities of color, communities with low wealth, immigrants, youth and elderly communities, and people with disabilities, who are also the communities most likely to bear the burden of impacts from the climate crisis and environmental injustice.

LCV will continue to organize and mobilize for policies that advance a safe, healthy, equitable and just environment and democracy for all. To do that, we need supporters like you to take action.

As we celebrate Black History Month, let us be inspired by the civil rights and environmental justice great leaders who came before us, and **let us honor their legacies through action** to advance the world that they dreamed of and fiercely advocated for.

_**" The vote is the most powerful nonviolent change agent you have in a democratic society. You must use it because it is not guaranteed. You can lose it."**_
-- John R. Lewis, Congressman & Civil Rights Leader
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9153402&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDA1NzE4MAS2&spReportId=MTY4MDA1NzE4MAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9153402&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDA1NzE4MAS2&spReportId=MTY4MDA1NzE4MAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

Peter,

Growing up in the Central Valley, raised by a single mother who often worked long hours to make ends meet, I know what hard work looks like and what it means. It means never giving up – and always giving back to those who need it the most.

That's why, as a husband, a father of two, and a small business owner, I've worked tirelessly to support my family, give back to my community, and level the playing field to create more pathways of opportunity for _everyone_ here in the Central Valley. But I know I can do more. That's why I'm continuing my fight to represent California's 13th and bring real representation to the Central Valley and I want you right by my side once again, Peter.

**[Flipping this district from red to blue isn't just an opportunity for Democrats, it's a necessity to save our democracy. Will you join me in the fight to flip the district in Kevin McCarthy’s backyard and reclaim the Democratic House Majority in 2024? Become a founding member of my campaign by chipping in $5 or more.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195144/390320315/749828954?refcode=em23_230202_launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVmZGM5Zi01M2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_STyWFFcLZsEimHcCCRRbH5y54mPF09EVHm1i-HnS0M=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195147/390320325/749828954?refcode=em23_230202_launch&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVmZGM5Zi01M2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_STyWFFcLZsEimHcCCRRbH5y54mPF09EVHm1i-HnS0M=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195150/390320328/749828954?refcode=em23_230202_launch&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVmZGM5Zi01M2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_STyWFFcLZsEimHcCCRRbH5y54mPF09EVHm1i-HnS0M=)

In the short time since Kevin McCarthy was elected as Speaker of the House, we've seen nothing but utter dysfunction from the Republican Majority. No attempts to address the growing income inequality and zero awareness of how important access to quality and **safe** education is for the families of the Central Valley – and the rest of the country.

Instead, we've seen McCarthy and his party implement plans to defund women's health clinics across the country, legislation to dismantle the IRS, and a regressive **30% sales tax to protect his rich friends and bankrupt our nation.**

Our district deserves better, it deserves a representative who knows its people and their struggles and that's exactly why I'm running to flip California's 13th from red to blue, _right_ in Kevin's backyard.

**[Peter, I want you right by my side, because you and I both know Kevin and his extreme Republican allies don't represent the valley and its interests. They only represent themselves and their special interest donors. So if you can, pitch in $5, or any amount you're able, to support this grassroots campaign, and together we'll finally flip this district blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58195163/390320341/749828954?refcode=em23_230202_launch&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGVmZGM5Zi01M2EzLWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_STyWFFcLZsEimHcCCRRbH5y54mPF09EVHm1i-HnS0M=)**

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.
body:
#
Kevin McCarthy kept his word, Peter.
**After 4 proud years of service, I was just removed from the House Foreign Affairs Committee.**
I want to be perfectly clear: This political stunt is a personal one — the result of years of xenophobic, Islamophobic, and racist attacks that started the moment I was elected.
The far-right have spent millions of dollars in campaign ads against our movement stoking fear and division, and a constant stream of hateful and violent rhetoric has led to hundreds of death threats against me and my family.
Now, in their latest move, they've attempted to silence my voice and begin undoing the incredible progress our movement has helped make both at home and abroad.
I'm here to tell you that's not going to happen.
**My commitment to justice for all people across the globe — no matter their race, religion, nationality, or anything else — does not begin or end with a committee assignment.**
The simple truth is that McCarthy's actions to remove me from the Foreign Affairs Committee do absolutely nothing to address the issues our constituents deal with at home, or to promote the well-being of people around the world.
What it does is further enable his party's hatred and corruption, and promote fear and violence against Somali-Americans, Muslims, immigrants, and anyone else who shares my identity all across the country.
We already know that these attacks are just beginning, which is why it's so important that our progressive movement stays united, and is ready and able to fight back. So please:
[**Will you split a contribution — of $3 or any amount you can — between our campaign and Justice Democrats so we have the resources required to stand up to Kevin McCarthy and his far-right Republican allies? I would not ask if your support were not so important to our success.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126103?refcode=em20230202-27362&t=1&akid=27362%2E1203867%2E_ZguhQ)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126103?refcode=em20230202-27362&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=27362%2E1203867%2E_ZguhQ)**
Nobody — not Kevin McCarthy, not the Republican Party, not the billionaires who fund them — will ever stop me in my fight for a more equitable, just, and peaceful world.
From tirelessly advocating for policies like a Green New Deal and Medicare for All at home, to standing up against violence and injustice worldwide, I promise that nothing will stand in the way of me doing what the people of Minnesota's 5th district elected me to do.
Thank you, as always, for being a part of our fight.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=21&akid=27362%2E1203867%2E_ZguhQ) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=22&akid=27362%2E1203867%2E_ZguhQ) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230202-27362-footer&t=23&refcode2=27362_1203867__ZguhQ&akid=27362%2E1203867%2E_ZguhQ)**
---

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Because of Margaret, Cheryl, and Aaron
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
Hi Peter, I just wanted to reach out and personally thank you. When my team and I met last week to go over our fundraising numbers for January, I have to admit that I was a little worried. Now that our Senate seat is considered in-cycle, hitting every goal is important — and we had a bit of a gap to overcome. When we ask for your help, especially around a deadline, we really hope that folks like you will step up and chip in where you can. **And this team certainly delivered for us.** Because of Margaret in Green Bay, Cheryl in Shorewood, Aaron in Beloit, and so many others, we reached our first end-of-month goal of 2023! I’m so grateful for the support I have from this team. clean_body: Take a few seconds to send a short note President Biden’s way! | | Derek, as we gear up for President Biden's State of the Union speech, we wanted to take a moment to reflect on all that the Biden-Harris team has accomplished in the past two years. From the Inflation Reduction Act , to the historic progress on climate change, infrastructure, gun safety, and rebuilding the middle class, President Biden and Vice President Harris are working tirelessly to deliver and build a better America. As we continue to move forward and tackle what lies ahead, we want to show President Biden that we stand with him and support his efforts. That's why we are reaching out to ask you to join Democrats nationwide in signing on to wish him good luck ahead of Tuesday’s speech. Signing the card is a small yet powerful way to show the President that we have his back and are cheering him on as he addresses the nation. Thank you for your continued support of the Democratic Party and for all that you do to make our country a better place.
